/** ID: AP90001.01 Name: apcapp_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/  
create trigger apcapp_delete on apcapp  
for delete  
as  
begin  
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */  
        return  
  
    declare @lcinvno char(20), @lcvendno char(10), @lcbankno char(10), @lcchkno char(10),   
      @lccardvend char(10), @lcchgtrsno char(20), @lccardacc char(30), @lctype char(1),   
      @ldpaid datetime, @ldvoid datetime, @lnfchkamt numeric(18,4), @lnfdiscamt numeric(18,4),   
      @lnfadjamt numeric(18,4), @lnchkamt numeric(18,4), @lndiscamt numeric(18,4),   
      @lnadjamt numeric(18,4), @lnxchgrate numeric(16,6), @lnpymtxrate numeric(16,6),   
      @lnappamt numeric(18,4), @lnvariance numeric(18,4), @lcsystem char(8), @ldcheck datetime,   
      @lc1099 char(1), @lcyear char(4), @lnopendb numeric(18,4), @ln1099amt numeric(18,4),   
      @lcapacc char(30), @lcuid char(15), @lntaxwhamt numeric(18,4), @lnftaxwhamt numeric(18,4),   
      @lltaxwh smallint, @lnapptaxwh numeric(18,4), @lnfapptaxwh numeric(18,4),   
      @lncbkamt numeric(18,4), @lnfcbkamt numeric(18,4), @lcpono char(10)  
  
	declare @lcappuid char(15), @lnamtdec int   /* .MS802 .10012784 .08/05/2011. */
  
    select @lltaxwh = ltaxwh from apsyst   
  
    execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'dsystem', @cretvalue = @lcsystem output  
    declare curapcapp scroll cursor  
    for select cinvno, cvendno, cbankno, cchkno, ccardvend, cchgtrsno, dpaid,  
      nfchkamt, nfdiscamt, nfadjamt, nchkamt, ndiscamt, nadjamt, ninvcxrate,  
      ntaxwhamt, nftaxwhamt, ncbkamt, nfcbkamt   
    from deleted  
  
    open curapcapp  
  
    fetch next from curapcapp   
    into @lcinvno, @lcvendno, @lcbankno, @lcchkno, @lccardvend, @lcchgtrsno, @ldpaid,  
      @lnfchkamt, @lnfdiscamt, @lnfadjamt, @lnchkamt,  @lndiscamt, @lnadjamt,   
      @lnxchgrate, @lntaxwhamt, @lnftaxwhamt, @lncbkamt, @lnfcbkamt  
  
    while @@fetch_status = 0  
        begin  
            /* retrieve invoice information from history files */  
            if exists (select cinvno from apinvch where cvendno = @lcvendno and  
              cinvno = @lcinvno)  
                begin  
                    insert into apinvc select * from apinvch where cvendno = @lcvendno and  
                        cinvno = @lcinvno  
                    delete from apinvch where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno  
  
                    /* Bring back prepayment invoice(s)  associated with this invoice */  
                    if exists (select 1 from apdapp where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno)  
                        begin  
                            insert into apinvc  
                            select * from apinvch  
                            where cvendno = @lcvendno and   
                              exists (select 1 from apdapp where cvendno = apinvch.cvendno and cdinvno = apinvch.cinvno  
                              and cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno)  
          
                            delete from apinvch  
                            where cvendno = @lcvendno and   
                              exists (select 1 from apdapp where cvendno = apinvch.cvendno and cdinvno = apinvch.cinvno  
                              and cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno)  
                        end  
  
                end      
            /* .MS802 .10012784 .08/05/2011 .begin. */            
            if exists(select cinvno from apdisth where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno) and
				(select lmultiap from apsyst) = 1
				begin
					insert into apdsta
					select * from apdstah 
					where exists(select 1 from apdisth
						where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno)

					delete from apdstah
					where exists(select 1 from apdisth
						where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno)						
				end
            /* .MS802 .10012784 .08/05/2011 .end. */
            
            /* AP invoice distribution */
            if exists (select cinvno from apdisth where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno)  
                begin  
                    insert into apdist select * from apdisth where cvendno = @lcvendno and  
                      cinvno = @lcinvno  
                    delete from apdisth where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno
                end  
                            
            /* one-time vendor */  
            if exists (select cvendno from apvendh where cvendno = @lcvendno and cstatus = 'O')  
              begin  
                insert into apvend select * from apvendh where cvendno = @lcvendno  
                delete from apvendh where cvendno = @lcvendno  
              end  
  
            /* #curpo will list PO's to unarchive */  
            create table #curpo (cvendno char(10), cpono char(10))  
            create index xvendpo on #curpo(cvendno, cpono)  
  
            /* Reverse Accrued PO by Amt */  
            if exists (select 1 from apracah where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno)  
                begin  
                    insert into #curpo  
                    select distinct cvendno, cpono  
                    from apracah where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno  
  
                    insert into apraca   
                    select * from apracah where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno  
                    delete from apracah where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno  
                end  
            /* Reverse Accrued PO by Qty */  
            if exists (select 1 from apracqh where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno)  
                begin  
                    insert into #curpo  
                    select distinct cvendno, cpono  
                    from apracqh where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno  
  
                    insert into apracq   
                    select * from apracqh where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno  
                    delete from apracqh where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno  
                end  
  
            /* Unarchive associated PO records */  
            declare curpo cursor for  
            select cpono from #curpo  
            open curpo  
            fetch next from curpo into @lcpono  
            while @@fetch_status = 0  
                begin  
                    execute vsp_pomcnlg_archive @cpono = @lcpono  
                    fetch next from curpo into @lcpono  
                end  
            close curpo  
            deallocate curpo  
            drop table #curpo  
  
            select @lnpymtxrate = coalesce((select nxchgrate from apchck where cbankno = @lcbankno   
              and cchkno = @lcchkno), coalesce((select nxchgrate from apvinv where cvendno = @lccardvend   
              and cinvno = @lcchgtrsno), @lnxchgrate))  
  
            execute vsp_am_basecurr @nforeignamt = @lnfchkamt, @nxchgrate = @lnxchgrate, @nretamt = @lnappamt output  
            execute vsp_am_basevariance @nforeignamt = @lnfchkamt,  
              @nnewrate = @lnpymtxrate, @noldrate = @lnxchgrate, @nretamt = @lnvariance output  
  
            update apinvc set  
              dclosed = null,  
              nfpaid = nfpaid - @lnfchkamt,  
              nfcomdisc = nfcomdisc - @lnfdiscamt,  
              nfcomadj = nfcomadj - @lnfadjamt,  
              nfbalance = nfbalance + @lnfchkamt + @lnfdiscamt + @lnfadjamt + @lnftaxwhamt,  
              npaid = npaid - @lnappamt,  
              ncomdisc = ncomdisc - @lndiscamt,  
              ncomadj = ncomadj - @lnadjamt,  
              nbalance = nbalance + @lnappamt + @lndiscamt + @lnadjamt + @lntaxwhamt,  
              ntotmcvar = ntotmcvar - @lnvariance,  
              nmcround = 0,  
              nfcomtaxwh = nfcomtaxwh - @lnftaxwhamt,  
              ncomtaxwh = ncomtaxwh - @lntaxwhamt  
              where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno  
  
            /* Adjust the void check amount to be applied amount only */  
            /* if this vendor does not HoldApply and user select to   */  
            /* keep as applied payment                                */  
            if exists (select cvendno from apvend where cvendno = @lcvendno and lholdapply = 0) and  
              exists (select lkeep from #tkeepapppmt where lkeep = 1)  
                begin  
                        --declare @lctaxfld char(16)
                        declare @lctaxfld char(50)   /* .MS901 .10013376 .11/29/2013. */
                                select @lctaxfld = ctaxfld1 from apvend where cvendno = @lcvendno  
                                select @lctaxfld = replace(@lctaxfld, '-', '')  
                                if @lltaxwh = 1 and ltrim(@lctaxfld) = ''  
                         begin  
                             select @lnfapptaxwh = @lnftaxwhamt  
                             select @lnapptaxwh = @lntaxwhamt  
                         end  
                     else  
                         begin  
                             select @lnfapptaxwh = 0  
                             select @lnapptaxwh = @lntaxwhamt  
                         end  
  
                    /* next update trigger on apinvc will recalculate home currencies amounts */  
                    if (select convert(char(8), ddisc, 112) from apinvc  
                      where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno) >= @lcsystem  
                        update apinvc set  
                          nfappamt = nfappamt + @lnfchkamt,  
                          nfappdisc = nfappdisc + @lnfdiscamt,  
                          nfappadj = nfappadj + @lnfadjamt,  
                          nfapptaxwh = nfapptaxwh + @lnfapptaxwh,  
                          napptaxwh = napptaxwh + @lnapptaxwh  
                        where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno  
                    else  
                        update apinvc set  
                          nfappamt = nfappamt + @lnfchkamt + @lnfdiscamt,  
                          nfappadj = nfappadj + @lnfadjamt,  
                          nfapptaxwh = nfapptaxwh + @lnfapptaxwh,  
                          napptaxwh = napptaxwh + @lnapptaxwh  
                        where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno  
                        
                    /* .MS802 .10012784 .08/05/2011 .begin. */
					if (select lmultiap from apsyst) = 1
						begin
							select @lcappuid = cuid from apvapp
							where cbankno = @lcbankno and cchkno = @lcchkno 
								and cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno
							
							select @lnamtdec = namtdec from cosyst
							
							update apdsta set 
								nfappamt = round(nfappamt + apdstc.nfchkamt, @lnamtdec),
								nfappdisc = round(nfappdisc + apdstc.nfdiscamt, @lnamtdec),
								nfappadj = round(nfappadj + apdstc.nfadjamt, @lnamtdec),
								nappamt = round(apdsta.nappamt + apdstc.nchkamt, @lnamtdec),
								nappdisc = round(nappdisc + apdstc.ndiscamt, @lnamtdec),
								nappadj = round(nappadj + apdstc.nadjamt, @lnamtdec)
							from apdsta
								left outer join apdstc on apdsta.cuid = apdstc.capuid
							where apdstc.ccashuid = @lcappuid
						end
					/* .MS802 .10012784 .08/05/2011 .end. */
                end
                
            /* .MS802 .10012784 .08/05/2011 .begin. */
        	if (select lmultiap from apsyst) = 1
				begin
					if @lcchkno <> ''
						select @lcappuid = cuid from apvapp
						where cbankno = @lcbankno and cchkno = @lcchkno 
							and cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno
					else
						select @lcappuid = cuid from deleted
						where cbankno = @lcbankno and cchgtrsno = @lcchgtrsno
							and cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno
						
					select @lnamtdec = namtdec from cosyst
															
					update apdsta set 
						nfpaid = round(nfpaid - apdstc.nfchkamt, @lnamtdec),
						nfcomdisc = round(nfcomdisc - apdstc.nfdiscamt, @lnamtdec),
						nfcomadj = round(nfcomadj - apdstc.nfadjamt, @lnamtdec),
						nfbalance = round(nfbalance + (apdstc.nfchkamt + apdstc.nfdiscamt + apdstc.nfadjamt), @lnamtdec),
						npaid = round(npaid - apdstc.nchkamt, @lnamtdec),
						ncomdisc = round(ncomdisc - apdstc.ndiscamt, @lnamtdec),
						ncomadj = round(ncomadj - apdstc.nadjamt, @lnamtdec), 
						nbalance = round(nbalance + (apdstc.nchkamt + apdstc.ndiscamt + apdstc.nadjamt), @lnamtdec)
					from apdsta
						left outer join apdstc on apdsta.cuid = apdstc.capuid
					where apdstc.ccashuid = @lcappuid
				end
			/* .MS802 .10012784 .08/05/2011 .end. */
  
            select @lctype = ctype,  
              @lc1099 = c1099  
            from apinvc where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno  
            select @lcyear = convert(char(4), datepart(year, @ldpaid)),   
              @ln1099amt = 0-@lnchkamt  
  
            /* update 1099 table based on company's home currency amount */  
            execute vsp_ap_update_1099 @c1099type = @lc1099, @c1099year = @lcyear,  
              @c1099vendno = @lcvendno, @namount = @ln1099amt  
  
            /* update vendor balances */  
            select @lnopendb =  
                case  
                    when (select ctype from apinvc where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno) = 'D'  
                        then @lnappamt  
                    when (select ninvamt from apinvc where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno) < 0  
                        then @lnappamt  
                    else  
                        0.0000  
                end  
  
            update apvend set  
                nopendb = nopendb - @lnopendb,  
                nbalance = nbalance + @lnappamt + @lndiscamt + @lnadjamt  + @lntaxwhamt  
              where cvendno = @lcvendno  
  
            /* the following routine will be handled separately in apvchk_insert when voiding checks to take care of cchkuid */  
            if @lcchkno = '' and @lcbankno = ''  
                begin  
                    /* update the void payables */  
                    select @lcapacc = case  
                      -- include additional cost to grn  
                      --when @lctype in (' ', 'A', 'R') then coalesce((select cglacc from apdist  
                      when @lctype in (' ', 'A', 'R', 'E') then coalesce((select cglacc from apdist   /* .MS803 .10014588 .07/13/2012. */
                        where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno and ctype like 'P%'),  
                          coalesce((select capacc from apvend where cvendno = @lcvendno), (select capacc from apsyst)))  
                      when @lctype = 'C' then coalesce((select cglacc from apdist  
                        where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno and ctype like 'P%'),  
                        (select capacc from apsyst))  
                      when @lctype = 'D' then coalesce((select cppacc from apvend, apinvc  
                        where apvend.cvendno = apinvc.cvendno and apinvc.cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno),  
                        (select cppacc from apsyst))  
                      when @lctype = 'B' then coalesce((select capacc from apvend, apinvc  
                        where apvend.cvendno= apinvc.cvendno and apinvc.cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno),  
                        (select capacc from apsyst)) end  
                          
                    select @lccardacc = case   
                        when @lctype = 'C' then coalesce((select cglacc from apdist  
                          where cvendno = @lccardvend and cinvno = @lcchgtrsno and coldtype = 'R'),   
                          coalesce((select capacc from apvend where cvendno = @lccardvend),   
                          (select ccardacc from apsyst)))  
                     end
                     
                    -- Make sure credit card account is set to NULL if empty
                    if @lccardacc = ''
                       select @lccardacc = null
  
                    select @ldvoid = isnull(dvoid, getdate())  
                    from apvinv   
                    where cvendno = @lccardvend and cinvno = @lcchgtrsno  
  
                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output  
                    insert into apvapp (cuid, cchkuid, cvendno, cinvno, cinvtype, ccardvend, cchgtrsno,   
                      capacc, ccardacc, ctogl, dpaid, dvoid, nchkamt, ndiscamt, nadjamt, nfchkamt, nfdiscamt,   
                      nfadjamt, ninvcxrate, ntaxwhamt, nftaxwhamt, ncbkamt, nfcbkamt)  
                    values (@lcuid, '', @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @lctype, @lccardvend, @lcchgtrsno,   
                      @lcapacc, @lccardacc, 'V', @ldpaid, @ldvoid, @lnchkamt, @lndiscamt, @lnadjamt, @lnfchkamt, @lnfdiscamt,   
                      @lnfadjamt, @lnxchgrate, @lntaxwhamt, @lnftaxwhamt, @lncbkamt, @lnfcbkamt)
                    
                    /* .MS802 .10012784 .08/05/2011 .begin. */
					if (select lmultiap from apsyst) = 1
						update apdstc set ccashuid = @lcuid
						where ccashuid = @lcappuid
					/* .MS802 .10012784 .08/05/2011 .end. */
                end  
            fetch next from curapcapp   
            into @lcinvno, @lcvendno, @lcbankno, @lcchkno, @lccardvend, @lcchgtrsno, @ldpaid,  
              @lnfchkamt, @lnfdiscamt, @lnfadjamt, @lnchkamt,  @lndiscamt, @lnadjamt,   
              @lnxchgrate, @lntaxwhamt, @lnftaxwhamt, @lncbkamt, @lnfcbkamt  
        end  
  
    close curapcapp  
    deallocate curapcapp  
end

/** ID: AP90002.01 Name: apcapp_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
CREATE trigger [dbo].[apcapp_insert] on [dbo].[apcapp]
for insert
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return

update            apcapp
set cinvtype = ''
WHERE        (cinvtype NOT IN ('', 'D')) AND (ctogl = '')


    declare @lcvendno char(10), @lctype char(1), @lnfchkamt numeric(18,4), 
      @lnfappamt numeric(18,4), @lnfdiscamt numeric(18,4), @lnfadjamt numeric(18,4),
      @lnftaxwhamt numeric(18,4), @lnxchgrate numeric(18,6), @lnfpaidamt numeric(18,4), 
      @lnpaidamt numeric(18,4),  @lnopendb numeric(18,4),
	  @lccardvend char(10), @lcchgtrsno char(20), @ldpaid datetime    

    declare curapcapp scroll cursor
    for select cvendno, cinvtype, ccardvend, cchgtrsno, nfchkamt, nfdiscamt, nfadjamt, nftaxwhamt, 
		ninvcxrate, dpaid
		from inserted
    open curapcapp
    fetch next from curapcapp 
    into @lcvendno, @lctype, @lccardvend, @lcchgtrsno, @lnfchkamt, @lnfdiscamt, @lnfadjamt, @lnftaxwhamt, 
		@lnxchgrate, @ldpaid
    while @@fetch_status = 0
        begin
            select @lnfpaidamt = @lnfchkamt + @lnfdiscamt + @lnfadjamt + @lnftaxwhamt,
              @lnopendb = 0

            -- Prepayment invoice or negative invoice payment
            if @lctype = 'D' or @lnfchkamt < 0   
                execute vsp_am_basecurr @nforeignamt = @lnfchkamt,
                  @nxchgrate = @lnxchgrate, @nretamt = @lnopendb output

            execute vsp_am_basecurr @nforeignamt = @lnfpaidamt,
              @nxchgrate = @lnxchgrate, @nretamt = @lnpaidamt output

            update apvend 
            set nopendb = nopendb + @lnopendb,
              nbalance = nbalance - @lnpaidamt
            where cvendno = @lcvendno

			if @lccardvend <> ''
                update apvend 
				set dlastpymt  = @ldpaid, 
                   clpymtno   = @lcchgtrsno, 
                   clsrcno    = @lccardvend,
                   clpymttype = 'CREDITCARD',
                   nlpaidamt  = @lnfchkamt
				where cvendno = @lcvendno
                  and (dlastpymt <= @ldpaid or dlastpymt is null)

			fetch next from curapcapp 
			into @lcvendno, @lctype, @lccardvend, @lcchgtrsno, @lnfchkamt, @lnfdiscamt, @lnfadjamt, @lnftaxwhamt, 
				@lnxchgrate, @ldpaid
        end

    close curapcapp
    deallocate curapcapp
end

/** ID: AP90056.01 Name: apchck_insert_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
CREATE trigger [dbo].[apchck_insert_update]
on [dbo].[apchck] 
for insert,update
as
    begin
		if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
			return
        if update(cchkno)
            update apvend 
            set clsrcno   = inserted.cbankno, 
                clpymtno  = inserted.cchkno,
                dlastpymt = inserted.dcheck,
				clpymttype = case when inserted.cchktype = 'C' then 'COMPUTER' 
								  when inserted.cchktype = 'H' then 'HNDWRTN' 
								  when inserted.cchktype = 'N' or inserted.cchktype = 'T' then 'NONCHCK'   
				end,
                nlpaidamt =	 case when cchktype <> 'H' then inserted.nfchkamt 
                else inserted.nbchkamt 
                end
            from inserted inner join apvend on inserted.cvendno = apvend.cvendno
            where inserted.dcheck >= apvend.dlastpymt or apvend.dlastpymt is null
    end

create trigger apdist_audit_trail on apdist
for insert, update, delete
as
begin
    declare @lcamuser char(30)

    declare @lntimediff as integer

    select @lntimediff = datediff(HOUR, getutcdate(), getdate())

    if object_id('tempdb..#am_settings') is not null 
       execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = "cusername", @cretvalue = @lcamuser output 
    else 
        begin
            declare @lccompanyid char(5)
            select @lccompanyid = ccompanyid from amwsys..amsyst where cdbname = db_name()
            execute vsp_am_createamsettings @lccompanyid, 1
            select * into #am_settings from ##am_settings
            execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = "cusername", @cretvalue = @lcamuser output 
        end

    if (select count(*) from inserted) = 0 and (select count(*) from deleted) = 0
        return 

    declare @lcglacc varchar(250), 
        @lcglacc_old varchar(250), 
        @lcampkfld varchar(30),
        @lcampkval varchar(250),
        @lcfldstat varchar(1)

    select @lcglacc = isnull(cglacc, ""), 
        @lcglacc_old = "",
        @lcampkfld = "cvendno+cinvno",
        @lcampkval = cvendno+cinvno,
        @lcfldstat = "N"
        from inserted

    if exists(select 1 from deleted) and exists(select 1 from inserted)  --UPDATE
        select @lcglacc_old = isnull(cglacc, ""),
        @lcfldstat = ""
        from deleted

    if exists(select 1 from deleted) and (select count(*) from inserted) = 0  --DELETE
    begin
        declare curdeleted scroll cursor
        for select isnull(cglacc, ""),
            "",
            "cvendno+cinvno",
            cvendno+cinvno,
            "D"        
        from deleted
        open curdeleted
        fetch next from curdeleted
        into @lcglacc_old,
            @lcglacc,
            @lcampkfld,
            @lcampkval,
            @lcfldstat
        while @@fetch_status = 0
        begin
            if @lcglacc <> @lcglacc_old 
                insert into coaudt(cuid, cusername, 
                    cpkfield, cpkvalue, cauditfld, coldvalue, cnewvalue,
                    tupdated, ntimediff, cstatus)
                values (right(newid(),8) + left(newid(),7), @lcamuser,
                    @lcampkfld, @lcampkval, "apdist.cglacc", @lcglacc_old, @lcglacc, 
                    getutcdate(), @lntimediff, @lcfldstat)
                                                            
            fetch next from curdeleted
            into @lcglacc_old,
            @lcglacc,
            @lcampkfld,
            @lcampkval,
            @lcfldstat
        end
        close curdeleted
        deallocate curdeleted
    end
            
    if update(cglacc) and @lcglacc <> @lcglacc_old 
        insert into coaudt(cuid, cusername, 
            cpkfield, cpkvalue, cauditfld, coldvalue, cnewvalue,
            tupdated, ntimediff, cstatus)
        values (right(newid(),8) + left(newid(),7), @lcamuser,
            @lcampkfld, @lcampkval, "apdist.cglacc", @lcglacc_old, @lcglacc, 
            getutcdate(), @lntimediff, @lcfldstat)

                                                            
end

/** ID: AP90003.01 Name: apdist_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger apdist_delete on apdist
for delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return

    -- Process multi-currency variance
    declare @lcvendno char(10), @lctype char(1), 
      @lntotmcvar numeric(18,4), @lnopendb numeric(18,4)

    declare curmcvar 
    scroll cursor for
    select cvendno, ctype, sum(ntotmcvar), 0
    from deleted
    group by cvendno, ctype
    having sum(ntotmcvar) <> 0
    open curmcvar
    fetch next from curmcvar into @lcvendno, @lctype, @lntotmcvar, @lnopendb
    while @@fetch_status = 0
        begin
            -- Payment from Prepayment Invoice
            if @lctype = 'D'
                select @lnopendb = @lntotmcvar

            update apvend 
            set nopendb = nopendb - @lnopendb,
              nbalance = nbalance + @lntotmcvar
            where cvendno = @lcvendno
            fetch next from curmcvar into @lcvendno, @lctype, @lntotmcvar, @lnopendb
        end
    close curmcvar
    deallocate curmcvar
end

create trigger apdist_insert on apdist

as
begin

    -- Process multi-currency variance
    declare @lcvendno char(10), @lctype char(1),

    select cvendno, ctype, sum(ntotmcvar), 0
    from inserted

    having sum(ntotmcvar) <> 0
    open curmcvar

        begin

/** ID: AP90005.01 Name: apdist_insert_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger apdist_insert_update on apdist
for insert, update
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return

    if update(ctype)
        begin
        if not exists (select ctype from inserted where ctype = 'V')
            return

        /* Void APDIST with offset records - 2 situations
           1. void invoice
           2. changing transferred distribution        */
        declare @lcuid char(15), @ldvoid datetime, @lcvendno char(10), @lcinvno char(20),
          @lcglacc char(30), @lcoldtype char(2), @lccurrcode char(3), @lcdesc char(35),
          @ldcreate datetime, @ldtrs datetime, @lnamount numeric(18,4), @lnfamount numeric(18,4),
          @lnxchgrate numeric(16,6), @lntaxamt1 numeric(18,4), @lntaxamt2 numeric(18,4),
          @lntaxamt3 numeric(18,4), @lnftaxamt1 numeric(18,4), @lnftaxamt2 numeric(18,4),
          @lnftaxamt3 numeric(18,4), @lclinedesc char(20)

        declare @lntotmcvar numeric(18,4), @lcsysdate char(8)
        execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'dsystem', @cretvalue = @lcsysdate output

        declare curapdist scroll cursor for
        select cvendno, cinvno, cglacc, coldtype, ccurrcode, 
          cdescript, dcreate, dtrs, namount, ntaxamt1, ntaxamt2, ntaxamt3, nfamount, 
          nftaxamt1, nftaxamt2, nftaxamt3, ntotmcvar, nxchgrate,
          clinedesc   
        from inserted
        open curapdist
        fetch next from curapdist into @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @lcglacc, @lcoldtype, @lccurrcode,
          @lcdesc, @ldcreate, @ldtrs, @lnamount, @lntaxamt1, @lntaxamt2, @lntaxamt3, @lnfamount, 
          @lnftaxamt1, @lnftaxamt2, @lnftaxamt3, @lntotmcvar, @lnxchgrate,
          @lclinedesc   
        while @@fetch_status = 0
            begin
                execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output
                /* find void date from voided invoice */
                select @ldvoid = (select dvoid from apvinv
                  where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno)
                /* not voiding an invoice but changing transferred distribution */

                if @ldvoid is null
                   select @ldvoid = @ldtrs
                else
                    begin
                        select @lcdesc = 'Void Invoice - # ' + @lcinvno   
                    end

                insert into apdist (cuid, cvendno, cinvno, cglacc, ctype, coldtype, cdescript,
                  ccurrcode, dcreate, dtrs, namount, ntaxamt1, ntaxamt2, ntaxamt3, 
                  nfamount, nftaxamt1, nftaxamt2, nftaxamt3, ntotmcvar, nxchgrate,clinedesc)  
                  values (@lcuid, @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @lcglacc, 'V', @lcoldtype, @lcdesc,
                  @lccurrcode, @lcsysdate, @ldvoid, 0-@lnamount, 0-@lntaxamt1, 0-@lntaxamt2, 0-@lntaxamt3, 
                  0-@lnfamount, 0-@lnftaxamt1, 0-@lnftaxamt2, 0-@lnftaxamt3, 0-@lntotmcvar, @lnxchgrate,
                  @lclinedesc)  

				/* .MS802 .10012784 .07/18/2011 .begin. */
				if @lcoldtype = 'P '
					begin
        				insert into apdsta (cuid, cvendno, cinvno, capuid, capacc, capdesc, namount, nfamount, 
	        				nchrgamt, nfchrgamt, ndappamt, nfdappamt, nnonpamt, nfnonpamt, 
							npaid, nfpaid, ncomdisc, nfcomdisc, ncomadj, nfcomadj, 
							nappamt, nfappamt, nappdisc, nfappdisc, nappadj, nfappadj,
        					nbalance, nfbalance)
						select left(newid(),8) + right(newid(),7), cvendno, cinvno, @lcuid, 
							capacc, capdesc, 0-namount, 0-nfamount, 
							0-nchrgamt, 0-nfchrgamt, 0-ndappamt, 0-nfdappamt, 0-nnonpamt, 0-nfnonpamt, 
							0-npaid, 0-nfpaid, 0-ncomdisc, 0-nfcomdisc, 0-ncomadj, 0-nfcomadj, 
							0-nappamt, 0-nfappamt, 0-nappdisc, 0-nfappdisc, 0-nappadj, 0-nfappadj,
							0-nbalance, 0-nfbalance
						from apdsta where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno and 
							capuid in (select cuid from inserted where coldtype = 'P ')
					end				
				/* .MS802 .10012784 .07/18/2011 .end. */

                fetch next from curapdist into @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @lcglacc, @lcoldtype, @lccurrcode,
                  @lcdesc, @ldcreate, @ldtrs, @lnamount, @lntaxamt1, @lntaxamt2, @lntaxamt3, @lnfamount, 
                  @lnftaxamt1, @lnftaxamt2, @lnftaxamt3, @lntotmcvar, @lnxchgrate,
                  @lclinedesc   
            end
        close curapdist
        deallocate curapdist
    end
end

/** ID: AP90058.01 Name: apetrs_insert_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger apetrs_insert_update
on apetrs
for insert, update
as
    begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
    return
		if update(cchkno)
            update apvend   
            set clsrcno   = inserted.cbankno,
                clpymtno  = inserted.cchkno,
                dlastpymt = inserted.dtrs,
                clpymttype = 'ACH',
                nlpaidamt =  inserted.nfeamount
            from inserted inner join apvend on inserted.cvendno = apvend.cvendno
            where inserted.dtrs >= apvend.dlastpymt or apvend.dlastpymt is null
  
        -- if update(lvoid)
        if update(lvoid) and (select lvoid from inserted) = 1   /* .MS901 .10015381 .12/16/2013. */
            begin
                declare @lcbankno char(10), @lcchkno char(10), @lcvendno char(10), @lcpayto char(40),  
                  @lcchkuid char(15), @lcuid char(15), @lcinvno char(20), @lcinvtype char(1),  
                  @ldpaid datetime, @ldvoid datetime,     
                  @lneamount numeric(18,4), @lndiscamt numeric(18,4), @lnadjamt numeric(18,4),  
                  @lnfeamount numeric(18,4), @lnfdiscamt numeric(18,4), @lnfadjamt numeric(18,4),  
                  @lnxchgrate numeric(16,6), @lcapacc char(30), @lctype char(1)     
  
                declare @lntaxwhamt numeric(18,4), @lnftaxwhamt numeric(18,4), @lltaxwh smallint,  
                  @lnapptaxwh numeric(18,4), @lnfapptaxwh numeric(18,4), @lncbkamt numeric(18,4), @lnfcbkamt numeric(18,4)  
                select @lltaxwh = ltaxwh from apsyst  
  
                execute vsp_am_assignuidnew @cretvalue = @lcchkuid output    
  
                declare curapetrs scroll cursor for  
                select cbankno, cchkno, cvendno, cpayto, dvoid from inserted  
                  
                open curapetrs  
                fetch next from curapetrs into @lcbankno, @lcchkno, @lcvendno, @lcpayto, @ldvoid     
                while @@fetch_status = 0     
                    begin  
                        if not (@lcvendno = 'VOID' and @lcpayto like 'VOID DURING%')  
                            /* do nothing if voided because of alignment & reprint */  
                            /* else delete trigger of apcapp will adjust apinvc, apvend, apvapp, ap1099 */  
                            begin  
                                declare curapvapp scroll cursor for  
                                select cinvno, cinvtype, dpaid, nchkamt, ndiscamt, nadjamt, nfchkamt, nfdiscamt,   
                                  nfadjamt, ninvcxrate, ntaxwhamt, nftaxwhamt, ncbkamt, nfcbkamt  
                                from apcapp  
                                where cbankno = @lcbankno and cchkno = @lcchkno and cvendno = @lcvendno
                                and cbnkroute <> ''   /* .MS901 .10015381 .12/16/2013. */  
                                open curapvapp  
                                fetch next from curapvapp   
                                into @lcinvno, @lctype, @ldpaid, @lneamount, @lndiscamt, @lnadjamt, @lnfeamount, @lnfdiscamt,   
                                  @lnfadjamt, @lnxchgrate, @lntaxwhamt, @lnftaxwhamt, @lncbkamt, @lnfcbkamt  
                                while @@fetch_status = 0     
                                    begin
										select @ldvoid = isnull(@ldvoid, inserted.dtrs) from inserted   /* .MS901 .10015381 .12/16/2013. */  
                                        select @lcapacc =  
                                          case  
                                            -- include additional cost to grn  
                                            when @lctype in (' ', 'C', 'A', 'R') then coalesce((select cglacc from apdist  
                                              where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno and ctype like 'P%'),  
                                              (select cglacc from apdisth where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno   
                                              and ctype like 'P%'), (select capacc from apvend where cvendno = @lcvendno),   
                                              (select capacc from apsyst))  
                                            when @lctype = 'D' then coalesce((select cppacc from apvend, apinvc  
                                              where apvend.cvendno = apinvc.cvendno and apinvc.cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno),  
                                              (select cppacc from apsyst))  
                                            when @lctype = 'B' then coalesce((select capacc from apvend, apinvc  
                                              where apvend.cvendno= apinvc.cvendno and apinvc.cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno),  
                                              (select capacc from apsyst))  
                                          end  
                                        execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output  
  
                                        insert into apvapp (cuid, cchkuid, cbankno, cchkno, cvendno, cinvno, cinvtype,   
                                          capacc, ctogl, dpaid, dvoid, nchkamt, ndiscamt, nadjamt, nfchkamt, nfdiscamt,   
                                          nfadjamt, ninvcxrate, ntaxwhamt, nftaxwhamt, ncbkamt, nfcbkamt)  
                                        values (@lcuid, @lcchkuid, @lcbankno, @lcchkno, @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @lctype,   
                                          @lcapacc, 'V', @ldpaid, @ldvoid, @lneamount, @lndiscamt, @lnadjamt, @lnfeamount, @lnfdiscamt,   
                                          @lnfadjamt, @lnxchgrate, @lntaxwhamt, @lnftaxwhamt, @lncbkamt, @lnfcbkamt)  
  
                                          insert into apvacb(cuid, cchkuid, cvendno, cinvno, cbankno, cchkno,  
                                            ctaxcode, dtrs, ntaxver, nadjcbamt, ndisccbamt, ncbkamt, nfcbkamt)  
                                          select cuid, @lcchkuid, cvendno, cinvno, cbankno, cchkno,  
                                            ctaxcode, dtrs, ntaxver, nadjcbamt, ndisccbamt, ncbkamt, nfcbkamt  
                                          from apcacb  
                                          where apcacb.cbankno = @lcbankno and apcacb.cchkno = @lcchkno  
                                            and apcacb.cvendno = @lcvendno and apcacb.cinvno = @lcinvno  
  
                                        update apetrs set cvchkuid = @lcchkuid where cchkno = @lcchkno  
  
                                        fetch next from curapvapp   
                                        into @lcinvno, @lctype, @ldpaid, @lneamount, @lndiscamt, @lnadjamt, @lnfeamount, @lnfdiscamt,   
                                          @lnfadjamt, @lnxchgrate, @lntaxwhamt, @lnftaxwhamt, @lncbkamt, @lnfcbkamt  
                                    end  
                                delete from apcacb where cbankno = @lcbankno and cchkno = @lcchkno and cvendno = @lcvendno     
                                --delete from apcapp where cbankno = @lcbankno and cchkno = @lcchkno and cvendno = @lcvendno
                                delete from apcapp where cbankno = @lcbankno and cchkno = @lcchkno and cvendno = @lcvendno and cbnkroute <> ''   /* .MS901 .10015381 .12/16/2013. */  
                                close curapvapp  
                                deallocate curapvapp  
                            end  
                    fetch next from curapetrs into @lcbankno, @lcchkno, @lcvendno, @lcpayto, @ldvoid     
                end  
        close curapetrs  
        deallocate curapetrs
    end
end

/** ID: AP90006.01 Name: apfinc_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/  
create trigger apfinc_insert on apfinc  
for insert  
as  
begin  
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */  
        return  
  
    declare @lcvendno char(10), @lcinvno char(20), @ldfincharge datetime,  
		@lnchrgamt numeric(18,4), @lnfchrgamt numeric(18,4), @lcapacc char(30),  
		@lcintacc char(30), @lcuid char(15), @lcsystem char(8), @lctype char(1)  
      
    /* .MS802 .10012784 .07/27/2011 .begin. */    
    declare @llmultiap smallint  
      
    select @llmultiap = lmultiap from apsyst  
    if @llmultiap = 1  
		begin  
			declare @lncntr int, @lnloop int, @lcapuid char(15), @lcfcacc varchar(30),  
				@lcuid2 char(15), @lndistchrg numeric(18,4), @lcapdesc char(40),   
				@lnuid numeric(10), @lctimeid char(8), @lnamtdec int,				
				@lnsumchrg numeric (18,4), @lnfsumchrg numeric (18,4)  
      
			select @lnamtdec = namtdec from cosyst  
     
			create table #tapdsta(primary_key int identity(1,1) not null,  
				capuid char(15), crefacct char(30), cfcacc char(30), capacc char(30), 
				nchrgamt numeric(18,4), nfchrgamt numeric(18,4))  
			  
			declare @lcstring char(10), @lnstart int, @lnlength int,   
				@lclength char(2), @lcstart char(2)  
			  
			execute vsp_am_getfundsegpos @lcstring output  
			  
			select @lcstart =  left(@lcstring,charindex('|',@lcstring)-1)  
			select @lclength = right(rtrim(@lcstring),charindex('|', rtrim(@lcstring))-1)   
			  
			select @lnstart = cast(@lcstart as int)  
			select @lnlength = cast(@lclength as int)  
		end  
	/* .MS802 .10012784 .07/27/2011 .end. */    
  
    declare curapfinc scroll cursor for  
    select cvendno, cinvno, dfincharge, nchrgamt, nfchrgamt from inserted  
    open curapfinc  
    fetch next from curapfinc into @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @ldfincharge, @lnchrgamt, @lnfchrgamt  
    while @@fetch_status = 0     
        begin  
            update apinvc set  
              apinvc.nchrgamt = apinvc.nchrgamt + @lnchrgamt,  
              apinvc.nfchrgamt = apinvc.nfchrgamt + @lnfchrgamt,  
              apinvc.nlchrgamt = apinvc.nlchrgamt + @lnchrgamt,  
              apinvc.nflchrgamt = apinvc.nflchrgamt + @lnfchrgamt,  
              apinvc.dlfincharg = @ldfincharge,  
              apinvc.nbalance = apinvc.nbalance + @lnchrgamt,  
              apinvc.nfbalance = apinvc.nfbalance + @lnfchrgamt  
              where apinvc.cvendno = @lcvendno and apinvc.cinvno = @lcinvno  
  
            select @lctype = (select ctype from apinvc  
              where apinvc.cvendno = @lcvendno and apinvc.cinvno = @lcinvno)  
  
            if @lctype = 'B'  
                select @lcapacc = (select capacc from apvend where cvendno = @lcvendno)  
            else  
                select @lcapacc = (select cglacc from apdist where cvendno = @lcvendno  
                  and cinvno = @lcinvno and ctype = 'P ')  
  
            if @lcapacc is not null  
                begin  
                    execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'dsystem', @cretvalue = @lcsystem output  
  
                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output  
                      
                    insert into apdist (cuid, cvendno, cinvno, cglacc, ctype, cdescript,  
						ccurrcode, dcreate, dtrs, namount, nfamount, nxchgrate)   
					select @lcuid, @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @lcapacc, 'F', 'Fin Chg - # '+@lcinvno,  
						apinvc.ccurrcode, @lcsystem, @ldfincharge, 0-@lnchrgamt,  
						0-@lnfchrgamt, apinvc.nxchgrate   
					from apinvc  
					where apinvc.cvendno = @lcvendno and apinvc.cinvno = @lcinvno  
       
					 /* .MS802 .10012784 .07/27/2011 .begin. */       
					if @llmultiap = 1  
						begin  
							declare @lnsumbal numeric(18,4), @lnfsumbal numeric(18,4), @lntotpaid numeric(18,4), 
									@lcapdstauid char(30)
							
							select @lnsumbal = sum(nbalance), 
								   @lnfsumbal = sum(nfbalance), 
								   @lntotpaid = sum(nfpaid + nfcomadj + nfcomdisc), 
								   @lcapdstauid = max(capuid)
								from apdsta 
									inner join apdist on apdist.ctype = 'P' and apdsta.capuid = apdist.cuid  
								where apdist.cvendno = @lcvendno and apdist.cinvno = @lcinvno
											
							insert into #tapdsta (capuid, crefacct, cfcacc, capacc, nchrgamt, nfchrgamt)  
							select apdsta.capuid, '', glsegv.cfcacc, apdsta.capacc, 
								0 - round(((nbalance / @lnsumbal) * @lnchrgamt), @lnamtdec) as nchrgamt,  
								0 - round(((nfbalance / @lnfsumbal) * @lnfchrgamt), @lnamtdec) as nfchrgamt
							from apdsta
								left outer join glsegv on csegno = (select nfundseg from glsyst)  
									and glsegv.csegvalue = substring(apdsta.capacc, @lnstart, @lnlength)
							where apdsta.cvendno = @lcvendno and apdsta.cinvno = @lcinvno and apdsta.nfbalance <> 0
								and exists(select 1 from apdist where cuid = apdsta.capuid)
				  			
							-- Get number of records  
							select @lnloop = isnull(count(*),0)  
							from #tapdsta
							where (cfcacc is not null or cfcacc <> '') and (nchrgamt <> 0 or nfchrgamt <> 0)  
				  
							select @lnsumchrg = sum(nchrgamt), 
								   @lnfsumchrg = sum(nfchrgamt)
								from #tapdsta
				  
							if @lnsumchrg <> 0-@lnchrgamt
								begin
									declare @lndiff numeric(18,4)
									select @lndiff = @lnsumchrg - (0-@lnchrgamt)
									
									update top (1) #tapdsta set nchrgamt = nchrgamt - @lndiff
								end
							if @lnfsumchrg <> 0-@lnfchrgamt
								begin
									declare @lnfdiff numeric(18,4)
									select @lnfdiff = @lnfsumchrg - (0-@lnfchrgamt)
									
									update top (1) #tapdsta set nfchrgamt = nfchrgamt - @lnfdiff
								end
								
							select @lncntr = 1  
						end  
				        
					if @llmultiap = 0 or not exists(select 1 from apdsta where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno)
						begin  
							/* Non-multiple AP invoice distribution */  
							select @lcintacc = (select cintacc from apsyst)  
							execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output  
							insert into apdist (cuid, cvendno, cinvno, cglacc, ctype, cdescript,  
								ccurrcode, dcreate, dtrs, namount , nfamount, nxchgrate)  
							select @lcuid, @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @lcintacc, 'F', 'Fin Chg - # ' + @lcinvno,   
								apinvc.ccurrcode, @lcsystem, @ldfincharge, @lnchrgamt, @lnfchrgamt, apinvc.nxchgrate   
							from apinvc  
							where apinvc.cvendno = @lcvendno and apinvc.cinvno = @lcinvno  
						end  
					else  
						begin  
							select @lnuid = (select nuid from #am_settings)  
							update #am_settings set nuid = nuid + @lnloop + 1  
							select @lctimeid = (select ctimeid from #am_settings)  
				  
							while @lnloop > 0 and @lncntr <= @lnloop  
								begin  
									select @lcuid2 = @lctimeid + convert(char(7),@lnuid+@lncntr)  
					          
									insert into apdist (cuid, cvendno, cinvno, cglacc, ctype, cdescript,  
										ccurrcode, dcreate, dtrs, namount, nfamount, nxchgrate)  
									select @lcuid2, @lcvendno, @lcinvno, cfcacc, 'F', 'Fin Chg - # '+@lcinvno,  
										apinvc.ccurrcode, @lcsystem, @ldfincharge, 0-a.nchrgamt, 0 -a.nfchrgamt, apinvc.nxchgrate  
									from #tapdsta a  
										inner join apinvc on apinvc.cvendno = @lcvendno and apinvc.cinvno = @lcinvno  
									where (a.cfcacc is not null or a.cfcacc <> '') and (a.nchrgamt <> 0 or a.nfchrgamt <> 0)  
										and primary_key = @lncntr  
							        
									insert into apdsta (cuid, cvendno, cinvno, cfcuid, capacc, capdesc, 
										nchrgamt, nfchrgamt, nbalance, nfbalance)
									select @lcuid2, @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @lcuid, #tapdsta.capacc, 
										glacct.cdescript as capdesc, nchrgamt, nfchrgamt, 0-nchrgamt, 0-nfchrgamt
									from #tapdsta
										left outer join glsegv on csegno = (select nfundseg from glsyst)  
											and glsegv.csegvalue = substring(#tapdsta.capacc, @lnstart, @lnlength)
										left outer join glacct on #tapdsta.capacc = glacct.cacctid
									where (#tapdsta.cfcacc is not null or #tapdsta.cfcacc <> '')
										and (#tapdsta.nchrgamt <> 0 or #tapdsta.nfchrgamt <> 0)  
										and primary_key = @lncntr
							        							        
									update a set a.nchrgamt = a.nchrgamt + b.nchrgamt,   
										a.nfchrgamt = a.nfchrgamt + b.nfchrgamt,  
										a.nbalance = a.nbalance -  b.nchrgamt, 
										a.nfbalance = a.nfbalance - b.nfchrgamt
									from apdsta a
										inner join #tapdsta b on a.capuid = b.capuid and a.capacc = b.capacc
									where a.cfcuid = '' and (b.cfcacc is not null  or b.cfcacc <> '') and   
										(b.nchrgamt <> 0 or b.nfchrgamt <> 0) and primary_key = @lncntr
							        
									select @lncntr = @lncntr  + 1  
								end  					          
						end  
					/* .MS802 .10012784 .07/27/2011 .begin. */  
				end  
				 
			update apvend set nbalance = nbalance + @lnchrgamt where cvendno = @lcvendno  
			fetch next from curapfinc into  
				@lcvendno, @lcinvno, @ldfincharge, @lnchrgamt, @lnfchrgamt  
		end  
    close curapfinc  
    deallocate curapfinc  
end

/** ID: AP90007.01 Name: apinvc_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger apinvc_delete on apinvc
for delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return
    declare @lcinvno char(20), @lcvendno char(10), @lccurrcode char(3),
      @lninvamt numeric(18,4), @lnchrgamt numeric(18,4), @lnglmcround numeric(18,4)
    declare @lnnewopendb numeric(18,4), @lcuid char(15), @lccreatedate char(8),
      @ldvoid datetime, @lcapacc char(30), @lcxchgacc char(30), @lchomecurrcode char(3)
    declare @lctype char(1), @lnbalance numeric(18,4), @ldinvoice datetime,
      @lndappamt numeric(18,4)   
    declare curapinvc scroll cursor for
    select cvendno, cinvno, ccurrcode, ctype, dinvoice, ninvamt, nchrgamt, nglmcround, nbalance, ndappamt   
    from deleted
    open curapinvc
    fetch next from curapinvc into @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @lccurrcode, @lctype, @ldinvoice,
      @lninvamt, @lnchrgamt, @lnglmcround, @lnbalance, @lndappamt   
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
        begin
            if @lninvamt < 0
                select @lnnewopendb = @lninvamt
            else
                select @lnnewopendb = 0.0000
            if @lctype <> 'D'
                update apvend set natdpamt = natdpamt - @lninvamt,
                  nbalance = nbalance - (@lnbalance + @lndappamt),
                  nopendb = nopendb + @lnnewopendb + @lndappamt,
                  nytdpamt = nytdpamt - (case when @ldinvoice >= dytdstart and @ldinvoice < dateadd(year, 1, dytdstart) then @lninvamt else 0 end)
                  where cvendno = @lcvendno

            select @ldvoid = (select dvoid from apvinv
              where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno)

            select @lcapacc = (select cglacc from apdist
              where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno and ctype = 'P')

            /* Retain original distribution type */
            update apdist set coldtype = ctype where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno and ctype <> 'V'

            /* Process the current distribution only*/
            update apdist set ctype = 'V' where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno and ctype <> 'V'

            if @lnglmcround <> 0   /* adjust GL transfer rounding error */
                begin
                    execute vsp_am_settings
                      @cvarname = 'dsystem', @cretvalue = @lccreatedate output
                    execute vsp_am_settings
                      @cvarname = 'ccurrcode', @cretvalue = @lchomecurrcode output
                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output

                    select @lcxchgacc = (select cxchgacc from cocurr where ccurrcode = @lccurrcode)

                    insert into apdist (cuid, cvendno, cinvno, cglacc, ctype, cdescript,
                      ccurrcode, dcreate, dtrs, namount, nfamount, nxchgrate)
                      values (@lcuid, @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @lcxchgacc, 'V', 'Rounding',
                      @lchomecurrcode, @lccreatedate, @ldvoid, @lnglmcround, @lnglmcround, 1)

                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output
                    insert into apdist (cuid, cvendno, cinvno, cglacc, ctype, cdescript,
                      ccurrcode, dcreate, dtrs, namount, nfamount, nxchgrate)
                      values (@lcuid, @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @lcapacc, 'V', 'Rounding',
                        @lchomecurrcode, @lccreatedate, @ldvoid, 0-@lnglmcround, 0-@lnglmcround, 1)
                end

            delete from apfinc where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno
            delete from apdnot where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno
            fetch next from curapinvc into @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @lccurrcode, @lctype, @ldinvoice,
              @lninvamt, @lnchrgamt, @lnglmcround, @lnbalance, @lndappamt   
        end

    close curapinvc
    deallocate curapinvc
end

/** ID: AP90008.01 Name: apinvc_insert_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger apinvc_insert_update on apinvc
for insert, update
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return
    declare @lcinvno char(20), @lcvendno char(10), @lc1099 char(1), @lninvamt numeric(18,4),
      @lnfinvamt numeric(18,4), @lnfnondisc numeric(18,4), @lnfdiscamt numeric(18,4),
      @lnxchgrate numeric(16,6), @lnfappamt numeric(18,4), @lnfappadj numeric(18,4),
      @lnfappdisc numeric(18,4)
    declare @lnnewinvamt numeric(18,4), @lnnewnondisc numeric(18,4),
      @lnnewdiscamt numeric(18,4), @lnnewopendb numeric(18,4), @ldclosed datetime,
      @lnnewappamt numeric(18,4), @lnnewappadj numeric(18,4), @lnnewappdisc numeric(18,4)
    declare @lnfbalance numeric(18,4), @lnnewbalance numeric(18,4), @lctype char(1),
      @lnbalance numeric(16, 2), @ldinvoice datetime, @ldinvclosed datetime,   
      @lndappamt numeric(18,4), @lnfdappamt numeric(18,4), @lnnewdappamt numeric(18,4)   
    if (update(nfappamt) or update(nfappadj) or update(nfappdisc)) and not
      (update(nfinvamt) or update(nfnondisc) or update(nfdiscamt) or update(nxchgrate) or
      update(nfpaid) or update(nfcomdisc) or update(nfcomadj))
        begin   /*  apply payment */
            declare curapapmt scroll cursor for
            select cinvno, cvendno, nfappamt, nfappadj, nfappdisc, nxchgrate from inserted
            open curapapmt
            fetch next from curapapmt
            into @lcinvno, @lcvendno, @lnfappamt, @lnfappadj, @lnfappdisc, @lnxchgrate   
            while @@fetch_status = 0   
                begin
                    execute vsp_am_basecurr @nforeignamt = @lnfappamt,
                      @nxchgrate = @lnxchgrate, @nretamt = @lnnewappamt output
                    execute vsp_am_basecurr @nforeignamt = @lnfappadj,
                      @nxchgrate = @lnxchgrate, @nretamt = @lnnewappadj output
                    execute vsp_am_basecurr @nforeignamt = @lnfappdisc,
                      @nxchgrate = @lnxchgrate, @nretamt = @lnnewappdisc output
                    update apinvc
                    set nappamt = @lnnewappamt,
                      nappadj = @lnnewappadj,
                      nappdisc = @lnnewappdisc
                    where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno
                    fetch next from curapapmt
                    into @lcinvno, @lcvendno, @lnfappamt, @lnfappadj, @lnfappdisc, @lnxchgrate
                end
            close curapapmt
            deallocate curapapmt
        end

    -- Do not check update on balance since apply payment touches this field
    if update(nfinvamt) or update(nfnondisc) or update(nfdiscamt) or update(nfdappamt) or update(nfnonpamt)
      or update(nxchgrate) or update(dinvoice)
        begin   /* create/amend invoice */
            declare curapinvc scroll cursor for
             select cinvno, cvendno, ctype, dinvoice, dclosed, ninvamt,   
              nfinvamt, nfnondisc, nfdiscamt, nfdappamt, nfbalance, nxchgrate from inserted
            open curapinvc
            fetch next from curapinvc
            into @lcinvno, @lcvendno, @lctype, @ldinvoice, @ldinvclosed, @lninvamt,   
              @lnfinvamt, @lnfnondisc, @lnfdiscamt, @lnfdappamt, @lnfbalance, @lnxchgrate
            while @@fetch_status = 0   
                begin
                    execute vsp_am_basecurr @nforeignamt = @lnfinvamt,
                      @nxchgrate = @lnxchgrate, @nretamt = @lnnewinvamt output
                    execute vsp_am_basecurr @nforeignamt = @lnfnondisc,
                      @nxchgrate = @lnxchgrate, @nretamt = @lnnewnondisc output
                    execute vsp_am_basecurr @nforeignamt = @lnfdiscamt,
                      @nxchgrate = @lnxchgrate, @nretamt = @lnnewdiscamt output
                    execute vsp_am_basecurr @nforeignamt = @lnfdappamt,
                      @nxchgrate = @lnxchgrate, @nretamt = @lnnewdappamt output
                    if @lnnewinvamt < 0
                        select @lnnewopendb = @lninvamt - @lnnewinvamt
                    else
                        select @lnnewopendb = 0.0000

                    -- get old values
                    if exists (select cinvno from deleted where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno)
                        select @lndappamt = isnull(ndappamt, 0),
                          @lnbalance = isnull(nbalance, 0)
                        from deleted
                        where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno
                    else
                        select @lndappamt = 0, @lnbalance = 0

                    update apinvc
                    set ninvamt = @lnnewinvamt,
                      nnondisc = @lnnewnondisc,
                      ndiscamt = @lnnewdiscamt,
                      nbalance = @lnnewinvamt + nchrgamt - (npaid + ndappamt + nnonpamt + ncomadj + ncomdisc)   
                    where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno

                    -- get current invoice balance
                    select @lnnewbalance = nbalance
                    from apinvc
                    where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno

                    if @lctype <> 'D'
                        update apvend set natdpamt = natdpamt - @lninvamt + @lnnewinvamt,
                          nbalance = nbalance - (@lnbalance + @lndappamt) + (@lnnewbalance + @lnnewdappamt),
                          nopendb = nopendb + @lnnewopendb + @lndappamt - @lnnewdappamt,   
                          nytdpamt = nytdpamt - isnull((select ninvamt from deleted
                              where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno and dinvoice >= apvend.dytdstart
                              and dinvoice < dateadd(year, 1, apvend.dytdstart)), 0) +
                            isnull((select @lnnewinvamt from apinvc where cvendno = @lcvendno
                              and cinvno = @lcinvno and dinvoice >= apvend.dytdstart
                              and dinvoice < dateadd(year, 1, apvend.dytdstart)), 0)
                        where cvendno = @lcvendno



                    delete from apdist where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno and
                      nfamount = 0 and namount = 0 and ctype <> 'P'

                    fetch next from curapinvc
                    into @lcinvno, @lcvendno, @lctype, @ldinvoice, @ldinvclosed, @lninvamt,  
                      @lnfinvamt, @lnfnondisc, @lnfdiscamt, @lnfdappamt, @lnfbalance, @lnxchgrate
                end
            close curapinvc
            deallocate curapinvc

            if (select count(*) from inserted) = 1
                /* when one invoice is being inserted, currently only for create/amend ap invoice */
                update apvend set cbankno = (select inserted.cbankno from inserted)
                  from apvend, inserted
                  where inserted.cvendno = apvend.cvendno and apvend.cbankno = ''
        end

    update apinvc
    set dclosed = isnull(apinvc.dlastpaid, apinvc.dinvoice),
      nmcround  = apinvc.nmcround + apinvc.nbalance,
      nbalance  = 0
    from inserted as a
      left outer join apinvc on apinvc.cvendno = a.cvendno and apinvc.cinvno = a.cinvno
    where apinvc.nfbalance = 0 and apinvc.dclosed is null
end

/** ID: AP90009.01 Name: aprcri_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/

/** ID: AP90010.01 Name: apvchk_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/  
create trigger apvchk_insert on apvchk  
for insert  
as  
begin  
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */  
        return  
    declare @lcbankno char(10), @lcchkno char(10), @lcvendno char(10), @lcpayto char(40),  
      @lcchkuid char(15), @lcuid char(15), @lcinvno char(20), @lcinvtype char(1),  
      @ldpaid datetime, @ldvoid datetime,     
      @lnchkamt numeric(18,4), @lndiscamt numeric(18,4), @lnadjamt numeric(18,4),  
      @lnfchkamt numeric(18,4), @lnfdiscamt numeric(18,4), @lnfadjamt numeric(18,4),  
      @lnxchgrate numeric(16,6), @lcapacc char(30), @lctype char(1)     
  
    declare @lntaxwhamt numeric(18,4), @lnftaxwhamt numeric(18,4), @lltaxwh smallint,  
      @lnapptaxwh numeric(18,4), @lnfapptaxwh numeric(18,4), @lncbkamt numeric(18,4), @lnfcbkamt numeric(18,4)  
    select @lltaxwh = ltaxwh from apsyst  
  
    declare curapvchk scroll cursor for  
    select cuid, cbankno, cchkno, cvendno, cpayto, dvoid from inserted  
  
    open curapvchk  
    fetch next from curapvchk into @lcchkuid, @lcbankno, @lcchkno, @lcvendno, @lcpayto, @ldvoid     
    while @@fetch_status = 0     
        begin  
            if not (@lcvendno = 'VOID' and @lcpayto like 'VOID DURING%')  
                /* do nothing if voided because of alignment & reprint */  
                /* else delete trigger of apcapp will adjust apinvc, apvend, apvapp, ap1099 */  
                begin  
                    declare curapvapp scroll cursor for  
                    select cinvno, cinvtype, dpaid, nchkamt, ndiscamt, nadjamt, nfchkamt, nfdiscamt,   
                      nfadjamt, ninvcxrate, ntaxwhamt, nftaxwhamt, ncbkamt, nfcbkamt  
                    from apcapp  
                    where cbankno = @lcbankno and cchkno = @lcchkno and cvendno = @lcvendno
                    and cbnkroute = ''   /* .MS901 .10015381 .12/16/2013. */
                    open curapvapp  
                    fetch next from curapvapp   
                    into @lcinvno, @lctype, @ldpaid, @lnchkamt, @lndiscamt, @lnadjamt, @lnfchkamt, @lnfdiscamt,   
                      @lnfadjamt, @lnxchgrate, @lntaxwhamt, @lnftaxwhamt, @lncbkamt, @lnfcbkamt  
                    while @@fetch_status = 0     
                        begin  
                            select @lcapacc =  
                              case  
                                -- include additional cost to grn  
                                --when @lctype in (' ', 'C', 'A', 'R') then coalesce((select cglacc from apdist  
                                when @lctype in (' ', 'C', 'A', 'R', 'E') then coalesce((select cglacc from apdist   /* .MS803 .10014588 .07/13/2012. */  
                                  where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno and ctype like 'P%'),  
                                  (select cglacc from apdisth where cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno   
                                  and ctype like 'P%'), (select capacc from apvend where cvendno = @lcvendno),   
                                  (select capacc from apsyst))  
                                when @lctype = 'D' then coalesce((select cppacc from apvend, apinvc  
                                  where apvend.cvendno = apinvc.cvendno and apinvc.cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno),  
                                  (select cppacc from apsyst))  
                                when @lctype = 'B' then coalesce((select capacc from apvend, apinvc  
                                  where apvend.cvendno= apinvc.cvendno and apinvc.cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno),  
                                  (select capacc from apsyst))  
                              end  
                            execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output  
  
                            insert into apvapp (cuid, cchkuid, cbankno, cchkno, cvendno, cinvno, cinvtype,   
                              capacc, ctogl, dpaid, dvoid, nchkamt, ndiscamt, nadjamt, nfchkamt, nfdiscamt,
                              nfadjamt, ninvcxrate, ntaxwhamt, nftaxwhamt, ncbkamt, nfcbkamt)  
                            values (@lcuid, @lcchkuid, @lcbankno, @lcchkno, @lcvendno, @lcinvno, @lctype,   
                              @lcapacc, 'V', @ldpaid, @ldvoid, @lnchkamt, @lndiscamt, @lnadjamt, @lnfchkamt, @lnfdiscamt,   
                              @lnfadjamt, @lnxchgrate, @lntaxwhamt, @lnftaxwhamt, @lncbkamt, @lnfcbkamt)  
                
       /* .MS802 .10012784 .07/14/2011 .begin. */  
       -- update the Cash UID to match voided app record  
       if (select lmultiap from apsyst) = 1  
        begin   
         update apdstc set ccashuid = @lcuid  
         where ccashuid = (select cuid from apcapp   
          where cbankno = @lcbankno and cchkno = @lcchkno
           and cbnkroute = ''   /* .MS901 .10015381 .12/16/2013. */
           and cvendno = @lcvendno and cinvno = @lcinvno)  
        end  
       /* .MS802 .10012784 .07/14/2011 .end. */  
         
       insert into apvacb(cuid, cchkuid, cvendno, cinvno, cbankno, cchkno,  
        ctaxcode, dtrs, ntaxver, nadjcbamt, ndisccbamt, ncbkamt, nfcbkamt)  
       select cuid, @lcchkuid, cvendno, cinvno, cbankno, cchkno,  
        ctaxcode, dtrs, ntaxver, nadjcbamt, ndisccbamt, ncbkamt, nfcbkamt  
         from apcacb  
                              where apcacb.cbankno = @lcbankno and apcacb.cchkno = @lcchkno  
                                and apcacb.cvendno = @lcvendno and apcacb.cinvno = @lcinvno  
  
                            fetch next from curapvapp   
                            into @lcinvno, @lctype, @ldpaid, @lnchkamt, @lndiscamt, @lnadjamt, @lnfchkamt, @lnfdiscamt,   
                              @lnfadjamt, @lnxchgrate, @lntaxwhamt, @lnftaxwhamt, @lncbkamt, @lnfcbkamt  
                        end  
                    delete from apcacb where cbankno = @lcbankno and cchkno = @lcchkno and cvendno = @lcvendno     
                    -- delete from apcapp where cbankno = @lcbankno and cchkno = @lcchkno and cvendno = @lcvendno  
                    delete from apcapp where cbankno = @lcbankno and cchkno = @lcchkno and cvendno = @lcvendno and cbnkroute = ''   /* .MS901 .10015381 .12/16/2013. */
                    delete from apchck where cbankno = @lcbankno and cchkno = @lcchkno  
                                                              
                    close curapvapp  
                    deallocate curapvapp  
                end  
  
            fetch next from curapvchk into @lcchkuid, @lcbankno, @lcchkno, @lcvendno, @lcpayto, @ldvoid     
      end  
    close curapvchk  
    deallocate curapvchk  
end

/** ID: AP90011.01 Name: apvend_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger apvend_delete on apvend
for delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return

    declare @lcvendno char(20)
    select @lcvendno = cvendno from deleted

    -- record is archived (moved to history)
    if exists (select cvendno from apvendh where cvendno = @lcvendno)
        return

    delete from apcont where cvendno = @lcvendno
    delete from ap1099 where cvendno = @lcvendno
    delete from apvadr where cvendno = @lcvendno
    delete from apvgla where cvendno = @lcvendno   
    delete from apvglr where cvendno = @lcvendno
    delete from apvnot where cvendno = @lcvendno
    delete from apvcnt where cvendno = @lcvendno
    delete from apvact where cvendno = @lcvendno
    delete from apvark where cvendno = @lcvendno
end

/** ID: AP90012.01 Name: apvend_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger apvend_update on apvend
for update
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return
    if update(npoboamt)
        update apvend set npoboamt = 0 from apvend, inserted
          where apvend.cvendno = inserted.cvendno and
          inserted.npoboamt < 0
end

/** ID: AR70045.01 Name: arcadr_upd Owner: ZA ScriptDate: 04/15/2013 **/
create trigger arcadr_upd on arcadr
for update
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    set xact_abort on

	if (update(cCompany) and (select cCompany from inserted) <> (select cCompany from deleted))		
		or (update(caddr1) and (select caddr1 from inserted) <> (select caddr1 from deleted))		
		or (update(caddr2) and (select caddr2 from inserted) <> (select caddr2 from deleted))
		or (update(ccity) and (select ccity from inserted) <> (select ccity from deleted))		
		or (update(cstate) and (select cstate from inserted) <> (select cstate from deleted))		
		or (update(czip) and (select czip from inserted) <> (select czip from deleted))		
		or (update(cCountry) and (select cCountry from inserted) <> (select cCountry from deleted))		
		or (update(cPhone) and (select cPhone from inserted) <> (select cPhone from deleted))		
		or (update(cContact) and (select cContact from inserted) <> (select cContact from deleted))
			update arcust set lUpdatePortal = 1 where ccustno = (select ccustno from inserted)	
end

CREATE trigger [dbo].[customeradr] on [dbo].[arcadr]
for update
as
begin


	declare @ccustno varchar(101),@caddrno varchar(01),@caddr1 varchar(40),@caddr2 varchar(40),
			@ccity varchar(30), @cstate varchar (15), @czip char(10), @ccountry char(25)
					
	declare @dccustno varchar(10),@dcaddrno varchar(01),@dcaddr1 varchar(40),@dcaddr2 varchar(40),
			@dccity varchar(30), @dcstate varchar (15), @dczip char(10), @dccountry char(25)

   
	declare CurCustAddr scroll cursor for
	select ccustno,caddrno,caddr1,caddr2,ccity,cstate,czip,ccountry
	   from Inserted 
	Open CurCustAddr 
	fetch next from CurCustAddr into 
			@ccustno,@caddrno,@caddr1,@caddr2,@ccity,@cstate,@czip,@ccountry
	while @@fetch_status = 0
	begin	
		select @dccustno=ccustno,@dcaddrno=caddrno,@dcaddr1=caddr1,@dcaddr2=caddr2,@dccity=ccity,@dcstate=cstate,@dczip=czip,@dccountry=ccountry
	   from deleted where ccustno = @ccustno and caddrno = @caddrno

	   if update(ccountry) and ltrim(rtrim(@ccountry)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dccountry))
		begin
			insert into changes(ccustno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,Account,cUser,nbalance) 
				values (@ccustno,'ccountry',isnull(@ccountry,''),isnull(@dccountry,''),getdate(),'arcadr','',0)
		end

	   if update(czip) and ltrim(rtrim(@czip)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dczip))
		begin
			insert into changes(ccustno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,Account,cUser,nbalance) 
				values (@ccustno,'czip',isnull(@czip,''),isnull(@dczip,''),getdate(),'arcadr','',0)
		end

	   if update(cstate) and ltrim(rtrim(@cstate)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dcstate))
		begin
			insert into changes(ccustno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,Account,cUser,nbalance) 
				values (@ccustno,'cstate',isnull(@cstate,''),isnull(@dcstate,''),getdate(),'arcadr','',0)
		end

	   if update(ccity) and ltrim(rtrim(@ccity)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dccity))
		begin
			insert into changes(ccustno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,Account,cUser,nbalance) 
				values (@ccustno,'ccity',isnull(@ccity,''),isnull(@dccity,''),getdate(),'arcadr','',0)
		end

	   if update(caddr2) and ltrim(rtrim(@caddr2)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dcaddr2))
		begin
			insert into changes(ccustno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,Account,cUser,nbalance) 
				values (@ccustno,'caddr2',isnull(@caddr2,''),isnull(@dcaddr2,''),getdate(),'arcadr','',0)
		end

		if update(caddr1) and ltrim(rtrim(@caddr1)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dcaddr1))
		begin
			insert into changes(ccustno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,Account,cUser,nbalance) 
				values (@ccustno,'caddr1',isnull(@caddr1,''),isnull(@dcaddr1,''),getdate(),'arcadr','',0)
		end
		fetch next from CurCustAddr into 
			@ccustno,@caddrno,@caddr1,@caddr2,@ccity,@cstate,@czip,@ccountry
		
    END	
	Close CurCustAddr
end

CREATE trigger [dbo].[arcapp_ins_upd] on [dbo].[arcapp]   
for insert, update, delete    
as    
begin    
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */    
       return        
    set xact_abort on

   select ccustno, replicate(' ',20) as cusername into arcapp_T

/** ID: AR90001.01 Name: arcapp_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger arcapp_insert on arcapp
for insert
as
begin
    if exists (select 1 from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return
	declare @lctaxtype char(1), @llclaimback smallint   
    /* for optimization, trigger must not fire if tax type is not line-item based */
    execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'ctaxtype', @cretvalue = @lctaxtype output
    if @lctaxtype <> 'L'
        return
    /* for optimization, trigger must not fire if claimbacks are not allowed on all types of adjustments */
	select @llclaimback = lclaimback from arsyst  
	if @llclaimback = 0   
        return
    set xact_abort on
    declare @lcuid char(15), @lcappuid char(15), @lccustno char(10), @lcinvno char(10),
      @lcfrtaxcode char(10), @lctaxcode char(10), @lclineitem char(10),
      @lnfdiscamt numeric(18,4), @lnfadjamt numeric(18,4), @lnfdebtamt numeric(18,4),
      @lnffrtaxamt numeric(18,4), @lnftaxamt numeric(18,4), @lnxchgrate numeric(16,6),
      @lntotadjamt numeric(18,4), @lninvtotal numeric(18,4), @lnnonpayment numeric(16,6),
      @lnfcbkamt numeric(18,4), @lncbkamt numeric (18,4), @lnftotcbkamt numeric(18,4),
      @lntotcbkamt numeric(18,4), @lnftotadj numeric (18,4), @lndisccbamt numeric(18,4),
      @lnadjcbamt numeric(18,4), @lndebtcbamt numeric(18,4), @lcinvcuid char(15)
    declare curarcapp_ins scroll cursor for
    select cuid, cinvcuid, ccustno, cinvno, nfdiscamt, nfadjamt, nfdebtamt from inserted
    where (nfdiscamt + nfadjamt + nfdebtamt <> 0)
    open curarcapp_ins
    fetch next from curarcapp_ins
    into @lcappuid, @lcinvcuid, @lccustno, @lcinvno, @lnfdiscamt, @lnfadjamt, @lnfdebtamt
    while @@fetch_status = 0
        begin
			select @lntotadjamt = @lnfdiscamt + @lnfadjamt + @lnfdebtamt 
            select @lcfrtaxcode = cfrtaxcode, @lnffrtaxamt = nffrttax1 + nffrttax2 + nffrttax3,   /* freight tax code and amount */
                @lninvtotal = (nfsalesamt - nfdiscamt + nffrtamt + nftaxamt1 + nftaxamt2 + nftaxamt3 + nfadjamt)   /* invoice total */
              from arinvc
              where cinvno = @lcinvno
                and ccustno = @lccustno

            select @lnnonpayment = round(@lntotadjamt / @lninvtotal, 6)   /* total adjustment percentage vs. invoice total */

            /* distribute claimback to invoice line items */
            declare curaritrs scroll cursor for
            select clineitem, ctaxcode, nftaxamt1 + nftaxamt2 + nftaxamt3
              from aritrs
              where cinvno = @lcinvno and (nftaxamt1 + nftaxamt2 + nftaxamt3) > 0

            select @lnftotcbkamt = 0, @lntotcbkamt = 0
            select @lnxchgrate = (select nxchgrate from arinvc where cuid = @lcinvcuid)
            open curaritrs
            fetch next from curaritrs
              into @lclineitem, @lctaxcode, @lnftaxamt
            while @@fetch_status = 0
                begin
                    select @lnfcbkamt = @lnftaxamt * @lnnonpayment
                    select @lnftotadj = @lnfdiscamt + @lnfadjamt + @lnfdebtamt
                    execute vsp_am_basecurr @nforeignamt = @lnfcbkamt, @nxchgrate = @lnxchgrate, @nretamt = @lncbkamt output
                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output

                    select @lndisccbamt = 0, @lnadjcbamt = 0, @lndebtcbamt = 0
                    /* tax claimback on discount; claimback on discount must be allowed */
					if @lnfdiscamt <> 0.00 
                        select @lndisccbamt  = @lncbkamt * (@lnfdiscamt/@lnftotadj)
                    /* tax claimback on adjustment; claimback on adjustment must be allowed */
                    if @lnfadjamt <> 0.00 
						if @lnfdebtamt <> 0.00 
	                        select @lnadjcbamt  = @lncbkamt * (@lnfadjamt/@lnftotadj)
						else
							select @lnadjcbamt  = @lncbkamt - @lndisccbamt
                    /* tax claimback on writeoff; claimback on writeoff must be allowed */
                    if @lnfdebtamt <> 0.00 
                        select @lndebtcbamt  = @lncbkamt - (@lndisccbamt + @lnadjcbamt)
                    insert into arcacb (cuid, cinvno, ccustno, cappuid, clineitem, ctaxcode,
                      nadjcbamt, ndisccbamt, ndebtcbamt, nfcbkamt, ncbkamt)
                    values (@lcuid, @lcinvno, @lccustno, @lcappuid, @lclineitem, @lctaxcode,
                      @lnadjcbamt, @lndisccbamt, @lndebtcbamt, @lnfcbkamt, @lncbkamt)

                    select @lnftotcbkamt = @lnftotcbkamt + @lnfcbkamt,
                           @lntotcbkamt  = @lntotcbkamt + @lncbkamt

                    fetch next from curaritrs
                    into @lclineitem, @lctaxcode, @lnftaxamt
                end
            close curaritrs
            deallocate curaritrs

            if @lnffrtaxamt <> 0
                begin
                    /* get claimback for freight tax amt*/
                    select @lnfcbkamt = @lnffrtaxamt * @lnnonpayment
                    execute vsp_am_basecurr @nforeignamt = @lnfcbkamt, @nxchgrate = @lnxchgrate, @nretamt = @lncbkamt output
                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output

                    select @lndisccbamt = 0, @lnadjcbamt = 0, @lndebtcbamt = 0

                    /* tax claimback on discount */
                    if @lnfdiscamt <> 0.00 
                        select @lndisccbamt  = @lncbkamt * (@lnfdiscamt/@lnftotadj)
                    /* tax claimback on adjustment */
                    if @lnfadjamt <> 0.00 
                        if @lnfdebtamt <> 0.00
                            select @lnadjcbamt  = @lncbkamt * (@lnfadjamt/@lnftotadj)
                        else
                            select @lnadjcbamt  = @lncbkamt - @lndisccbamt
                    /* tax claimback on writeoff */
                    if @lnfdebtamt <> 0.00 
                        select @lndebtcbamt  = @lncbkamt - (@lndisccbamt + @lnadjcbamt)
                    /* Freight is saved in to the header thus has no line item key*/
                    select @lclineitem = 'FREIGHT'
                    insert into arcacb (cuid, cinvno, ccustno, cappuid, clineitem, ctaxcode,
                      nadjcbamt, ndisccbamt, ndebtcbamt, nfcbkamt, ncbkamt)
                    values (@lcuid, @lcinvno, @lccustno, @lcappuid, @lclineitem, @lcfrtaxcode,
                      @lnadjcbamt, @lndisccbamt, @lndebtcbamt, @lnfcbkamt, @lncbkamt)

                    select @lnftotcbkamt = @lnftotcbkamt + @lnfcbkamt,
                           @lntotcbkamt  = @lntotcbkamt + @lncbkamt
                end

            /* update total claimback for the invoice in this payment */
            update arcapp
            set nfcbkamt = @lnftotcbkamt,
                ncbkamt  = @lntotcbkamt
            where cuid = @lcappuid

            fetch next from curarcapp_ins
            into @lcappuid, @lcinvcuid, @lccustno, @lcinvno, @lnfdiscamt, @lnfadjamt, @lnfdebtamt
        end
    close curarcapp_ins
    deallocate curarcapp_ins
end

/** ID: AR90070.01 Name: arcash_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/  
create trigger arcash_insert on arcash  
for insert  
as  
begin
	if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */  
	   return  

	declare @lccustno char(10), @ldpaid datetime,
			@lcrcptno char(10), @lnfpaidamt numeric(18,4),
			@lccurrcode char(3)

	select  @lccustno = ccustno, @ldpaid = dpaid, 
			@lcrcptno = crcptno, @lnfpaidamt = nfpaidamt,
			@lccurrcode = ccurrcode
	from inserted
	where nfpaidamt > 0 and lvoid = 0

	if (select isnull(dlrcpt,'') from arcust where ccustno = 
		@lccustno) <= @ldpaid
		update arcust 
		set dlrcpt       = @ldpaid, 
			clrcptno     = @lcrcptno, 
			nlrcptamt    = @lnfpaidamt,
			clrcptcurr	 = @lccurrcode
		where ccustno = @lccustno
end

/** ID: AR90003.01 Name: arcust_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/  
create trigger arcust_delete on arcust  
for delete  
as  
begin  
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */  
       return  
  
    set xact_abort on  
    declare @lccustno char(20)  
    select @lccustno = ccustno from deleted  
  
    -- record is archived (moved to history)  
    if exists (select ccustno from arcusth where ccustno = @lccustno)  
        return  
  
    delete from cmcudf where ccustno = @lccustno  
    delete from arcont where ccustno = @lccustno  
    delete from arcard where ccustno = @lccustno  
    delete from arcadr where ccustno = @lccustno  
    delete from arcnot where ccustno = @lccustno  
    delete from arccnt where ccustno = @lccustno  
    delete from arcact where ccustno = @lccustno  
    delete from arcark where ccustno = @lccustno
    /* .MS803 .10014691 .09/14/2012 .begin. */
    select cuid into #ticcprc from iccprc where ccustno = @lccustno     
    delete from iccprc where ccustno = @lccustno 
    delete from iccprh where cuid in(select cuid from #ticcprc)
    drop table #ticcprc
    /* .MS803 .10014691 .09/14/2012 .end. */  
      
end
