/** ID: AR90004.02 Name: arcust_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 05/07/2017 **/
CREATE trigger arcust_update on arcust
for update
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    set xact_abort on
    if update(nsoboamt)
        update arcust set nsoboamt = 0 from arcust, inserted
          where arcust.ccustno = inserted.ccustno and
          inserted.nsoboamt < 0
    if update(nuishpamt)
        update arcust set nuishpamt = 0 from arcust, inserted
          where arcust.ccustno = inserted.ccustno and
          inserted.nuishpamt < 0
	  declare @lcvamcompany char(65), 
      @lcsqlcmd char(255), @lcsqlcmd1 char(255), @lccustno char(20),@lccustnod char(20),  
      @lnopencr numeric(16, 2), @lnbalance numeric(16, 2),
      @lnsoboamt numeric(16, 2), @lncrlimit numeric(16, 2)
    select @lccustno = ccustno from inserted
	select @lccustnod  = csponsor FROM Deleted 
    if update(navgdays) and exists(select navgdays from inserted where navgdays = 0)
        update arcust set navgdays = 1 from arcust, inserted where arcust.ccustno = inserted.ccustno
	if update(cstatus) and (select cstatus from inserted) = 'I'  
		begin 
			if NOT EXISTS(select 1 from arcnot where ccustno = (select ccustno from inserted))  
				insert into arcnot values(@lccustno,@lccustnod)  
			else  
               update arcnot set mnotepad = @lccustnod where ccustno = @lccustno  
            update arcust set csponsor = @lccustnod where csponsor = @lccustno       
   end  
  if update(cstatus) and (select cstatus from inserted) = 'I'  
       update arcust

/** ID: AR90005.01 Name: arfchg_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger arfchg_insert on arfchg
for insert
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    set xact_abort on
    declare @lccustno char(10), @lcfcinvno char(10), @lccurrcode char(3), @ldfinance datetime,
      @lnchgbal numeric(18, 4), @lnfinamt numeric(18, 4), @lnfchgbal numeric(18, 4),
      @lnffinamt numeric(18, 4), @lnxchgrate numeric(16, 6) , @lnminbal numeric(18, 4),
      @lcinvno char(10), @lcuid char(15), @lnfcperiod integer, @lcfullname varchar(30), 
      @lcinvcuid char(15), @lcfcuid char(15), @lcfchguid char(15)   
    declare curarfchg scroll cursor for select cuid, cfchguid, ccustno, cinvno, cinvcuid, ccurrcode, dfinance, nchgbal,
        nfinamt, nfchgbal, nffinamt, nxchgrate from inserted
    select @lnfcperiod = (select nfcperiod from arsyst)
    if (select cfccalcon from arsyst) = "I"
        select @lnminbal = (select nfcminbal from arsyst)
    else
        select @lnminbal = 0
    open curarfchg
    fetch next from curarfchg into @lcfcuid, @lcfchguid, @lccustno, @lcfcinvno, @lcinvcuid, @lccurrcode, @ldfinance, @lnchgbal,
      @lnfinamt, @lnfchgbal, @lnffinamt, @lnxchgrate
    -- calculate finance charge on Statement Balance
    /* insert FCHG invoice only if not finance charge adjustment */
    if (select cfccalcon from arsyst) = "S" and @lcfcuid = @lcfchguid
        begin
            while @@fetch_status = 0
                begin
                    if (select lfcchgonfc from arsyst) = 1
                        declare curfcarinvc scroll cursor for
                        select cuid from arinvc
                        where ccustno = @lccustno and dcharge <= @ldfinance and lfinchg = 1
                          and (arinvc.nbalance > @lnminbal or arinvc.nbalance < 0)
                    else
                        begin
                            if (select lfcpaychg from arsyst) = 1
                                declare curfcarinvc scroll cursor for
                                select cuid from arinvc
                                where ccustno = @lccustno and dcharge <= @ldfinance and lfinchg = 1
                                  and (arinvc.nbalance > @lnminbal or arinvc.nbalance < 0 and cinvno <> "FCHG" )
                            else
                                declare curfcarinvc scroll cursor for
                                select cuid from arinvc
                                where ccustno = @lccustno and dcharge <= @ldfinance and lfinchg = 1
                                  and (arinvc.nbalance - arinvc.nfinamt > @lnminbal or arinvc.nbalance < 0
                                  and cinvno <> "FCHG")
                        end
                    open curfcarinvc
                    fetch next from curfcarinvc into @lcuid
                    while @@fetch_status = 0
                        begin
                            update arinvc
                            set dcharge = dateadd(dd, @lnfcperiod, dcharge),
                              dfinance = @ldfinance
                            where cuid = @lcuid
                            fetch next from curfcarinvc into @lcuid
                        end
                    close curfcarinvc
                    deallocate curfcarinvc
                    execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'cfullname',
                      @cretvalue = @lcfullname output
                    insert into arinvc(cuid, ccustno, cinvno, ctype, cwarehouse, cslpnno,
                      cbcompany, cbaddr1, cbaddr2, cbcity, cbstate, cbzip, cbcountry, cbphone,
                      ccurrcode, caracc, centerby, dorder, dcreate, dinvoice, ddiscount, ddue,
                      dcharge, lapplytax, lfinchg, nfinamt, nbalance, nffinamt, nfbalance, nxchgrate)
                    select @lcinvcuid, @lccustno, "FCHG", "F", arcust.cwarehouse,
                      arcust.cslpnno, arcust.ccompany,
                      arcust.caddr1, arcust.caddr2, arcust.ccity, arcust.cstate,
                      arcust.czip, arcust.ccountry, arcust.cphone1, @lccurrcode,
                      arcust.caracc, @lcfullname, @ldfinance, @ldfinance, @ldfinance, @ldfinance, @ldfinance,
                      dateadd(dd, @lnfcperiod, @ldfinance), arcust.lapplytax, 1, @lnfinamt, @lnfinamt,
                      @lnffinamt, @lnffinamt, @lnxchgrate from arcust
                      where ccustno = @lccustno and lfinchg = 1
                    fetch next from curarfchg into @lcfcuid, @lcfchguid, @lccustno, @lcfcinvno, @lcinvcuid, 
                      @lccurrcode, @ldfinance, @lnchgbal, @lnfinamt, @lnfchgbal, @lnffinamt, @lnxchgrate
                end
                close curarfchg
                deallocate curarfchg
                return
        end
        while @@fetch_status  = 0
            begin
                if @lcfcuid = @lcfchguid
                    /* update dcharge and dfinance only for apply finance charge */
                    update arinvc set dcharge = dateadd(dd, @lnfcperiod, dcharge),
                      dfinance = @ldfinance, nffinamt = nffinamt + @lnffinamt,
                      nfinamt = nfinamt + @lnfinamt where cuid = @lcinvcuid
                else
                    -- on finance charge adjustments, do not change the dcharge and dfinance fields
                    update arinvc set nffinamt = nffinamt + @lnffinamt,
                      nfinamt = nfinamt + @lnfinamt where cuid = @lcinvcuid
                fetch next from curarfchg into @lcfcuid, @lcfchguid, @lccustno, @lcfcinvno, @lcinvcuid, 
                  @lccurrcode, @ldfinance, @lnchgbal, @lnfinamt, @lnfchgbal, @lnffinamt, @lnxchgrate
            end
        close curarfchg
        deallocate curarfchg
end

/** ID: AR90007.01 Name: arinvc_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/  
create trigger arinvc_insert on arinvc  
for insert  
as  
begin  
    declare @lcnewno char(10), @lncount smallint  
    declare @lcnewcustno char(10)  
    declare @ctogl char(1), @lvoid smallint  
    if @@rowcount =1  
      begin  
        select @lcnewno = cinvno, @ctogl = ctogl, @lvoid = lvoid from inserted  
        if ltrim(@lcnewno) <> '0' and @lcnewno <> 'FCHG'   /* exclude beginning balance and finance charge invoices */  
          begin  
            select @lncount = count(*) from arinvc where cinvno = @lcnewno  
           if @lncount > 1  
              begin  
                raiserror('UPDATE_FAIL', 16, 1)  
                return  
              end  
           else if @ctogl <> 'X'   /* Move history invoice back to current - case of void applied credit and void applied payment, inserted.ctogl = 'X' */  
             if exists(select cinvno from arinvch where cinvno = @lcnewno)  
              begin  
                raiserror('UPDATE_FAIL', 16, 1)  
                return  
              end  
            else if @lvoid = 0   /* Move from soaord to arinvc - case of void advanced billing, inserted.lvoid = 1 */  
              if exists(select cinvno from soaord where cinvno = @lcnewno)  
               begin  
                raiserror('UPDATE_FAIL', 16, 1)  
                return  
               end  
          end  
      end  
    else  
      begin  
        declare curinvno_inserted scroll cursor for select cinvno, ctogl, lvoid from inserted     
        open curinvno_inserted  
        fetch next from curinvno_inserted into @lcnewno, @ctogl, @lvoid  
        while @@fetch_status = 0  
        begin  
            if ltrim(@lcnewno) <> '0' and @lcnewno <> 'FCHG'   /* exclude beginning balance and finance charge invoices */  
                begin  
                    select @lncount = count(*) from arinvc where cinvno = @lcnewno  
                    if @lncount > 1  
                        begin  
                            raiserror('UPDATE_FAIL', 16, 1)  
                            close curinvno_inserted  
                            deallocate curinvno_inserted  
                            return  
                        end  
                    else if @ctogl <> 'X'   /* Move history invoice back to current - case of void applied credit and void applied payment, inserted.ctogl = 'X' */  
                        if exists(select cinvno from arinvch where cinvno = @lcnewno)  
                            begin  
                                raiserror('UPDATE_FAIL', 16, 1)  
                                close curinvno_inserted  
                                deallocate curinvno_inserted  
                                return  
                            end  
                    else if @lvoid = 0   /* Move from soaord to arinvc - case of void advanced billing, inserted.lvoid = 1 */  
                        if exists(select cinvno from soaord where cinvno = @lcnewno)  
                            begin  
                                raiserror('UPDATE_FAIL', 16, 1)  
                                close curinvno_inserted  
                                deallocate curinvno_inserted  
                                return  
                            end  
                end  
            fetch next from curinvno_inserted into @lcnewno, @ctogl, @lvoid  
        end  
        close curinvno_inserted  
        deallocate curinvno_inserted  
      end  
  
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */  
       return  
  
    declare @lcuid char(15), @lcrcptno varchar(10), @lcchkno varchar(50), @ldclosed datetime,  
      @lcpaycode char(10), @lccardno char(50), @lcinvchkno char(20), @lccustno char(10),  
      @lcbankno char(10), @lcpayref char(20), @lccurrcode char(3), @ldcreate datetime,  
      @ldinvoice datetime, @lnftotpaid numeric(18,4), @lctype char(1),  
      @lntotpaid numeric(18, 4),  @lnxchgrate numeric(16, 6), @lcinvno char(10),  
      @lcaracc char(30), @lnsalesamt numeric(18, 4), @lnfsalesamt numeric(18, 4),   
      @lndiscamt numeric(18, 4),@lcorderby char(35), @lnbalance numeric(18, 4), @lctemp varchar(20),  
      @lcexpdate char(5), @lccardname char(30), @lnfinamt numeric(18, 4),  
      @lcinvcuid char(15),@lcrmano char(10) ,@lcspaycode char(10),@lcscardno char(50),  
      @lcsbankno char(10), @lcspayref char(20) , @lcschkno varchar(20), @lnbpaidamt numeric(18, 4),   
      @llsavecard smallint  
      
    declare curarinvc_ins scroll cursor for select cuid, dclosed, cpaycode, ccardno, cchkno,  
      ccustno, cbankno, cpayref, ccurrcode, dcreate, dinvoice, nftotpaid, ntotpaid,  
      nxchgrate, cinvno, caracc, nsalesamt, nfsalesamt, ndiscamt, corderby, ctype, nbalance,  
      cexpdate, ccardname, nfinamt, crmano, lsavecard from inserted   
    open curarinvc_ins  
    fetch next from curarinvc_ins into @lcinvcuid, @ldclosed, @lcpaycode, @lccardno, @lcinvchkno,  
      @lccustno, @lcbankno, @lcpayref, @lccurrcode, @ldcreate, @ldinvoice, @lnftotpaid,  
      @lntotpaid, @lnxchgrate, @lcinvno, @lcaracc, @lnsalesamt, @lnfsalesamt, @lndiscamt, @lcorderby,   
      @lctype, @lnbalance, @lcexpdate, @lccardname, @lnfinamt, @lcrmano, @llsavecard    
    while @@fetch_status = 0  
    begin  
        if @lcrmano <> ''  
            begin  
                    select @lcspaycode = cspaycode,  
                  @lcscardno = cscardno,  
                  @lcschkno  = cschkno,  
                  @lcsbankno = csbankno,  
                  @lcspayref =  cspayref  
                from racord where crmano = @lcrmano  
            end  
  
        if @lctype  = "F"  
            begin  
                update arcust  
                set arcust.nbalance = arcust.nbalance + @lnfinamt  
                where ccustno = @lccustno  
  
                fetch next from curarinvc_ins into @lcinvcuid, @ldclosed, @lcpaycode, @lccardno,  
                  @lcinvchkno, @lccustno, @lcbankno, @lcpayref, @lccurrcode, @ldcreate,  
                  @ldinvoice, @lnftotpaid, @lntotpaid, @lnxchgrate, @lcinvno, @lcaracc,  
                  @lnsalesamt, @lnfsalesamt, @lndiscamt, @lcorderby, @lctype, @lnbalance, @lcexpdate,    
                  @lccardname, @lnfinamt, @lcrmano, @llsavecard 
                continue  
            end  
  
        if @lctype = "B"  
            begin  
                update arcust  
                set arcust.nbalance = arcust.nbalance + @lnsalesamt,  
                  arcust.natdsamt = arcust.natdsamt + @lnsalesamt,  
                  arcust.nytdsamt = arcust.nytdsamt + (case when @ldinvoice >= dytdstart and @ldinvoice < dateadd(year, 1, dytdstart) then @lnsalesamt else 0 end)  
                where ccustno = @lccustno  
  
                fetch next from curarinvc_ins into @lcinvcuid, @ldclosed, @lcpaycode, @lccardno,  
                  @lcinvchkno, @lccustno, @lcbankno, @lcpayref, @lccurrcode, @ldcreate,  
                  @ldinvoice, @lnftotpaid, @lntotpaid, @lnxchgrate, @lcinvno, @lcaracc,  
                  @lnsalesamt, @lnfsalesamt, @lndiscamt, @lcorderby, @lctype, @lnbalance, @lcexpdate,   
                  @lccardname, @lnfinamt, @lcrmano, @llsavecard  
                continue  
            end  
  
        declare @lcenterby char(30)  
        execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'cfullname', @cretvalue = @lcenterby output  
        
        if (@lcrmano = ''  and @ctogl <> 'X' and exists (select lautoapp from arpycd where arpycd.cpaycode = @lcpaycode  
          and arpycd.lautoapp = 1)) or  (@lcrmano <> '' and @ctogl <> 'X' and @lctype = '' and @lnbalance >= 0 and  
          exists(select lapplycr from rasyst where lapplycr = 1) and exists (select lautoapp from arpycd  
              where arpycd.cpaycode = @lcspaycode and arpycd.lautoapp = 1))  
            begin  
                execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output, @bfromfront = 0  
                execute vsp_am_getnewdocno @csystfield = "crcptno", @cautodocno = "",  
                  @calias = "arcash/arcashh/", @ckeyfield = "crcptno", @ckeyvalue = '',  
                  @nkeylength = 10, @csystalias = "arsyst", @cdocno = @lcrcptno output  
  
                if @lcrmano = ''  
                    begin  
                        if (select arpycd.npaytype from arpycd where arpycd.cpaycode = @lcpaycode) = 3  
                            select @lcchkno = @lccardno  
                        else  
                            select @lcchkno = @lcinvchkno  
          
                                if (select cobank.ccurrcode from cobank where cobank.cbankno = @lcbankno)=  
                                   (select arcust.ccurrcode from arcust where arcust.ccustno = @lccustno)  
                                        select @lnbpaidamt = @lnftotpaid  
                                else  
                                        select @lnbpaidamt = @lntotpaid  
  
                        insert into arcash (cuid, ccustno, crcptno, cpaycode, cbankno, cchkno, cpayref,  
                          ccurrcode, dcreate, dpaid, dlastapp, npaytype, nfpaidamt,     
                          nfappamt, npaidamt, nappamt, nxchgrate, nbpaidamt,  
                          centerby)   
                        select @lcuid, @lccustno, @lcrcptno, @lcpaycode,  
                          @lcbankno, @lcchkno, @lcpayref, @lccurrcode,  
                          @ldcreate, @ldinvoice, @ldinvoice, arpycd.npaytype, @lnftotpaid,     
                          @lnftotpaid, @lntotpaid, @lntotpaid, @lnxchgrate,  @lnbpaidamt,  
                          @lcenterby 
                        from arpycd where arpycd.cpaycode = @lcpaycode  
                    end  
                else  
                    begin  
                        if (select arpycd.npaytype from arpycd where arpycd.cpaycode = @lcspaycode) = 3  
                            select @lcchkno = @lcscardno  
                        else  
                            select @lcchkno = @lcschkno  
  
                        insert into arcash (cuid, ccustno, crcptno, cpaycode, cbankno, cchkno, cpayref,  
                          ccurrcode, dcreate, dpaid, dlastapp, npaytype, nfpaidamt,   
                          nfappamt, npaidamt, nappamt, nxchgrate, nbpaidamt,  
                          centerby)     
                        select @lcuid, @lccustno, @lcrcptno, @lcspaycode,  
                          @lcsbankno, @lcchkno, @lcspayref, @lccurrcode,  
                          @ldcreate, @ldinvoice, @ldinvoice, arpycd.npaytype, @lnftotpaid,  
                          @lnftotpaid, @lntotpaid, @lntotpaid, @lnxchgrate,  @lnftotpaid,  
                          @lcenterby  
                        from arpycd where arpycd.cpaycode = @lcspaycode  
                    end  
  
                execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output, @bfromfront = 0  
                insert into arcapp (cuid, cappuid, ccustno, cpcustno, cinvno, crcptno,  
                  caracc, dpaid, nfpaidamt, npaidamt, cinvcuid)  
                values(@lcuid, @lcuid, @lccustno, @lccustno, @lcinvno, @lcrcptno,  
                  @lcaracc, @ldinvoice, @lnftotpaid, @lntotpaid, @lcinvcuid)  
                 end  
            else  
                begin  
                    /* to take care void payment and credit cases but seq should be  
                    insert into current from history, update current, delete history only*/  
                    if not exists(select cinvno from arinvch where cinvno = @lcinvno)  
                        begin  
                            if @lctype = "R"  
                                update arcust  
                                set arcust.nopencr = arcust.nopencr - @lnbalance  
                                where ccustno = @lccustno  
  
                            update arcust  
                            set arcust.nbalance = arcust.nbalance + @lnbalance  
                            where ccustno = @lccustno  
                        end  
                end  
  
            update arcust  
            set arcust.natdsamt = arcust.natdsamt + (@lnsalesamt-@lndiscamt),  
              arcust.corderby = @lcorderby,  
              arcust.nytdsamt = arcust.nytdsamt + (case when @ldinvoice >= dytdstart and @ldinvoice < dateadd(year, 1, dytdstart) then (@lnsalesamt-@lndiscamt) else 0 end)  
            where arcust.ccustno = @lccustno  
  
            if @lccardno <> '' and @lccardno is not null and @llsavecard = 1  
               begin  
                    if not exists(select arcard.ccardno from arcard where  
                      arcard.ccustno = @lccustno and arcard.cpaycode = @lcpaycode and  
                      arcard.ccardno = @lccardno)  
                        begin  
                            execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output, @bfromfront = 0  
                            insert into arcard(cuid, ccustno, cpaycode, ccardno)  
                            values( @lcuid, @lccustno, @lcpaycode, @lccardno)  
                        end  
  
                    update arcard  
                    set cexpdate = @lcexpdate, ccardname = @lccardname  
                    where ccardno = @lccardno and arcard.ccustno = @lccustno and arcard.cpaycode = @lcpaycode  
                   end  
            if @lctype <> 'R' and @lnbalance = 0 and @ldclosed is not null  
                execute vsp_ar_calcavgpaydays @ccustno = @lccustno  
  
            if @lctype = '' and (select isnull(dlsales,'') from arcust where ccustno =     
            @lccustno) <= @ldinvoice  
            update arcust   
            set dlsales  = @ldinvoice,   
             clinvno  = @lcinvno,   
             nlsalesamt = @lnfsalesamt,  
             clinvcurr = @lccurrcode  
            where ccustno = @lccustno  
           
  
            fetch next from curarinvc_ins into @lcinvcuid, @ldclosed, @lcpaycode, @lccardno, @lcinvchkno,  
              @lccustno, @lcbankno, @lcpayref, @lccurrcode, @ldcreate, @ldinvoice, @lnftotpaid,  
              @lntotpaid, @lnxchgrate, @lcinvno, @lcaracc, @lnsalesamt, @lnfsalesamt, @lndiscamt, @lcorderby,
              @lctype, @lnbalance, @lcexpdate, @lccardname, @lnfinamt, @lcrmano, @llsavecard  
    end  
    close curarinvc_ins  
    deallocate curarinvc_ins  
end

/** ID: AR90008.01 Name: arinvc_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger arinvc_update on arinvc
for update
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    declare @lcuid char(15), @lnsalesamt numeric(18, 4), @lndiscamt numeric(18, 4),
      @lnbalance numeric(18, 4), @lctype char(1), @lnvoid smallint, @lcinvcuid char(15),
      @lcpaycode char(10), @lccardno char(50), @lcexpdate char(5), @lccardname char(30),
      @lccustno char(10), @lnatdsamt numeric(18, 4), @lcinvno char(10), @lnpaytype integer, 
      @ldclosed datetime, @llsavecard smallint,
	  @ldsystem datetime  

    declare curarinvc_upd scroll cursor for select nsalesamt, ndiscamt, nbalance, ctype, 
      lvoid, cuid, ccardno, cpaycode, cexpdate, ccardname, ccustno, cinvno, dclosed, lsavecard    
      from inserted
    open curarinvc_upd
    fetch next from curarinvc_upd into @lnsalesamt, @lndiscamt, @lnbalance, @lctype, @lnvoid,
      @lcinvcuid, @lccardno, @lcpaycode, @lcexpdate, @lccardname, @lccustno, @lcinvno,
      @ldclosed, @llsavecard     
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
    begin
        if @lnvoid = 1
            begin
                update arinvc
                set nfsalesamt = 0, nfdiscamt = 0, nftaxable1 = 0, nftaxable2 = 0,
                  nffrtamt = 0, nftaxamt1 = 0, nftaxamt2 = 0, nftaxamt3 = 0, nfadjamt = 0,
                  nffinamt = 0, nfbalance = 0, ntaxable1 = 0, ntaxable2 = 0, nsalesamt = 0,
                  ndiscamt =0, nfrtamt = 0, nfinamt = 0, ntaxamt1 = 0, ntaxamt2 = 0, ntaxamt3 = 0,
                          nadjamt = 0, nbalance = 0
                where cuid = @lcinvcuid
            end

        if exists(select * from tempdb..sysobjects where id = object_id(N'tempdb..#am_settings'))
            execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'dsystem', @cretvalue = @ldsystem output   
        else
            -- select @ldsystem = getdate()
            select @ldsystem = convert(datetime, convert(char(10), getdate(), 101), 101)   /* .MS802 .10012951 .09/08/2010. */
        
        update arinvc
        set nfbalance = ((nfsalesamt -nfdiscamt) + nffrtamt + nffinamt + nftaxamt1 +
          nftaxamt2 + nftaxamt3 + nfadjamt) - ( nftotpaid + nftotdisc + nftotadj + nftotdebt),
          nbalance = ((nsalesamt -ndiscamt) + nfrtamt + nfinamt + ntaxamt1 +
          ntaxamt2 + ntaxamt3 + nadjamt) - ( ntotpaid + ntotdisc + ntotadj + ntotdebt + ntotmcvar),
          nmcround = 0
        where cuid = @lcinvcuid

        update arinvc
        set dclosed = 
          case
          -- convert getdate() to a date format only (remove time component)
            when dclosed is null then isnull(dlastpaid, @ldsystem)   
            else dclosed end,
            nmcround = nbalance, nbalance = 0 
        where cuid = @lcinvcuid and nfbalance = 0 

        update arinvc
        set dclosed = null
        where cuid = @lcinvcuid and nfbalance <> 0 and dclosed is not null
        update arcust
        set arcust.natdsamt = arcust.natdsamt - (select nsalesamt - ndiscamt from deleted
        where ccustno = arcust.ccustno and cuid = @lcinvcuid) +
          (select nsalesamt-ndiscamt from arinvc
          where ccustno = arcust.ccustno and cuid = @lcinvcuid ),
          arcust.nbalance = arcust.nbalance - (select nbalance from deleted where ccustno =
          arcust.ccustno and cuid = @lcinvcuid) +
          (select nbalance  from arinvc where ccustno = arcust.ccustno and cuid = @lcinvcuid),
          arcust.nytdsamt = arcust.nytdsamt - isnull((select nsalesamt - ndiscamt from deleted
          where ccustno = arcust.ccustno and cuid = @lcinvcuid and dinvoice >= arcust.dytdstart 
          and dinvoice < dateadd(year, 1, arcust.dytdstart)), 0) +
          isnull((select nsalesamt-ndiscamt from arinvc
          where ccustno = arcust.ccustno and cuid = @lcinvcuid and dinvoice >= arcust.dytdstart 
          and dinvoice < dateadd(year, 1, arcust.dytdstart)), 0)
          where arcust.ccustno = @lccustno

        if @lctype = 'R'
            update arcust
            set arcust.nopencr = arcust.nopencr + (select nbalance from deleted where
              ccustno = arcust.ccustno and cuid = @lcinvcuid) -
              (select nbalance from arinvc where ccustno = arcust.ccustno
              and cuid = @lcinvcuid)
            where arcust.ccustno = @lccustno

        select @lnpaytype = (select npaytype from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode)
        if @lnpaytype <> 2
            update arinvc set cchkno  = '' where cuid = @lcinvcuid

        if @lnpaytype <> 3
            update arinvc set ccardno  = '' where cuid = @lcinvcuid
		
        if @lnvoid = 0 and @lccardno <> '' and @llsavecard = 1  
            begin
                if not exists(select arcard.ccardno from arcard where
                  arcard.ccustno = @lccustno and arcard.cpaycode = @lcpaycode and
                  arcard.ccardno = @lccardno)
                    begin
                        execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output, @bfromfront = 0
                        insert into arcard(cuid, ccustno, cpaycode, ccardno) values( @lcuid, @lccustno, @lcpaycode, @lccardno)
                    end
                update arcard set cexpdate = @lcexpdate, ccardname = @lccardname 
                where ccardno = @lccardno and arcard.ccustno = @lccustno and arcard.cpaycode = @lcpaycode
            end
        -- Calculation shall be done per payment (apply/void) transaction
        fetch next from curarinvc_upd into  @lnsalesamt, @lndiscamt, @lnbalance, @lctype, @lnvoid,
          @lcinvcuid, @lccardno, @lcpaycode, @lcexpdate, @lccardname, @lccustno, @lcinvno,
          @ldclosed, @llsavecard     
    end
    close curarinvc_upd
    deallocate curarinvc_upd
end

create trigger [dbo].[dateupdate] on [dbo].[arinvc]
for insert
as

begin
  update arinvc
  set ddate = getdate()
  where cinvno = (select cinvno from inserted)

end

create trigger trig_it_arinvc on [dbo].[arinvc]
for insert, update, delete
as

begin
  if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1) return   /* exclusive mode */

  insert into  it_shlog
  select distinct ccustno from inserted  where inserted.ccustno not in (select ccustno from it_shlog where it_shlog.ccustno = inserted.ccustno)

  insert into  it_shlog
  select distinct ccustno from deleted   where deleted.ccustno  not in (select ccustno from it_shlog where it_shlog.ccustno = deleted.ccustno)

end

/** ID: SO20120.04 Name: aritrs_ins_upd Owner: ZA ScriptDate: 04/30/2012 **/  
create trigger aritrs_ins_upd on dbo.aritrs 
for update, delete  
as  
begin  
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */  
       return      


    set xact_abort on  
    if not exists (select 1 from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS where TABLE_NAME = 'aritrs_T')
			select cinvno, citemno, clineitem, cuid, cusername, nshipqty, ndiscrate, nprice, 
				nprcinctx, nfprice, nfprcinctx, cinvno as ctrantype, getdate() as dmodified into aritrs_T 
					from aritrs where 1=2			
    declare @cinvno varchar(10), @citemno varchar(20), @clineitem varchar(10), 
			@cuid varchar(15), @cusername varchar(20), @lccurUser varchar(20), 
			@nshipqty numeric(16,4), @ndiscrate numeric(6,2), @nprice numeric(16,4), 
			@nprcinctx numeric(16,4), @nfprice numeric(16,4), @nfprcinctx numeric(16,4)  
	execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'cfullname', @cretvalue = @lccurUser output		 

    if exists (select cinvno from inserted)   /* create or amend */  
        declare CurAritrs scroll cursor for select cinvno, citemno, clineitem, cuid, cusername,
			nshipqty, ndiscrate, nprice, nprcinctx, nfprice, nfprcinctx	
		  		from inserted 
    else   /* delete */  
	  declare CurAritrs scroll cursor for select cinvno, citemno, clineitem, cuid, cusername,
			nshipqty, ndiscrate, nprice, nprcinctx, nfprice, nfprcinctx		
	  			from deleted
    open CurAritrs  		
    fetch next from CurAritrs into @cinvno, @citemno, @clineitem, @cuid, @cusername,
			@nshipqty, @ndiscrate, @nprice, @nprcinctx, @nfprice, @nfprcinctx	
    while @@fetch_status = 0     
    begin 
		if exists(select cuid from aritrs_T where cuid = @cuid)
			update aritrs_T set cusername = @lccurUser, ctrantype = 'Amended', dmodified = convert(char(12), getdate(), 23)
			   where cinvno = @cinvno and citemno = @citemno	and cuid = @cuid	
		else
			begin
				if exists (select cinvno from inserted) 
					insert into aritrs_T values(@cinvno, @citemno, @clineitem, @cuid, @lccurUser,
						@nshipqty, @ndiscrate, @nprice, @nprcinctx, @nfprice, @nfprcinctx,'Amended',convert(char(12), getdate(), 23))
				else
					insert into aritrs_T values(@cinvno, @citemno, @clineitem, @cuid, @lccurUser,
						@nshipqty, @ndiscrate, @nprice, @nprcinctx, @nfprice, @nfprcinctx,'Deleted',convert(char(12), getdate(), 23))
			end	
        fetch next from CurAritrs into @cinvno, @citemno, @clineitem, @cuid, @cusername,
			@nshipqty, @ndiscrate, @nprice, @nprcinctx, @nfprice, @nfprcinctx 
    end  
    close CurAritrs  
    deallocate CurAritrs  
end

create trigger [dbo].[aritrs_qtyUD] on [dbo].[aritrs]
for update, delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    set xact_abort on
	
		declare @ixitmID INT,@nQtylimit numeric(16,4), 
		@nordqty numeric(16,4)
	
    declare curaritrsQTY scroll cursor for select ixitmID,nshipqty from deleted WHERE ixitmID <> 0
				
    open curaritrsQTY
    fetch next from curaritrsQTY into @ixitmID, @nordqty
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
    begin
	SELECT @nQtylimit = nshipqty from inserted where ixitmID =  @ixitmID
       UPDATE SOXITEMS SET nQtyPurchased = (nQtyPurchased-@nordqty) + @nQtylimit where id =  @ixitmID
	   fetch next from curaritrsQTY into @ixitmID, @nordqty
		end
    close curaritrsQTY
    deallocate curaritrsQTY
end

/** ID: AR90010.01 Name: arrcri_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger arrcri_delete on arrcri
for delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return

    declare @lcinvno char(10), @lccustno char(10)
    declare curarrcri_del scroll cursor for select cinvno, ccustno from deleted
    open curarrcri_del
    fetch next from curarrcri_del into @lcinvno, @lccustno
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
    begin
            delete from arrtrs where cinvno = @lcinvno and ccustno = @lccustno

            delete from arrtrk where cinvno = @lcinvno and ccustno = @lccustno
            delete from arrrmk where cinvno = @lcinvno and ccustno = @lccustno
            fetch next from curarrcri_del into @lcinvno, @lccustno
    end
    close curarrcri_del
    deallocate curarrcri_del
end

/** ID: AR90011.01 Name: arrcri_insert_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger arrcri_insert_update on arrcri
for insert, update
as
begin
    /* renamed trigger to include trigger for update... */
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return

    declare @lccustno char(10), @lcinvno char(10), @lcpaycode char(10), @lccardno char(50),  
      @lcexpdate char(5), @lccardname char(30), @lcuid char(15)
    declare curarrcri_insupd scroll cursor for
    select ccustno, cinvno, cpaycode, ccardno, cexpdate, ccardname from inserted
    where lsavecard = 1  
    open curarrcri_insupd
    fetch next from curarrcri_insupd into @lccustno, @lcinvno, @lcpaycode, @lccardno,
      @lcexpdate, @lccardname
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
    begin
        if not exists(select arcard.ccardno from arcard where
          arcard.ccustno = @lccustno and arcard.cpaycode = @lcpaycode and
          arcard.ccardno = @lccardno)
          and exists(select 1 from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode and npaytype = 3)
            begin
                execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output, @bfromfront = 0
                insert into arcard(cuid, ccustno, cpaycode, ccardno)
                values( @lcuid, @lccustno, @lcpaycode, @lccardno)
            end
        update arcard set cexpdate = @lcexpdate, ccardname = @lccardname 
        where ccardno = @lccardno and arcard.ccustno = @lccustno and arcard.cpaycode = @lcpaycode
        fetch next from curarrcri_insupd into @lccustno, @lcinvno, @lcpaycode,
          @lccardno, @lcexpdate, @lccardname
    end
    close curarrcri_insupd
    deallocate curarrcri_insupd
end

/** ID: AR90012.01 Name: arrfnd_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger arrfnd_insert on arrfnd
for insert
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return

    declare curarrfnd_ins scroll cursor for
    select cuid, ccustno, crfndno, drefund, nxchgrate, nrfndamt from inserted
    declare @lcrfnduid char(15), @lccustno char(10), @lcrfndno char(10), 
      @ldrefund datetime, @lnxchgrate numeric(16, 6), @lnrfndamt numeric(18, 4)
    select @lnxchgrate = 1
    open curarrfnd_ins
    fetch next from curarrfnd_ins into @lcrfnduid, @lccustno, @lcrfndno, @ldrefund, @lnxchgrate,
      @lnrfndamt
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
    begin
        declare @lccinvno char(10), @lcrcptno char(10), @lnfpaidamt numeric(18, 4),
          @lnpaidamt numeric(18, 4), @lcuid char(15), @lnmcvaramt numeric(18, 4),
          @lnxchgrateold numeric(16, 6),  @lnvoid smallint, @lcnewuid char(15),
          @llhistory smallint
        declare curarcapp_rfn scroll cursor for
        select cuid, ccinvno, crcptno, nfpaidamt, npaidamt, lvoid, 0 as lhistory
        from arcapp where crfndno = @lcrfndno
        union all
        select cuid, ccinvno, crcptno, nfpaidamt, npaidamt, lvoid, 1 as lhistory
        from arcapph where crfndno = @lcrfndno
        open curarcapp_rfn
        fetch next from curarcapp_rfn into @lcuid, @lccinvno ,
          @lcrcptno, @lnfpaidamt, @lnpaidamt, @lnvoid, @llhistory
        while @@fetch_status = 0
        begin
            select @lnxchgrateold = 1, @lnmcvaramt = 0.00
            if @lcrcptno = ''   /* Refund from Credit Invoice */
                begin
                    if @lnvoid = 0 and @llhistory = 0
                        begin
                            select @lnxchgrateold = (select nxchgrate from arinvc where
                              cinvno = @lccinvno)
                            execute vsp_am_basevariance @nforeignamt = @lnfpaidamt,
                              @nnewrate = @lnxchgrate, @noldrate = @lnxchgrateold,
                              @nretamt = @lnmcvaramt output

                            update arcapp 
                            set crfnduid = @lcrfnduid, 
                                nmcvaramt = @lnmcvaramt,
                                ltemp = 0 
                            where cuid = @lcuid
                            update arinvc
                              set dlastpaid = 
                                case 
                                    when dlastpaid > @ldrefund then dlastpaid
                                    else @ldrefund
                                end, 
                              nftotpaid = nftotpaid - @lnfpaidamt,
                              ntotpaid = ntotpaid - @lnpaidamt,
                              ntotmcvar = ntotmcvar - @lnmcvaramt
                            where cinvno = @lccinvno
                        end
                    else
                        begin
                            if @llhistory = 1   /* records has been transferred to the history files */
                                begin
                                    /* move back all records related to this refund to the current file */
                                    insert into arcapp
                                    select * from arcapph 
                                    where crfndno = @lcrfndno
                                    /* set voided flag of the original refund record */
                                    update arcapp set lvoid = 1 where crfndno = @lcrfndno
                                    /*  when a refund is voided, arcapp.caracc is not populated. this column is used in AR transfer to GL.  If an AR Transfer is done, GL will go out of balance. */
                                    /* delete records from the history file */
                                    delete from arcapph where crfndno = @lcrfndno
                                end

                    /* generate the reversing entry for the refund */
                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcnewuid output
                    insert into arcapp(cuid, ccustno, cpcustno, crfndno, crcptno, cinvno,  
                      ccinvno, caracc, cdiscacc, cadjacc, cdebtacc, cinvcuid, crfnduid, ctogl,
                      dpaid, lvoid, ltemp, npaidamt, ndiscamt, nadjamt, ndebtamt,
                      nfpaidamt, nfdiscamt, nfadjamt, nfdebtamt, nmcvaramt)
                    select @lcnewuid, ccustno, cpcustno, crfndno, crcptno, cinvno,   
                      ccinvno, caracc, cdiscacc, cadjacc, cdebtacc, cinvcuid, @lcrfnduid, '',
                      @ldrefund, 1, ltemp, 0-npaidamt, 0, 0, 0,
                      0-nfpaidamt, 0, 0, 0, 0-nmcvaramt
                    from arcapp where cuid = @lcuid

                    if exists(select cinvno from arinvch where cinvno = @lccinvno)
                        begin
                            execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcnewuid output
                            insert into arinvc (cuid, cinvno, crevision, ctype, ccustno,
                              cwarehouse, coriginvno, corderby, cslpnno, centerby, cbcompany,
                              cbaddr1, cbaddr2, cbcity, cbstate, cbzip, cbcountry,
                              cbphone, cbcontact, cscompany, csaddr1, csaddr2,
                              cscity, csstate, cszip, cscountry, csphone, cscontact,
                              cshipvia, cfob, cpono, crmano, cfrgtcode, ctaxcode,
                              cfrtaxcode, cpaycode, cbankno, cchkno,
                              ccardno, cexpdate, ccardname, cpayref, ccurrcode,
                              caracc, ctogl, ccommiss, csource, dcreate, dorder,
                              dinvoice, ddiscount, ddue, dlastpaid, dcharge, dfinance,
                              dclosed, lvoid, lfinchg, lusecusitm, lfrttax1, lfrttax2,
                              lprtinvc, lprtslip, lprtcod, lprtlbl, lmultiso,
                              ndiscday, ndueday, ntermdisc, ndiscrate, ntaxable1, ntaxable2, nsalesamt,
                              ndiscamt, nfrtamt, ntaxamt1, ntaxamt2, ntaxamt3,
                              nadjamt, nfinamt, ntotpaid, ntotdisc, ntotadj, ntotdebt,
                              ntotmcvar, nmcround, nbalance, nftaxable1, nftaxable2,
                              nfsalesamt, nfdiscamt, nffrtamt, nftaxamt1, nftaxamt2,
                              nftaxamt3, nfadjamt, nffinamt, nftotpaid, nftotdisc,
                              nftotadj, nftotdebt, nfbalance, nweight, nxchgrate,
                              ntaxver, nfrtaxver)
                            select @lcnewuid as cuid, cinvno, crevision, ctype, ccustno, cwarehouse,
                              coriginvno, corderby, cslpnno, centerby, cbcompany,
                              cbaddr1, cbaddr2, cbcity, cbstate, cbzip, cbcountry,
                              cbphone, cbcontact, cscompany, csaddr1, csaddr2,
                              cscity, csstate, cszip, cscountry, csphone, cscontact,
                              cshipvia, cfob, cpono, crmano, cfrgtcode, ctaxcode,
                              cfrtaxcode, cpaycode, cbankno, cchkno,
                              ccardno, cexpdate, ccardname, cpayref, ccurrcode,
                              caracc, ctogl, ccommiss, csource, dcreate, dorder,
                              dinvoice, ddiscount, ddue, dlastpaid, dcharge, dfinance,
                              dclosed, lvoid, lfinchg, lusecusitm, lfrttax1, lfrttax2,
                              lprtinvc, lprtslip, lprtcod, lprtlbl, lmultiso,
                              ndiscday, ndueday, ntermdisc, ndiscrate, ntaxable1, ntaxable2, nsalesamt,
                              ndiscamt, nfrtamt, ntaxamt1, ntaxamt2, ntaxamt3,
                              nadjamt, nfinamt, ntotpaid, ntotdisc, ntotadj, ntotdebt,
                              ntotmcvar, nmcround, nbalance, nftaxable1, nftaxable2,
                              nfsalesamt, nfdiscamt, nffrtamt, nftaxamt1, nftaxamt2,
                              nftaxamt3, nfadjamt, nffinamt, nftotpaid, nftotdisc,
                              nftotadj, nftotdebt, nfbalance, nweight, nxchgrate,
                              ntaxver, nfrtaxver
                            from arinvch where cinvno = @lccinvno

                            delete from arinvch where cinvno = @lccinvno
                            insert into aritrs (cuid, cinvno, ccustno, cwarehouse, csono, cshipno,
                              clineitem, crmano, crtncode, csolineitm, citemno, cspeccode1, cspeccode2,
                              cdescript, cmeasure, ccommiss, cstatus, crevncode, cbin, lkititem,
                              lstock, lmodikit, ltaxable1, ltaxable2, lowrmk, lptrmk, nqtydec, ndiscrate,
                              nsalesamt, ndiscamt, nfsalesamt, nfdiscamt, nordqty, nshipqty, nitmcnvqty,
                              ntrscnvqty, ncost, nprice, nfprice, nweight)
                            select cuid, cinvno, ccustno, cwarehouse, csono, cshipno,
                              clineitem, crmano, crtncode, csolineitm, citemno, cspeccode1, cspeccode2,
                              cdescript, cmeasure, ccommiss, cstatus, crevncode, cbin, lkititem,
                              lstock, lmodikit, ltaxable1, ltaxable2, lowrmk, lptrmk, nqtydec, ndiscrate,
                              nsalesamt, ndiscamt, nfsalesamt, nfdiscamt, nordqty, nshipqty, nitmcnvqty,
                              ntrscnvqty, ncost, nprice, nfprice, nweight
                            from aritrsh where cinvno = @lccinvno

                            delete from aritrsh where cinvno = @lccinvno                
                        end

                    select @lnxchgrateold = (select nxchgrate from arinvc where cinvno = @lccinvno)
                    execute vsp_am_basevariance @nforeignamt = @lnfpaidamt,
                      @nnewrate = @lnxchgrate, @noldrate = @lnxchgrateold,
                      @nretamt = @lnmcvaramt output

                    update arinvc
                    set dclosed = null,
                      nftotpaid = nftotpaid + @lnfpaidamt,
                      ntotpaid = ntotpaid + @lnpaidamt,
                      ntotmcvar = ntotmcvar + @lnmcvaramt
                    where cinvno = @lccinvno
                end
            end
        else   /* Refund from Cash Receipts */
            begin
                if @lnvoid = 0 and @llhistory = 0
                    begin
                        select @lnxchgrateold = (select nxchgrate from arcash where
                              crcptno = @lcrcptno)
                        execute vsp_am_basevariance @nforeignamt = @lnfpaidamt,
                          @nnewrate = @lnxchgrate, @noldrate = @lnxchgrateold, @nretamt = @lnmcvaramt output
                        update arcapp
                        set crfnduid = @lcrfnduid,
                            nmcvaramt = @lnmcvaramt,
                            ltemp = 0
                        where cuid = @lcuid
                        update arcash
                        set dlastapp = 
                          case 
                              when dlastapp > @ldrefund then dlastapp
                              else @ldrefund
                          end,
                          nfappamt = nfappamt + @lnfpaidamt,
                          nappamt = nappamt + @lnpaidamt,
                          ntotmcvar = ntotmcvar + @lnmcvaramt
                        where crcptno = @lcrcptno

                        update arcust
                        set nbalance = nbalance + @lnpaidamt ,
                          nopencr = nopencr - @lnpaidamt
                        where ccustno = @lccustno
                    end
                else
                    begin
                        if @llhistory = 1   /* records has been transferred to the history files */
                            begin
                                /* move back all records related to this receipt to the current file*/
                                insert into arcapp
                                select * from arcapph where crcptno = @lcrcptno

                                /* set voided flag for this refund record */
                                update arcapp set lvoid = 1 where cuid = @lcuid

                                /* delete records from the history file */
                                delete from arcapph where crcptno = @lcrcptno

                                /* move back the cash receipt record to the current file */
                                insert into arcash (cuid, ccustno, crcptno, cdepno, cpaycode, cbankno,
                                  cchkno, cpayref, ccurrcode, ctogl, ctoglmc, dcreate, dpaid, dlastapp,   
                                  lvoid, npaytype, npaidamt, nappamt, nfpaidamt,
                                  nfappamt, ntotmcvar, nmcround, nxchgrate, nbpaidamt)
                                select cuid, ccustno, crcptno, cdepno, cpaycode, cbankno,
                                  cchkno, cpayref, ccurrcode, ctogl, ctoglmc, dcreate, dpaid, dlastapp,   
                                  lvoid, npaytype, npaidamt, nappamt, nfpaidamt,
                                  nfappamt, ntotmcvar, nmcround, nxchgrate, nbpaidamt   
                                from arcashh where crcptno = @lcrcptno

                                /* delete the record from the history file */
                                delete from arcashh where crcptno = @lcrcptno
                            end

                        /* generate reversing entry for this refund */
                        execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcnewuid output
                        insert into arcapp(cuid, ccustno, cpcustno, crfndno, crcptno, cinvno,
                          ccinvno, caracc, cdiscacc, cadjacc, cdebtacc, cinvcuid, crfnduid, ctogl,
                          dpaid, lvoid, ltemp, npaidamt, ndiscamt, nadjamt, ndebtamt,
                          nfpaidamt, nfdiscamt, nfadjamt, nfdebtamt, nmcvaramt)
                        select @lcnewuid as cuid, ccustno, cpcustno, crfndno, crcptno, cinvno,
                          ccinvno, caracc, cdiscacc, cadjacc, cdebtacc, cinvcuid, @lcrfnduid, '',
                          @ldrefund, 1, ltemp, 0-npaidamt, 0, 0, 0,
                          0-nfpaidamt, 0, 0, 0, 0-nmcvaramt
                        from arcapp where cuid = @lcuid
                        
                        /* update cash receipt balance */
                        update arcash
                        set dlastapp = 
                          case 
                              when dlastapp > @ldrefund then dlastapp
                              else @ldrefund
                          end,
                          nfappamt = nfappamt - @lnfpaidamt,
                          nappamt = nappamt - @lnpaidamt,
                          ntotmcvar = ntotmcvar + @lnmcvaramt
                        where crcptno = @lcrcptno

                        update arcust
                        set nbalance = nbalance - @lnpaidamt ,
                          nopencr = nopencr + @lnpaidamt
                        where ccustno = @lccustno
                    end
            end
            fetch next from curarcapp_rfn into @lcuid, @lccinvno , @lcrcptno ,
              @lnfpaidamt, @lnpaidamt, @lnvoid, @llhistory
        end /*end of arcapp do while*/

        close curarcapp_rfn
        deallocate curarcapp_rfn

        fetch next from curarrfnd_ins into @lcrfnduid, @lccustno, @lcrfndno, @ldrefund,
          @lnxchgrate, @lnrfndamt
    end /*end of arrfnd do while*/
    close curarrfnd_ins
    deallocate curarrfnd_ins
end

/** ID: AR90013.01 Name: arslpn_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger arslpn_delete ON arslpn
for delete
as

       return

/* infotrac h.l. 15-oct-2004 update modified time stamp */
create trigger [arslpn_tr_it_inserttmodified] on [dbo].[arslpn]
for insert
as
begin
  if @@rowcount = 0          return
  if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1) return   /* exclusive mode */
  update arslpn
  set arslpn.it_tmodified = current_timestamp,arslpn.it_modified_yn = 'y'
  from inserted
  where arslpn.cslpnno = inserted.cslpnno
end

/* infotrac h.l. 15-oct-2004 update modified time stamp */
create trigger [arslpn_tr_it_updatetmodified] on [dbo].[arslpn]
for update
as
begin
  if @@rowcount = 0          return
  if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1) return   /* exclusive mode */
  if update(it_modified_yn)  return
  update arslpn
  set arslpn.it_tmodified = current_timestamp,arslpn.it_modified_yn = 'y'
  from inserted
  where arslpn.cslpnno = inserted.cslpnno
end

/* infotrac h.l. 15-oct-2004 update modified time stamp on arslpn (not arsnot) */
create trigger [arsnot_tr_it_updatetmodifiedforarslpn] on [dbo].[arsnot]
for insert, update, delete
as
begin
  if @@rowcount = 0 return
  if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1) return   /* exclusive mode */
  update arslpn
  set arslpn.it_tmodified = current_timestamp
  from inserted
  where arslpn.cslpnno = inserted.cslpnno

  update arslpn
  set arslpn.it_tmodified = current_timestamp
  from deleted
  where arslpn.cslpnno = deleted.cslpnno
end

/** ID: SO20122.01 Name: coacpd_ins_upd Owner: ZA ScriptDate: 02/23/2012 **/  
CREATE trigger [dbo].[coacpd_ins_upd] on [dbo].[coacpd]
for insert, update, delete  
as  
begin  

    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */  
       return  
    if not exists (select 1 from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS where TABLE_NAME = 'coacpd_T')
		select cyear, cpdno, cusername into coacpd_T 
			from coacpd where 1=2

	execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'cfullname', @cretvalue = @lccurUser output

        declare Curcoacpd scroll cursor for select cyear, cpdno, cusername,lclosegl,lcloseap,lclosear,lclosepr,lclosemi,lcloseic,lclosejc,lclosebr,lclosecl,lclosere,lclosera,lclosevt1,lclosevt2,lclosevt3
	
		  		from inserted

	  declare Curcoacpd scroll cursor for select cyear, cpdno, cusername,lclosegl,lcloseap,lclosear,lclosepr,lclosemi,lcloseic,lclosejc,lclosebr,lclosecl,lclosere,lclosera,lclosevt1,lclosevt2,lclosevt3
	  		from deleted

				cpdno = @cpdno and lclosegl =@lclosegl and lcloseap=@lcloseap and lclosear =@lclosear and lclosepr =@lclosepr and lclosemi =@lclosemi and lcloseic=@lcloseic and lclosejc =@lclosejc and lclosebr =@lclosebr and lclosecl =@lclosecl and lclosere =@lclosere and lclosera =@lclosera and lclosevt1=@lclosevt1 and lclosevt2=@lclosevt2 and lclosevt3=@lclosevt3)	
			update coacpd_T set cusername = @lccurUser where cyear = @cyear and 
				cpdno = @cpdno and lclosegl =@lclosegl and lcloseap=@lcloseap and lclosear =@lclosear and lclosepr =@lclosepr and lclosemi =@lclosemi and lcloseic=@lcloseic and lclosejc =@lclosejc and lclosebr =@lclosebr and lclosecl =@lclosecl and lclosere =@lclosere and lclosera =@lclosera and lclosevt1=@lclosevt1 and lclosevt2=@lclosevt2 and lclosevt3=@lclosevt3
		else
			insert into Coacpd_T values(@cyear,@cpdno,@lccurUser,@lclosegl,@lcloseap,@lclosear,@lclosepr,@lclosemi,@lcloseic,@lclosejc,@lclosebr,@lclosecl,@lclosere,@lclosera,@lclosevt1,@lclosevt2,@lclosevt3)					
        fetch next from Curcoacpd into  @cyear, @cpdno, @cusername,@lclosegl,@lcloseap,@lclosear,@lclosepr,@lclosemi,@lcloseic,@lclosejc,@lclosebr,@lclosecl,@lclosere,@lclosera,@lclosevt1,@lclosevt2,@lclosevt3	
    end  
    close Curcoacpd 
    deallocate Curcoacpd 
end

Create trigger [dbo].[perchange] on [dbo].[coacpd]
for update
as
begin
	declare @cyear varchar(101),@cpdno varchar(101),@cdescript varchar(101),@lclosegl varchar(101),@lcloseap varchar(101), @lclosear varchar(101),
	@lclosebr as varchar(101), @lcloseic varchar(101), @lclosemi varchar(101), @lclosera varchar(101)
			
	declare @dcyear varchar(101),@dcpdno varchar(101),@dcdescript varchar(101), @dlclosegl varchar(101), @dlcloseap varchar(101), @dlclosear varchar(101),
	@dlclosebr as varchar(101), @dlcloseic varchar(101), @dlclosemi varchar(101), @dlclosera varchar(101)
	
	declare CurUpdate scroll cursor for
	select cyear, cpdno, cdescript, lclosegl, lcloseap, lclosear, lclosebr, lcloseic, lclosemi, lclosera
	   from Inserted 
	Open CurUpdate 
	fetch next from CurUpdate into

create trigger [dbo].[icimlp_update] on [dbo].[cocurr]
for update
as
begin
update icimlp
set nprice =  dbo.icimlpupd.nprice * (select  nxchgrate from cocurr where ccurrcode = 'USD')
FROM         dbo.icimlp INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icimlpupd ON dbo.icimlp.citemno = dbo.icimlpupd.citemno
                      and icimlp.cpricecd = icimlpupd.cpricecd
where icimlp.cpricecd = 'USA DOLLAR'


update icimlp
set nprcinctx = nprice * 1.14
where cpricecd = 'USA DOLLAR'

update icimlp
set nprice = dbo.icimlpupd.nprice * (select  nxchgrate from cocurr where ccurrcode = 'EUR')
FROM         dbo.icimlp INNER JOIN
                      dbo.icimlpupd ON dbo.icimlp.citemno = dbo.icimlpupd.citemno
                      and icimlp.cpricecd = icimlpupd.cpricecd
where icimlp.cpricecd = 'EURO'

update icimlp
set nprcinctx = nprice * 1.14
where cpricecd = 'EURO'
end

/** ID: SO20121.01 Name: dpibdg_ins_upd Owner: ZA ScriptDate: 02/23/2012 **/    
CREATE trigger [dbo].[dpibdg_ins_upd] on [dbo].[dpibdg]  
for insert, update, delete    
as    
begin    
  
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */    
       return    
         
    set xact_abort on    
    if not exists (select 1 from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS where TABLE_NAME = 'dpibdg_T')  
   select cwarehouse, citemno, dEndDate, cusername, nunits, ndollars,   
    nunits as nunits1, ndollars as ndollars1, dEndDate as ddate, cusername as cstatus  
    into dpibdg_T   
    from dpibdg where 1=2   
 else  
  begin  
   if not exists (select 1 from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.columnS where TABLE_NAME = 'dpibdg_T' and column_NAME = 'ddate')  
   begin  
       alter table dpibdg_T add ddate datetime not null default ''  
       print 'Added column [ddate] in table dpibdg_T.'  
   end  
   if not exists (select 1 from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.columnS where TABLE_NAME = 'dpibdg_T' and column_NAME = 'nunits1')  
   begin  
       alter table dpibdg_T add nunits1 numeric(12,4) default 0  
       print 'Added column [nunits1] in table dpibdg_T.'  
   end  
   if not exists (select 1 from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.columnS where TABLE_NAME = 'dpibdg_T' and column_NAME = 'ndollars1')  
   begin  
       alter table dpibdg_T add ndollars1 numeric(12,2) default 0  
       print 'Added column [ndollars1] in table dpibdg_T.'  
   end  
   if not exists (select 1 from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.columnS where TABLE_NAME = 'dpibdg_T' and column_NAME = 'cstatus')  
   begin  
       alter table dpibdg_T add cstatus char(20) not null default ''  
       print 'Added column [cstatus] in table dpibdg_T.'  
   end  
  end  
      
    declare @cwarehouse varchar(10), @citemno varchar(20), @dEndDate datetime,   
   @cusername varchar(20), @lccurUser varchar(20),  @nunits numeric(12,4),   
   @ndollars numeric(12,2), @ldeleted smallint, @dunits numeric(12,4),   
   @ddollars numeric(12,2)  
  
 set @ldeleted = 0     
--if exists(select 1 from tempdb..sysobjects where type = 'U' and name like '%#am_settings%')
--	execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'cfullname', @cretvalue = @lccurUser output    
--else
	set @lccurUser = 'Manual UPD'
    if exists (select citemno from inserted)   /* create or amend */    
        declare CurDpibdg scroll cursor for select cwarehouse, citemno, dEndDate, cusername, nunits, ndollars   
     from inserted  
    else   /* delete */   
  begin   
   declare CurDpibdg scroll cursor for select cwarehouse, citemno, dEndDate, cusername, nunits, ndollars   
        from deleted  
   set @ldeleted = 1  
  end  
    open CurDpibdg      
    fetch next from CurDpibdg into  @cwarehouse, @citemno, @dEndDate, @cusername,  @nunits, @ndollars  
    while @@fetch_status = 0       
    begin    
  select @dunits = nunits, @ddollars = ndollars from deleted   
    where citemno = @citemno and cwarehouse = @cwarehouse and dEndDate = @dEndDate
  if exists(select citemno from Dpibdg_T where citemno = @citemno   
   and cwarehouse = @cwarehouse and dEndDate = @dEndDate and nunits = @nunits and ndollars = @ndollars)   
    update Dpibdg_T set cusername = @lccurUser, cstatus = "Updated",ddate = getdate(), updated = 1,  
     nunits1 = @dunits, ndollars1 = @ddollars  where cwarehouse = @cwarehouse and   
      citemno = @citemno and dEndDate = @dEndDate and nunits = @nunits and ndollars = @ndollars   
  else  
  begin  
   if @ldeleted = 1  
    insert into Dpibdg_T (cwarehouse,citemno,dEndDate,cusername,nunits,ndollars,updated,ddate,  
      nunits1,ndollars1,cstatus) values  
           (@cwarehouse,@citemno,@dEndDate,@lccurUser,@nunits,@ndollars,0,getdate(),  
      null,null,'Deleted')       
   else  
   begin  
    if (update(nunits) or update(ndollars))  
     begin  
       if ((@nunits <> @dunits) or (@ndollars <> @ddollars))   
       insert into Dpibdg_T (cwarehouse,citemno,dEndDate,cusername,nunits,ndollars,updated,ddate,  
      nunits1,ndollars1,cstatus) values  
              (@cwarehouse,@citemno,@dEndDate,@lccurUser,@nunits,@ndollars,1,getdate(),  
      @dunits,@ddollars,'Updated')  
     end  
    else  
     insert into Dpibdg_T (cwarehouse,citemno,dEndDate,cusername,nunits,ndollars,updated,ddate,  
      nunits1,ndollars1,cstatus) values  
            (@cwarehouse,@citemno,@dEndDate,@lccurUser,@nunits,@ndollars,0,getdate(),  
      null,null,'Inserted')       
   end  
  end        
   fetch next from CurDpibdg into  @cwarehouse, @citemno, @dEndDate, @cusername,  @nunits, @ndollars  
    end    
    close CurDpibdg    
    deallocate CurDpibdg    
end

CREATE trigger [dbo].[forecast] on [dbo].[dpibdg]
for update
as
begin
	declare @citemno varchar(101),@nunits varchar(101),@ndollars varchar(101),@denddate varchar(101),
	@cusername varchar(101)
			
	declare @dcitemno varchar(101),@dnunits varchar(101),@dndollars varchar(101), @ddenddate varchar(101),
	@dcusername varchar(101)
	
	declare CurUpdate scroll cursor for
	select citemno, nunits, ndollars, denddate,cusername
	   from Inserted 
	Open CurUpdate 
	fetch next from CurUpdate into 
			@citemno,@nunits,@ndollars,@denddate,@cusername
	while @@fetch_status = 0
	begin	
		select @dcitemno=citemno,@dnunits=nunits,@dndollars=ndollars, @ddenddate = denddate
	   from deleted where citemno = @citemno and denddate = @denddate and cusername = @dcusername
		
		if update(citemno) and ltrim(rtrim(@citemno)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dcitemno))
		begin
			insert into changedrp(citemno,denddate,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,Account)
			values (@citemno,@denddate,'citemno',isnull(@citemno,''),isnull(@dcitemno,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end	
			
		if update(nunits) and ltrim(rtrim(@nunits)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dnunits)) 
		begin
			insert into changedrp(citemno,denddate,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,Account)
				values (@citemno,@denddate,'nunits',isnull(@nunits,''),isnull(@dnunits,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end
		
		if update(ndollars) and ltrim(rtrim(@ndollars)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dndollars))
		begin
			insert into changedrp(citemno,denddate,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,Account)
				values (@citemno,@denddate,'ndollars',isnull(@ndollars,''),isnull(@dndollars,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end
		
		if update(denddate) and ltrim(rtrim(@denddate)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@ddenddate)) 
		begin
			insert into changedrp(citemno,denddate,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,Account)
				values (@citemno,@denddate,'denddate',isnull(@denddate,''),isnull(@ddenddate,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end
				
		fetch next from CurUpdate into 
			@citemno, @nunits, @ndollars, @denddate,@cusername
	end
	deallocate CurUpdate
end

/** ID: GL90012.01 Name: glsegv_insert_update_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger glsegv_insert_update_delete on glsegv
for insert, update, delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    
    if (select nfundseg from glsyst) = 0   /* not fund accounting */
       return

    set xact_abort on
    declare @lcfundseg char(1)
    select @lcfundseg = cast(nfundseg as char(1))
    from glsyst

    /* not a fund segment being inserted/deleted */
    if not exists(select csegno from inserted where csegno = @lcfundseg) 
        and not exists(select csegno from deleted where csegno = @lcfundseg)
       return

    declare @lcsegno char(1), @lcsegvalue char(30),
            @lcdescript char(35), @lcfdescript char(35)

    if exists (select csegno from inserted)
        begin
            select @lcsegno     = csegno,    @lcsegvalue  = csegvalue,
                   @lcdescript  = cdescript, @lcfdescript = cfdescript 
            from inserted
       
            if not exists (select csegvalue from glfseg where csegno = @lcsegno and csegvalue = @lcsegvalue)
                insert into glfseg
                select csegno, csegvalue, cdescript, cfdescript from inserted
                where csegno = @lcsegno and csegvalue = @lcsegvalue 
            else
                update glfseg
                set cdescript  = @lcdescript, cfdescript = @lcfdescript
                where csegno = @lcsegno and csegvalue = @lcsegvalue
        end   
    else
        begin
            select @lcsegno = csegno, @lcsegvalue = csegvalue from deleted
            delete from glfseg where csegno = @lcsegno and csegvalue = @lcsegvalue
        end
end

as

/** ID: IC90003.01 Name: icispc_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger icispc_delete on icispc
for delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    set xact_abort on
    if not exists (select count(cwarehouse) from iciwhs, deleted
      where iciwhs.citemno = deleted.citemno 
      group by cwarehouse
      having count(cwarehouse) > 1)
        begin
            update iciwhs 
            set cspeccode1 = '', cspeccode2 = '' 
            from iciwhs, deleted 
            where  iciwhs.citemno = deleted.citemno and
              iciwhs.cspeccode1 = deleted.cspeccode1 and iciwhs.cspeccode2 = deleted.cspeccode2

            update icibin 
            set cspeccode1 = '', cspeccode2 = '' 
            from icibin, deleted 
            where icibin.citemno = deleted.citemno and
              icibin.cspeccode1 = deleted.cspeccode1 and  icibin.cspeccode2 = deleted.cspeccode2
        end
    else
        begin
            delete from iciwhs from deleted 
            where iciwhs.citemno = deleted.citemno 
              and iciwhs.cspeccode1 = deleted.cspeccode1 and iciwhs.cspeccode2 = deleted.cspeccode2

            delete from icibin from deleted 
            where  icibin.citemno = deleted.citemno 
              and icibin.cspeccode1 = deleted.cspeccode1 and  icibin.cspeccode2 = deleted.cspeccode2
        end

    delete from iciprc from deleted 
    where iciprc.citemno = deleted.citemno 
      and iciprc.cspeccode1 = deleted.cspeccode1 and iciprc.cspeccode2 = deleted.cspeccode2

    delete from icimlp from deleted 
    where icimlp.citemno = deleted.citemno 
      and icimlp.cspeccode1 = deleted.cspeccode1 and icimlp.cspeccode2 = deleted.cspeccode2
end

/** ID: IC90004.01 Name: icispc_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger icispc_insert ON icispc
for insert
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return
    set xact_abort on

    declare @lcitemno char(20), @lcspeccode1 char(10), @lcspeccode2 char(10), @lcuid char(15), 
      --@lcwarehouse char(10),  @lcinvtacc char(30), @lcintracc char(30), @lcrevncode char(10), 
      @lcwarehouse char(10),  @lcinvtacc char(30), @lcintracc char(30), @lcrevncode char(10), @lcintrmacc char(30),   /* .MS803 .10014567 .07/26/2012. */ 
      @lccostacc char(30), @lccdiscacc char(30), @lccobliacc char(30),   /* .MS803 .10014568 .08/15/2012. */  
      @lcbin char(10), @lnseq int, @lnrefillpt numeric(16, 4), @lnrefillqty numeric(16, 4),
      @lnreordqty numeric(16,4), @lnreordpt numeric(16, 4)   

    select @lcitemno = citemno,  @lcspeccode1= cspeccode1, @lcspeccode2 = cspeccode2  from inserted
    declare curiciwhs scroll cursor for
    select distinct cwarehouse from iciwhs where citemno = @lcitemno       
    open curiciwhs
    fetch next from curiciwhs into @lcwarehouse   
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
        begin
            if not exists(select citemno from iciwhs where citemno = @lcitemno and cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1 
              and cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2 and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse)
                begin
                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output             
                    -- Get default values from the last record in ICIWHS (Item # + Warehouse combo)
                    /* .MS803 .10014568 .08/15/2012 .begin. */  
                    --select top 1 @lcrevncode = crevncode,
                    --  @lcinvtacc = cinvtacc,
                    --  @lcintracc = cintracc,
                    --  @lnreordqty = nreordqty,
                    --  @lnreordpt = nreordpt,
                    --  @lcintrmacc = cintrmacc   /* .MS803 .10014567 .07/26/2012. */ 
                    --from iciwhs
                    --where citemno = @lcitemno and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse
                    --order by cspeccode1 desc, cspeccode2 desc
					select top 1 @lcrevncode = crevncode,
                      @lcinvtacc = cinvtacc,
                      @lcintracc = cintracc,
                      @lnreordqty = nreordqty,
                      @lnreordpt = nreordpt,
                      @lcintrmacc = cintrmacc,   /* .MS803 .10014567 .07/26/2012. */ 
                      @lccobliacc = ccobliacc,
                      @lccdiscacc = ccdiscacc,
                      @lccostacc = cccostacc  
                    from iciwhs
                    where citemno = @lcitemno and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse
                    order by cspeccode1 desc, cspeccode2 desc
                    /* .MS803 .10014568 .08/15/2012 .end. */
                    
                   /* .MS803 .10014568 .08/15/2012 .begin. */ 
              --      /* .MS803 .10014567 .07/26/2012 .begin. */
            		----insert into iciwhs(cuid, citemno, cwarehouse, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cinvtacc, cintracc, 
              ----        crevncode, nreordqty, nreordpt)
            		----values(@lcuid, @lcitemno, @lcwarehouse, @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, @lcinvtacc, @lcintracc, 
              ----        @lcrevncode, @lnreordqty, @lnreordpt)
              --      insert into iciwhs(cuid, citemno, cwarehouse, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cinvtacc, cintracc, 
              --        crevncode, cintrmacc , nreordqty, nreordpt)
            		--values(@lcuid, @lcitemno, @lcwarehouse, @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, @lcinvtacc, @lcintracc, 
              --        @lcrevncode, @lcintrmacc , @lnreordqty, @lnreordpt)
              --      /* .MS803 .10014567 .07/26/2012 .end. */
					insert into iciwhs(cuid, citemno, cwarehouse, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cinvtacc, cintracc, 
                      crevncode, cintrmacc , cccostacc, ccdiscacc, ccobliacc, nreordqty, nreordpt)
            		values(@lcuid, @lcitemno, @lcwarehouse, @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, @lcinvtacc, @lcintracc, 
                      @lcrevncode, @lcintrmacc , @lccostacc, @lccdiscacc, @lccobliacc, @lnreordqty, @lnreordpt)
                   /* .MS803 .10014568 .08/15/2012 .end. */ 
                end   
            declare curicibin scroll cursor for select distinct cbin, nseq, nrefillpt, nrefillqty from icibin where citemno = @lcitemno and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse and ldesignate = 1
            open curicibin
            fetch next from curicibin into @lcbin, @lnseq, @lnrefillpt, @lnrefillqty
            while @@fetch_status = 0   
                begin
                    if not exists(select citemno from icibin where citemno = @lcitemno and cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1 
                      and cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2 and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse and cbin = @lcbin)
                        begin
                            execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output
                            insert into icibin(cuid, citemno, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cwarehouse, cbin, 
                              ldesignate, nseq, nrefillpt, nrefillqty)
                            values(@lcuid, @lcitemno, @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, @lcwarehouse, @lcbin, 
                              1, @lnseq, @lnrefillpt, @lnrefillqty)
                    end   
                    fetch next from curicibin into @lcbin, @lnseq, @lnrefillpt, @lnrefillqty
                end
            close curicibin
            deallocate curicibin
    	    fetch next from curiciwhs into @lcwarehouse   
        end
    close curiciwhs
    deallocate curiciwhs

    delete from iciwhs where citemno = @lcitemno and cspeccode1 = '' and cspeccode2 = ''
    delete from icibin where citemno = @lcitemno and cspeccode1 = '' and cspeccode2 = ''
end

/** ID: IC90005.01 Name: icitem_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/  
create trigger icitem_delete on icitem  
for delete  
as  
begin  
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */  
       return  
  
    declare @citemno char(20)  
    select @citemno = deleted.citemno from deleted  
    -- Record is archived   
    if exists (select citemno from icitemh where citemno = @citemno)  
        return  
    -- Record is permanently deleted  
    delete from iciwhs where citemno = @citemno  
    delete from icibin where citemno = @citemno  
    delete from icispc where citemno = @citemno  
    delete from icimcp where citemno = @citemno  
    delete from iciprc where citemno = @citemno  
    delete from icimlp where citemno = @citemno  
    delete from icvend where citemno = @citemno  
    delete from icirmk where citemno = @citemno  
    delete from icinot where citemno = @citemno  
    delete from iciups where citemno = @citemno  
    delete from iciumk where citemno = @citemno  
    delete from iciimg where citemno = @citemno 
    /* .MS803 .10014691 .09/14/2012 .begin. */  
    select cuid into #ticcprc from iccprc where citemno = @citemno
    delete from iccprc where citemno = @citemno
    delete from iccprh where cuid in(select cuid from #ticcprc)
    drop table #ticcprc
    /* .MS803 .10014691 .09/14/2012 .end. */ 
end

/* infotrac h.l. 15-oct-2004 update modified time stamp */
create trigger [icitem_tr_it_inserttmodified] on [dbo].[icitem]
for insert
as
begin
  if @@rowcount = 0 return
  if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1) return   /* exclusive mode */
  update icitem
  set icitem.it_tmodified = current_timestamp,icitem.it_modified_yn = 'y'
  from inserted
  where (icitem.citemno=inserted.citemno)
end

/* infotrac h.l. 15-oct-2004 update modified time stamp */
create trigger [icitem_tr_it_updatetmodified] on [dbo].[icitem]
for update
as
begin
  if @@rowcount = 0         return
  if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1) return   /* exclusive mode */
  if update(it_modified_yn) return
  update icitem
  set icitem.it_tmodified = current_timestamp,icitem.it_modified_yn = 'y'
  from inserted
  where (icitem.citemno=inserted.citemno)
end

/** ID: IC70032.10 Name: icitem_upd Owner: ZA ScriptDate: 10/01/2012 **/    
CREATE trigger [dbo].[icitem_upd] ON [dbo].[icitem]   
for update    
as    
begin    
  
DECLARE @cmdtxt VARCHAR(100)  
  
 declare @nstdcost numeric(16,4), @cuser char(30)   
 select @nstdcost = nstdcost from inserted  
 select @cuser = isnull(cUserName,'Supervisor') from icitem where citemno = (select citemno from inserted)   
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */    
        return    
    if update(nstdcost) and (select nstdcost from deleted) <> (select nstdcost from inserted) and   
   ((select lupdonhand from inserted) = 1 or (select lkititem from inserted) = 1)   
      begin    
  declare @citemno char(20),@cwarehouse char(10),@nonhand numeric(16,4), @whcost numeric(16,4),  
   @ckititemno varchar(20), @ncost numeric(16,4)  
  declare CurStdCost scroll cursor for  
     select citemno,cwarehouse,nonhand,ncost from iciwhs where citemno =(select citemno from inserted)  
     open CurStdCost   
     fetch next from CurStdCost into @citemno,@cwarehouse,@nonhand,@whcost  
     while @@fetch_status = 0  
     begin  
   if (select nstdcost from inserted) <> @whcost  
   begin  
    update icicst set ncost = @nstdcost where citemno = @citemno and cwarehouse = @cwarehouse   
    update iciwhs set ncost = @nstdcost, ntotcost = @nonhand * @nstdcost where cwarehouse = @cwarehouse  
     and citemno = @citemno       
    insert into atstdc(citemno,cwarehouse,nonhand,noldval,nnewval,dadj,cuser)  
     values(@citemno,@cwarehouse,@nonhand,@whcost,@nstdcost,getdate(),@cuser)  
       
    declare @lcsystem char(8), @cstdvaracc char(30),@lcuid char(15),@lnautoadj numeric(16,4),  
     @lcadjno char(10)  
        
    execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'dsystem', @cretvalue = @lcsystem output      
    select @cstdvaracc = cstdvaracc from icsyst         
    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output, @bfromfront = 0      
      
    execute vsp_am_getnewdocno @csystfield = 'cadjno', @cautodocno = '',      
      @calias = 'iciadj/', @ckeyfield = 'cadjno', @ckeyvalue = '', @bfromfront = 0,      
      @nkeylength = 10, @csystalias = 'icsyst', @bfromio = 0, @cdocno = @lcadjno  output      
                   
      select @lnautoadj = @nonhand * (@nstdcost - @whcost)   
        
    insert into iciadj(cuid, cadjno, cmodule, citemno, cwarehouse, cbin, cspeccode1,      
      cspeccode2, centerby, cadjacc, cremark, ctrstype, dadjust, ntotcost)      
    values(@lcuid, @lcadjno, 'IC', @citemno, @cwarehouse, '', '',      
      '', 'SYSTEM', @cstdvaracc, 'Standard Cost Variance Adjustment',   
      'CADJ', @lcsystem, @lnautoadj)      
    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output, @bfromfront = 0      
       
    insert into ictrsn(cuid, ctrstype, cmodule, ctrsno, corigno, citemno, cwarehouse, cbin,     
      cspeccode1, cspeccode2, csernum, ckitno, clotno, centerby, dcreate, dtrs, nqty, ncost, ntotcost)      
    values(@lcuid, 'CADJ', 'IC', @lcadjno, '', @citemno, @cwarehouse, '',      
      '', '', '', '', '', 'SYSTEM', @lcsystem, @lcsystem,      
      0, 0, @lnautoadj)                   
   end  
   fetch next from CurStdCost into @citemno,@cwarehouse,@nonhand,@whcost  
     end   
     deallocate CurStdCost

/** ID: IC90006.01 Name: icitem_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
CREATE trigger [dbo].[icitem_update] ON [dbo].[icitem]
for update
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return

	declare @lcitemno char(20),@lcDescript CHAR(54)
    if update(nprice)
      begin
        declare @lnprice numeric(16, 4)
        select @lnprice = nprice, @lcitemno = citemno from inserted
        update iccprc set nnewprice = @lnprice, nprice = @lnprice
          where citemno = @lcitemno and ldefprice = 1
      end

	if update(cdescript)
		begin
		 select   @lcitemno = citemno, @lcDescript = cDescript  from inserted
		 UPDATE icikit SET cDescript=@lcDescript where ccompno=@lcitemno
		end

end

for update
