begin
	declare @citemno varchar(101),@cstatus varchar(101),@lmlm varchar(101),@ldscntble varchar(101), @csponcat varchar(101),
	@nprice as varchar(101), @nstdcost varchar(101), @cusername char(101),@lupdonhand varchar(101),@lcusxitm INT, @lchkonhand varchar(101), @lallownupd varchar(101), @lregitem varchar(101)
			
	declare @dcitemno varchar(101),@dcstatus varchar(101),@dlmlm varchar(101), @dldscntble varchar(101), @dcsponcat varchar(101),
	@dnprice as varchar(101), @dnstdcost varchar(101),@dlupdonhand varchar(101),@dlcusxitm INT, @dlchkonhand varchar(101), @dlallownupd varchar(101), @dlregitem varchar(101)
	
	declare CurUpdate scroll cursor for
	select citemno, cstatus, lmlm, ldscntble, csponcat, nprice, nstdcost, cusername,lupdonhand,lcusxitm, lchkonhand, lallownupd, lregitem
	   from Inserted 
	Open CurUpdate 
	fetch next from CurUpdate into 
			@citemno,@cstatus,@lmlm,@ldscntble,@csponcat, @nprice, @nstdcost, @cusername ,@lupdonhand,@lcusxitm, @lchkonhand, @lallownupd, @lregitem
	while @@fetch_status = 0
	begin	
		select @dcitemno=citemno,@dcstatus=cstatus,@dlmlm=lmlm, @dldscntble = ldscntble, @csponcat = @dcsponcat, @nprice = @dnprice,
		@nstdcost = @dnstdcost,@dlupdonhand=lupdonhand,@dlcusxitm=lcusxitm, @dlchkonhand = lchkonhand, @dlallownupd = lallownupd, @dlregitem = lregitem
	   from deleted where citemno = @citemno
		
		if update(citemno) and ltrim(rtrim(@citemno)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dcitemno))
		begin
			insert into changesitem(citemno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,cuser)
			values (@citemno,'citemno',isnull(@citemno,''),isnull(@dcitemno,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end	
			
		if update(cstatus) and ltrim(rtrim(@cstatus)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dcstatus)) 
		begin
			insert into changesitem(citemno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,cuser) 
				values (@citemno,'cstatus',isnull(@cstatus,''),isnull(@dcstatus,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end
		
		if update(lmlm) and ltrim(rtrim(@lmlm)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dlmlm))
		begin
			insert into changesitem(citemno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,cuser)  
				values (@citemno,'lmlm',isnull(@lmlm,''),isnull(@dlmlm,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end
		
		if update(lupdonhand) and ltrim(rtrim(@lupdonhand)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dlupdonhand))
		begin
			insert into changesitem(citemno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,cuser)  
				values (@citemno,'lupdonhand',isnull(@lupdonhand,''),isnull(@dlupdonhand,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end

		if update(lchkonhand) and ltrim(rtrim(@lchkonhand)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dlchkonhand))
		begin
			insert into changesitem(citemno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,cuser)  
				values (@citemno,'lchkonhand',isnull(@lchkonhand,''),isnull(@dlchkonhand,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end

		if update(lallownupd) and ltrim(rtrim(@lallownupd)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dlallownupd))
		begin
			insert into changesitem(citemno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,cuser)  
				values (@citemno,'lallownupd',isnull(@lallownupd,''),isnull(@dlallownupd,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end

		if update(lcusxitm) and ltrim(rtrim(@lcusxitm)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dlcusxitm))
		begin
			insert into changesitem(citemno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,cuser)  
				values (@citemno,'lcusxitm',isnull(@lcusxitm,''),isnull(@dlcusxitm,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end

		if update(lregitem) and ltrim(rtrim(@lregitem)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dlregitem))
		begin
			insert into changesitem(citemno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,cuser)  
				values (@citemno,'lregitem',isnull(@lregitem,''),isnull(@dlregitem,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end

		if update(ldscntble) and ltrim(rtrim(@ldscntble)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dldscntble)) 
		begin
			insert into changesitem(citemno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,cuser) 
				values (@citemno,'ldscntble',isnull(@ldscntble,''),isnull(@dldscntble,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end
		
		if update(csponcat) and ltrim(rtrim(@csponcat)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dcsponcat)) 
		begin
			insert into changesitem(citemno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,cuser) 
				values (@citemno,'csponcat',isnull(@ldscntble,''),isnull(@dldscntble,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end
				
		if update(nprice) and ltrim(rtrim(@nprice)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dnprice)) 
		begin
			insert into changesitem(citemno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,cuser) 
				values (@citemno,'nprice',isnull(@nprice,''),isnull(@dnprice,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end
		
				if update(nstdcost) and ltrim(rtrim(@nstdcost)) <> ltrim(rtrim(@dnstdcost)) 
		begin
			insert into changesitem(citemno,cfieldname,cnewvalue,codlvalue,InsUpdDate,cuser) 
				values (@citemno,'nstdcost',isnull(@nstdcost,''),isnull(@dnstdcost,''),getdate(),@cusername)
		end
				
		fetch next from CurUpdate into 
			@citemno, @cstatus, @lmlm, @ldscntble, @csponcat, @nprice, @nstdcost, @cusername,@lupdonhand,@lcusxitm, @lchkonhand, @lallownupd, @lregitem
	end
	deallocate CurUpdate
end

CREATE trigger [dbo].[itemsync] on [dbo].[icitem]
for update
as
begin

declare @citemno CHAR(20),@cdescript CHAR(54),@cstatus CHAR(1),@ldscntble INT, @csponcat char(10),
	@nprice as numeric(16,4), @lupdonhand INT,@lcusxitm INT,
	@ctype CHAR(10),@cclass CHAR(10),@cprodline CHAR(10),@lsalesaid INT,@ctype2 CHAR(10)
			
declare @dcitemno CHAR(20),@dcdescript CHAR(54),@dcstatus CHAR(1),@dldscntble INT, @dcsponcat char(10),
	@dnprice as numeric(16,4), @dlupdonhand INT,@dlcusxitm INT,
	@dctype CHAR(10),@dcclass CHAR(10),@dcprodline CHAR(10),@dlsalesaid INT,@dctype2 CHAR(10)

	declare CurUpdate scroll cursor for
	select citemno,cdescript,cstatus,ldscntble,csponcat,nprice,lupdonhand,lcusxitm,ctype,cclass,
	 cprodline,lsalesaid,ctype2
	   from Inserted 

	Open CurUpdate 
	fetch next from CurUpdate into 
		@citemno,@cdescript,@cstatus,@ldscntble,@csponcat,@nprice,@lupdonhand,@lcusxitm,@ctype,@cclass,
				@cprodline,@lsalesaid,@ctype2
			while @@fetch_status = 0
	begin	
		select @dcitemno=citemno,@dcdescript=cdescript,@dcstatus=cstatus,@dldscntble = ldscntble, @dcsponcat = csponcat,
		 @dnprice = nprice,@dlupdonhand=lupdonhand,@dlcusxitm=lcusxitm,
		 @dctype=ctype,@dcclass=cclass,@dcprodline=cprodline,@dlsalesaid=lsalesaid,@dctype2=ctype2
	   from deleted where citemno = @citemno

		if (update(citemno) and @citemno <> @dcitemno) OR 
		(update(cdescript) and @cdescript <> @dcdescript) OR 
		(update(cstatus) and @cstatus <> @dcstatus) OR 
		(update(ldscntble) and @ldscntble <> @ldscntble) OR 
		(update(csponcat) and @csponcat <> @dcsponcat) OR 
		(update(nprice) and @nprice <> @dnprice) OR 
		(update(lupdonhand) and @lupdonhand <> @dlupdonhand) OR 
		(update(lcusxitm) and @lcusxitm <> @dlcusxitm) OR 
		(update(ctype) and @ctype <> @dctype) OR 
		(update(cclass) and @cclass <> @dcclass) OR 
		(update(cprodline) and @cprodline <> @dcprodline) OR 
		(update(lsalesaid) and @lsalesaid <> @dlsalesaid) OR 
		(update(ctype2) and @ctype2 <> @dctype2) 

		begin
			insert into icWSupdate(citemno,cType,dLastUpd)
			values (@citemno,'icitem',getdate())
		end	
			
		fetch next from CurUpdate into 
			@citemno,@cdescript,@cstatus,@ldscntble,@csponcat,@nprice,@lupdonhand,@lcusxitm,@ctype,@cclass,
				@cprodline,@lsalesaid,@ctype2
	end
	deallocate CurUpdate
end

create trigger trig_it_log_icitem_delete on [dbo].[icitem]
for  delete
as
begin
  if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1) return   /* exclusive mode */

/** ID: IC90007.01 Name: icitrf_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger icitrf_insert on icitrf
for insert
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return
    
    /* .MS802 .10012908 .06/17/2011 .begin. */    
    --declare @lctrfno char(10), @lclineitem char(10), @lnamtdec integer
    --select @lnamtdec = namtdec from cosyst
    declare @lctrfno char(10), @lclineitem char(10), @lncostdec integer
    select @lncostdec = ncodec from cosyst
    /* .MS802 .10012908 .06/17/2011 .end. */    
    
    declare curicitrf scroll cursor 
      for select ctrfno, clineitem from inserted
    open curicitrf
    fetch next from curicitrf into @lctrfno, @lclineitem
    while @@fetch_status <> -1
        begin
            update icitrf set
              /* .MS802 .10012908 .06/17/2011 .begin. */    
              icitrf.ntrfcost1 = round(icitrf.ntrfqty1 * icitrf.ntrfcost1, @lncostdec),
              icitrf.ntrfcost2 = round(icitrf.ntrfqty2 * icitrf.ntrfcost2, @lncostdec)
              /* .MS802 .10012908 .06/17/2011 .end. */    
              where icitrf.ctrfno = @lctrfno and icitrf.clineitem = @lclineitem
            fetch next from curicitrf into @lctrfno, @lclineitem
        end
    close curicitrf
    deallocate curicitrf
end

/** ID: MI90005.02 Name: miwtrs_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 06/20/2014 **/  
create trigger miwtrs_delete on miwtrs
for delete  
as  
begin  
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */  
       return  
    set xact_abort on  
  
    --declare @lcwono char(10), @lcjobno char(10)     
    declare @lcwono char(10), @lcjobno char(10), @lclineitem char(10)   /* .10016078 .06/20/2014. */
    delete from miwtrk from deleted  
      where miwtrk.cuid = deleted.cuid  
    delete from miwtin from deleted  
      where miwtin.cuid = deleted.cuid  
  
    declare curjob scroll cursor for select cwono, cjobno, clineitem from deleted where cjobno <> ''  
    open curjob
    --fetch next from curjob into @lcwono, @lcjobno  
    fetch next from curjob into @lcwono, @lcjobno, @lclineitem   /* .10016078 .06/20/2014. */
    while @@fetch_status = 0  
        begin  
			/* .10016078 .06/20/2014 .begin. */
            --delete from miwips where cwono = @lcwono and cwipno in (select distinct cwipno from miwips where cwono = @lcwono and cjobno = @lcjobno)  
            --delete from mifinh where cwono = @lcwono and cfnhno in (select distinct cfnhno from mifinh where cwono = @lcwono and cjobno = @lcjobno)  
            --fetch next from curjob into @lcwono, @lcjobno
            delete from miwips where cwono = @lcwono and clineitem = @lclineitem and cwipno in 
				(select distinct cwipno from miwips where cwono = @lcwono and cjobno = @lcjobno)
            delete from mifinh where cwono = @lcwono and clineitem = @lclineitem and cfnhno in 
				(select distinct cfnhno from mifinh where cwono = @lcwono and cjobno = @lcjobno)
            fetch next from curjob into @lcwono, @lcjobno, @lclineitem
            /* .10016078 .06/20/2014 .end. */
        end
    close curjob
    deallocate curjob
end

/** ID: PO90020.01 Name: poachg_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger poachg_insert on poachg
for insert
as
begin
	if exists(select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)
		return
	if not exists(select ctrs from inserted where ctrs = 'A' and cpoachguid <> '')
		return
	set xact_abort on

	declare @lcuid char(15), @lcpoachguid char(15),
	  @lnamount numeric(18,4), @lnfamount numeric(18,4),
	  @lnfunrevsamt numeric(18,4), @lctrs char(1)

	select @lcuid = cuid, @lcpoachguid = cpoachguid, @lnfamount = nfamount,
	  @lnamount = namount
	from inserted where ctrs = 'A' and cpoachguid <> ''

	select @lnfunrevsamt = -nfamount - (nfinvamt + nfcnlamt)
	  from poachg where cuid = @lcpoachguid

	if @lnfunrevsamt >= @lnfamount
        begin
            /* Reverse Cancel landed cost */
            update poachg
              set nfcnlamt = -@lnfamount,
                ncnlamt    = -@lnamount
              where cuid   = @lcuid
			
            /* Reverse landed cost */
            update poachg
              set nfcnlamt = nfcnlamt + @lnfamount,
                ncnlamt    = ncnlamt + @lnamount
              where cuid   = @lcpoachguid
        end
end

/** ID: PO90001.01 Name: pocnlg_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger pocnlg_insert on pocnlg  
for insert  
as  
begin  
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */  
       return  
    set xact_abort on  
    declare @lccntrytax char(3), @lctaxtype char(1), @lcnewuid char(15),  
      @lcvendno char(10), @lcpono char(10), @lcrcptno char(10), @lccnlno char(10),   
      @lcwarehouse char(10), @ldcancel datetime, @lncrecamt numeric(18,4),   
      @lncdiscamt numeric(18,4), @lncfrtamt numeric(18,4), @lnctaxamt numeric(18,4),   
      @lnfcrecamt numeric(18,4), @lnfcdiscamt numeric(18,4), @lnfcfrtamt numeric(18,4),   
      @lnfctaxamt numeric(18,4), @lnftrsamt numeric(18,4), @lntrsamt numeric(18,4),  
      @lnctaxamt1 numeric(18,4), @lnctaxamt2 numeric(18,4), @lnctaxamt3 numeric(18,4),   
      @lnfctaxamt1 numeric(18,4), @lnfctaxamt2 numeric(18,4), @lnfctaxamt3 numeric(18,4),  
      @lncounter integer, @lcvendno1 char(10), @lcpono1 char(10), @lcglacc char(30),
      @llaccrue smallint   
  
    execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'ccntrytax', @cretvalue = @lccntrytax output  
    execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'ctaxtype',  @cretvalue = @lctaxtype output  
  
    declare curpocnlg_ins scroll cursor for   
    select cvendno, cpono, crcptno, ccnlno, cwarehouse, dcancel,  
      ncrecamt, ncdiscamt, ncfrtamt, nctaxamt1, nctaxamt2, nctaxamt3,   
      nfcrecamt, nfcdiscamt, nfcfrtamt, nfctaxamt1, nfctaxamt2, nfctaxamt3  
    from inserted  
    open curpocnlg_ins  
    fetch next from curpocnlg_ins   
    into @lcvendno, @lcpono, @lcrcptno, @lccnlno, @lcwarehouse, @ldcancel,  
      @lncrecamt, @lncdiscamt, @lncfrtamt, @lnctaxamt1, @lnctaxamt2, @lnctaxamt3,  
      @lnfcrecamt, @lnfcdiscamt, @lnfcfrtamt, @lnfctaxamt1, @lnfctaxamt2, @lnfctaxamt3  
    while @@fetch_status = 0  
        begin  
            select @lnctaxamt = @lnctaxamt1 + @lnctaxamt2 + @lnctaxamt3,  
                   @lnfctaxamt = @lnfctaxamt1 + @lnfctaxamt2 + @lnfctaxamt3  
      
            if @lnfcfrtamt > 0  
                update popord  
                set nffrtamtch = nffrtamtch - @lnfcfrtamt, nfrtamtchg = nfrtamtchg - @lncfrtamt  
                where cpono = @lcpono  
     
		    -- AP/PO Matching
            if (select lmatch from popord where cpono = @lcpono) = 1
                begin  
                    /* Reset tax amount since it's included in line item */  
                    if @lctaxtype = 'L'  
                        select @lnfctaxamt = 0, @lnctaxamt = 0  
      
                    select @lnftrsamt = @lnfcrecamt - @lnfcdiscamt + @lnfcfrtamt + @lnfctaxamt,  
                        @lntrsamt = @lncrecamt - @lncdiscamt + @lncfrtamt + @lnctaxamt  
      
                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcnewuid output, @bfromfront = 0 
				    select @llaccrue = laccrue from popord where cpono = @lcpono
				    if  @llaccrue = 1
					    begin
		                    insert into podist (cuid, cvendno, cpono, crcptno, ccnlno,
		                      cglacc, ctrs, dtrs, nfamount, namount)
		                    select @lcnewuid, cvendno, cpono, crcptno, @lccnlno,
		                      cglacc, ctrs, @ldcancel, @lnftrsamt, @lntrsamt
		                    from podist
		                    where crcptno = @lcrcptno and ctrs = 'A' and ccnlno = ''			
					    end

                    execute vsp_po_accrue_amt @cuid = @lcnewuid, @cpono = @lcpono, 
                      @crcptno = @lcrcptno, @ccnlno = @lccnlno, @cvendno = @lcvendno,
                      @cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse, @dtrs = @ldcancel,
                      @nftrsamt = @lnftrsamt, @ntrsamt = @lntrsamt,
         		      --@laccrue = 1   
					  @laccrue = @llaccrue   /* .MSS803SP3 .10015582 .08/28/2013. */

                    if @lnfctaxamt > 0
                        begin
                            select @lncounter = 1
                            declare curpodist_tax_ins scroll cursor for
                            select cvendno, cpono, cglacc
                            from podist
                            where crcptno = @lcrcptno and ctrs = 'T' and ccnlno = ''

                            open curpodist_tax_ins
                            fetch next from curpodist_tax_ins
                            into @lcvendno1, @lcpono1, @lcglacc
                            while @@fetch_status = 0
                                begin
                                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcnewuid output, @bfromfront = 0
                                    if @llaccrue = 1
                                        begin
                                            insert into podist (cuid, cvendno, cpono, crcptno, ccnlno,
                                                cglacc, ctrs, dtrs, nfamount, namount)
                                            select @lcnewuid, @lcvendno1, @lcpono1, @lcrcptno, @lccnlno,
                                                @lcglacc, 'T', @ldcancel,
                                                case when @lncounter = 1 then -@lnfctaxamt1
                                                when @lncounter = 2 then -@lnfctaxamt2
                                                when @lncounter = 3 then -@lnfctaxamt3 else 0 end,
                                                case when @lncounter = 1 then -@lnctaxamt1
                                                when @lncounter = 2 then -@lnctaxamt2
                                                when @lncounter = 3 then -@lnctaxamt3 else 0 end
                                         end

                                    select @lncounter = @lncounter + 1
                                    fetch next from curpodist_tax_ins
                                    into @lcvendno1, @lcpono1, @lcglacc
                                end   /* end of while for curpodist_tax_ins */
                            close curpodist_tax_ins
                            deallocate curpodist_tax_ins

                            execute vsp_po_accrue_qty @cuid = @lcnewuid, @cpono = @lcpono,
                              @crcptno = @lcrcptno, @ccnlno = @lccnlno, @cvendno = @lcvendno,
                              @cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse, @ctype = 'PTAX', @dtrs = @ldcancel,
                              @nftrsamt = @lnfctaxamt, @ntrsamt = @lnctaxamt,
        				      --@laccrue = 1  
							  @laccrue = @llaccrue   /* .MSS803SP3 .10015582 .08/28/2013. */ 
                        end

                    if @lnfcfrtamt > 0
                        begin
                            execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcnewuid output, @bfromfront = 0
						    if @llaccrue = 1
							    begin
		                            insert into podist (cuid, cpono, crcptno, ccnlno, cvendno,
		                              cglacc, ctrs, dtrs, nfamount, namount)
		                            select @lcnewuid, cpono, crcptno, @lccnlno, cvendno,
		                              cglacc, ctrs, @ldcancel, -@lnfcfrtamt, -@lncfrtamt
		                            from podist
		                            where crcptno = @lcrcptno and ctrs = 'C' and ccnlno = ''
							    end

                            execute vsp_po_accrue_qty @cuid = @lcnewuid, @cpono = @lcpono,
                              @crcptno = @lcrcptno, @ccnlno = @lccnlno, @cvendno = @lcvendno,
                              @cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse, @ctype = 'FRGT', @dtrs = @ldcancel,
                              @nftrsamt = @lnfcfrtamt, @ntrsamt = @lncfrtamt,
                              --@laccrue = 1   
							  @laccrue = @llaccrue   /* .MSS803SP3 .10015582 .08/28/2013. */
                        end
                end   /* accrued */

            fetch next from curpocnlg_ins
            into @lcvendno, @lcpono, @lcrcptno, @lccnlno, @lcwarehouse, @ldcancel,
              @lncrecamt, @lncdiscamt, @lncfrtamt, @lnctaxamt1, @lnctaxamt2, @lnctaxamt3,
              @lnfcrecamt, @lnfcdiscamt, @lnfcfrtamt, @lnfctaxamt1, @lnfctaxamt2, @lnfctaxamt3
        end   /* end of while for curpocnlg_ins */
    close curpocnlg_ins
    deallocate curpocnlg_ins
end
