    --  @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, @llstock, @lncnlqty, @lndiscrate,   
    --  --@lncrecamt, @lncdiscamt, @lnfcrecamt, @lnfcdiscamt, @lncost, @lnmcround  
    --  -- @lncrecamt, @lncdiscamt, @lnfcrecamt, @lnfcdiscamt, @lncost, @lnmcround, @llmultibin   /* .MS802 .10013691 .06/15/2011. */
    --  @lncrecamt, @lncdiscamt, @lnfcrecamt, @lnfcdiscamt, @lncost, @lnmcround, @llmultibin, @lcrcptrsuid   /* .MS901 .10015792 .01/14/2014. */

   declare curpoctrs_ins scroll cursor for   
    select a.cvendno, a.cpono, a.crcptno, a.ccnlno, a.cwarehouse, a.cbin, a.clineitem, a.citemno,   
      a.cspeccode1, a.cspeccode2, a.lstock, a.ncnlqty, a.ndiscrate,  
      a.ncrecamt, a.ncdiscamt, a.nfcrecamt, a.nfcdiscamt, a.ncost, 0, a.lmultibin, isnull(portrs.cuid, ''),
      a.dcreate
    from inserted a left outer join portrs on portrs.crcptno = a.crcptno and portrs.clineitem = a.clineitem
     
    open curpoctrs_ins  
    fetch next from curpoctrs_ins  
    into @lcvendno, @lcpono, @lcrcptno, @lccnlno, @lcwarehouse, @lcbin, @lclineitem, @lcitemno,   
      @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, @llstock, @lncnlqty, @lndiscrate,   
      @lncrecamt, @lncdiscamt, @lnfcrecamt, @lnfcdiscamt, @lncost, @lnmcround, @llmultibin, @lcrcptrsuid,
      @ldcreate
	/* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .end. */  
      
    while @@fetch_status = 0  
    begin  
        select @ldcancel = dcancel   
        from pocnlg   
        where ccnlno = @lccnlno  
  
        select @lcpoptrs_cuid = (select cuid from poptrs where cpono = @lcpono and  
          clineitem = @lclineitem)  
  
        update poptrs   
        set nrecqty = nrecqty - @lncnlqty  
        where cuid = @lcpoptrs_cuid  
  
        select @ldreceive = dreceive  
        from portrs  
        where crcptno = @lcrcptno and clineitem = @lclineitem  
  
        if @llstock = 1  
            begin  
                execute vsp_ic_baseqty @ctable = 'poptrs', @cuid = @lcpoptrs_cuid,  
                  @nqty = @lncnlqty, @nqtydec = -1, @nretvalue = @lnbasecnlqty output  
  
                select @llupdonhand = lupdonhand,  
                  @llot = llot,  
                  @lncosttype = ncosttype  
                from icitem where citemno = @lcitemno   
  
                if @llupdonhand = 0  
                    update iciwhs  
                    set nonorder =   
                      case   
                          when nonorder + @lnbasecnlqty > 0  
                            then nonorder + @lnbasecnlqty   
                          else 0   
                      end  
                    where citemno = @lcitemno and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse and  
                      cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1 and cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2  
                else   -- update on-hand  
                    begin  
                        select @lnnetcost = @lncost * (1 - @lndiscrate / 100)  
                        execute vsp_ic_cost @ctable = 'poptrs', @cuid = @lcpoptrs_cuid,  
                          @ncost = @lnnetcost, @bbase = 1, @nretvalue = @lnbasenetcost output  
          
                        execute vsp_ic_baseqty @ctable = 'poptrs', @cuid = @lcpoptrs_cuid,  
                          @nqty = @lncnlqty, @nqtydec = -1, @nretvalue = @lnbasecnlqty output  
                
                        select @lnadjqty = 0 - @lnbasecnlqty  
               
                        if @lncosttype = 4 or @llot = 1  
                            update iciwhs  
                            set nonorder = nonorder + @lnbasecnlqty  
                            where citemno = @lcitemno and  cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse and  
                                  cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1 and cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2  
                        else  
                            begin    
                                /* .MS802 .10013691 .06/15/2011 .begin. */
                                /*Do not call the vsp_icupditemonhand for a stock item that recieved at multiple bins.*/  
                                /*Item on hand updates are already handled at the Cancel Received Goods function.*/  
                                
                                --execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'cfullname', @cretvalue = @lcfullname output  
                                --execute vsp_ic_upditemonhand @citemno = @lcitemno, @cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse,  
                                --  @cbin = @lcbin, @csernum = '', @ckitno = '', @clotno = '',  
                                --  @nadjqty = @lnadjqty, @ntrsqty = @lnbasecnlqty,  
                                --  @ncost = @lnbasenetcost, @cmodule = 'PO', @ctrsno = @lcpono,  
                                --  @ctrstype = 'PORG', @corigno = @lcvendno, @dcreate = @ldcancel,  
                                --  -- @dtrs = @ldcancel, @centerby = @lcfullname, @lsupplycost = 1,  
                                --  @dtrs = @ldcancel, @centerby = @lcfullname, @lsupplycost = 0,   /* .MS802 .10013142 .12/03/2010. */
                                --  @bfromfront = 0, @nretvalue = 0, @cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1,  
                                --  @cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2  
                                if @llmultibin = 0 
 begin
                                        execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'cfullname', @cretvalue = @lcfullname output  
                                        /* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .begin. */
                                        --/* .MS901 .10015792 .01/14/2014 .begin. */
                                        ---- 10015792: revert fix for 10013142, add @crcpttrsuid
                                        ----execute vsp_ic_upditemonhand @citemno = @lcitemno, @cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse,  
                                        ----  @cbin = @lcbin, @csernum = '', @ckitno = '', @clotno = '',  
                                        ----  @nadjqty = @lnadjqty, @ntrsqty = @lnbasecnlqty,  
                                        ----  @ncost = @lnbasenetcost, @cmodule = 'PO', @ctrsno = @lcpono,  
                                        ----  @ctrstype = 'PORG', @corigno = @lcvendno, @dcreate = @ldcancel,  
                                        ----  -- @dtrs = @ldcancel, @centerby = @lcfullname, @lsupplycost = 1,  
                                        ----  @dtrs = @ldcancel, @centerby = @lcfullname, @lsupplycost = 0,   /* .MS802 .10013142 .12/03/2010. */
                                        ----  @bfromfront = 0, @nretvalue = 0, @cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1,  
                                        ----  @cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2
                                        --execute vsp_ic_upditemonhand @citemno = @lcitemno, @cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse,  
                                        --  @cbin = @lcbin, @csernum = '', @ckitno = '', @clotno = '',  
                                        --  @nadjqty = @lnadjqty, @ntrsqty = @lnbasecnlqty,  
                                        --  @ncost = @lnbasenetcost, @cmodule = 'PO', @ctrsno = @lcpono,  
                                        --  @ctrstype = 'PORG', @corigno = @lcvendno, @dcreate = @ldcancel,  
                                        --  @dtrs = @ldcancel, @centerby = @lcfullname, @lsupplycost = 1,
                                        --  @bfromfront = 0, @nretvalue = 0, @cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1,  
                                        --  @cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2, @crcpttrsuid = @lcrcptrsuid
                                        --/* .MS901 .10015792 .01/14/2014 .end. */
                                        execute vsp_ic_upditemonhand @citemno = @lcitemno, @cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse,  
                                          @cbin = @lcbin, @csernum = '', @ckitno = '', @clotno = '',  
                                          @nadjqty = @lnadjqty, @ntrsqty = @lnbasecnlqty,  
                                          @ncost = @lnbasenetcost, @cmodule = 'PO', @ctrsno = @lcpono,  
                                          @ctrstype = 'PORG', @corigno = @lcvendno, @dcreate = @ldcreate,  
                                          @dtrs = @ldcancel, @centerby = @lcfullname, @lsupplycost = 1,
                                          @bfromfront = 0, @nretvalue = 0, @cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1,  
                                          @cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2, @crcpttrsuid = @lcrcptrsuid
                                        /* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .end. */
                                    end
                                /* .MS802 .10013691 .06/15/2011 .end. */
                            end 
				  /* .MS802 .10012891 .06/01/2011 .begin. */ 
--                        select @lnmcround = (@lncrecamt - @lncdiscamt) - round(@lnbasecnlqty * @lnbasenetcost, 2)     
				select @lnmcround = (@lncrecamt - @lncdiscamt) - round(@lnbasecnlqty * 
						 @lnbasenetcost, (select namtdec from cosyst))
				 /* .MS802 .10012891 .06/01/2011 .end. */ 	
                    end  
            end  
		-- AP/PO Matching
        if (select lmatch from popord where cpono = @lcpono) = 1
            begin  
                select @lnftrsamt = @lnfcrecamt - @lnfcdiscamt,  
          @lntrsamt = @lncrecamt - @lncdiscamt + @lnmcround  
  
                execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcnewuid output, @bfromfront = 0  
				select @llaccrue = laccrue from popord where cpono = @lcpono
				if  @llaccrue = 1 
					begin
		                insert into podist (cuid, cvendno, cpono, crcptno, ccnlno,   
		                  clineitem, cglacc, ctrs, dtrs, nfamount, namount, nmcround)  
		                select top 1 @lcnewuid, cvendno, cpono, crcptno, @lccnlno,   
		                  clineitem, cglacc, 'I',  @ldcancel, -@lnftrsamt, -@lntrsamt, @lnmcround  
		                from podist   
		                where crcptno = @lcrcptno and clineitem = @lclineitem and ccnlno = ''
					end
  
                execute vsp_po_accrue_qty @cuid = @lcnewuid, @cvendno = @lcvendno,   
                  @cpono = @lcpono, @crcptno = @lcrcptno, @ccnlno = @lccnlno,  
                  @cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse, @clineitem = @lclineitem, @ctype = 'ITEM',   
                  @dtrs = @ldcancel, @ntrsqty = @lncnlqty, @nftrsamt = @lnftrsamt, @ntrsamt = @lntrsamt,  
                  --@laccrue = 1  
				  @laccrue = @llaccrue   /* .MSS803SP3 .10015582 .08/28/2013. */
  
                if @lnmcround <> 0  
                    begin  
                        /* Write to iciadj so it can be seen from inventory adjustment report */  
                        /* Mark as 'transferred', rounding variance will be transferred with accrue receive goods */  
                        select @lcglacc = ciadjacc from arsyst  
                        execute vsp_am_getnewdocno @csystfield = 'cadjno', @cautodocno = '',  
                          @calias = 'iciadj/', @ckeyfield = 'cadjno', @ckeyvalue = '', @bfromfront = 0,  
                          @nkeylength = 10, @csystalias = 'icsyst', @bfromio = 0, @cdocno = @lcadjno  output  
  
                        insert into iciadj(cuid, cadjno, cmodule, ctogl, citemno, cwarehouse,  
                          cbin, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, centerby, cadjacc,   
                          cremark, ctrstype,  
                          dadjust, ntotcost)  
                        values(@lcnewuid, @lcadjno, 'PO', 'X', @lcitemno, @lcwarehouse,   
                          @lcbin, @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, 'SYSTEM', @lcglacc,   
                          'Receive Goods - Receipt #' + @lcrcptno, 'RADJ',  
                          @ldcancel, @lnmcround)  
																		
                        /* Write to ictrsn with new type 'RADJ' - rounding adjustment */  
                        /* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .begin. */
                        --insert into ictrsn(cuid, ctrstype, cmodule, ctrsno, corigno, citemno, cwarehouse, cbin,  
                        --  cspeccode1, cspeccode2, centerby, dcreate, dtrs, nqty, ncost, ntotcost)  
                        --values(@lcnewuid, 'RADJ', 'PO', @lcadjno, @lcvendno, @lcitemno, @lcwarehouse, @lcbin,  
                        --  @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, 'SYSTEM', @ldcancel, @ldcancel, 0, 0, @lnmcround)                                                  
                        insert into ictrsn(cuid, ctrstype, cmodule, ctrsno, corigno, citemno, cwarehouse, cbin,  
                          cspeccode1, cspeccode2, centerby, dcreate, dtrs, nqty, ncost, ntotcost)  
                        values(@lcnewuid, 'RADJ', 'PO', @lcadjno, @lcvendno, @lcitemno, @lcwarehouse, @lcbin,  
                          @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, 'SYSTEM', @ldcreate, @ldcancel, 0, 0, @lnmcround) 
                        /* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .end. */
                    end  
            end  
        /* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .begin. */    
        --fetch next from curpoctrs_ins  
        --into @lcvendno, @lcpono, @lcrcptno, @lccnlno, @lcwarehouse, @lcbin, @lclineitem, @lcitemno,   
        --  @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, @llstock, @lncnlqty, @lndiscrate,   
        --  --@lncrecamt, @lncdiscamt, @lnfcrecamt, @lnfcdiscamt, @lncost, @lnmcround  
        --  -- @lncrecamt, @lncdiscamt, @lnfcrecamt, @lnfcdiscamt, @lncost, @lnmcround, @llmultibin   /* .MS802 .10013691 .06/15/2011. */
        --  @lncrecamt, @lncdiscamt, @lnfcrecamt, @lnfcdiscamt, @lncost, @lnmcround, @llmultibin, @lcrcptrsuid   /* .MS901 .10015792 .01/14/2014. */
        fetch next from curpoctrs_ins  
        into @lcvendno, @lcpono, @lcrcptno, @lccnlno, @lcwarehouse, @lcbin, @lclineitem, @lcitemno,   
          @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, @llstock, @lncnlqty, @lndiscrate,   
          @lncrecamt, @lncdiscamt, @lnfcrecamt, @lnfcdiscamt, @lncost, @lnmcround, @llmultibin, @lcrcptrsuid,
          @ldcreate
		/* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .end. */              
    end   /* end of while for curpoctrs_ins */  
    close curpoctrs_ins  
    deallocate curpoctrs_ins  
end

/** ID: PO90003.01 Name: popord_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger popord_insert on popord
for insert
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return

    set xact_abort on
    declare @lcpono char(10), @lcpaycode char(10)
    declare curpopord_ins scroll cursor for select cpono, cpaycode from inserted
    open curpopord_ins
    fetch next from curpopord_ins into @lcpono, @lcpaycode
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
    begin
        if (select npaytype from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode) = 5
            update popord
            set ntermdisc = (select ntermdisc from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode),
              ndiscday = (select ndiscday from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode),
              ndueday = (select ndueday from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode)
            where cpono = @lcpono
        else
            update popord set ntermdisc = 0, ndiscday = 0, ndueday = 0 where cpono = @lcpono

        fetch next from curpopord_ins into @lcpono, @lcpaycode
    end   /* end of while for curpopord_ins */
    close curpopord_ins
    deallocate curpopord_ins
end

/** ID: PO90004.01 Name: popord_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger popord_update on popord
for update
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return

    set xact_abort on
    declare @lcpono char(10), @lcvendno char(10), @lcwarehouse char(10), @lcpaycode char(10),
      @lnquote smallint, @lndiscday integer, @lndueday integer, @lntermdisc numeric(6,2),
      @lnorderamt numeric(18,4), @lndiscamt numeric(18,4)

    declare curpopord_upd scroll cursor for select cpono, cvendno, cwarehouse, cpaycode, lquote,
      ndiscday, ndueday, ntermdisc, norderamt, ndiscamt from inserted
    open curpopord_upd
    fetch next from curpopord_upd into @lcpono, @lcvendno, @lcwarehouse, @lcpaycode, @lnquote,
      @lndiscday, @lndueday, @lntermdisc, @lnorderamt, @lndiscamt
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
    begin
        if update(lquote) and @lnquote = 0   
            begin
                declare @lnbaseqty numeric(16,4)
                update apvend
                set npoboamt = npoboamt + @lnorderamt - @lndiscamt
                where cvendno = @lcvendno
                declare @lcuid char(15), @lcitemno char(20), @lcspeccode1 char(10),
                  @lcspeccode2 char(10), @lnordqty numeric(16,4)
                declare curpoptrs_popord_upd scroll cursor for select cuid, citemno,
                  cspeccode1, cspeccode2, nordqty from poptrs where cpono = @lcpono and
                  citemno in (select citemno from icitem where citemno in
                  (select citemno from poptrs where cpono = @lcpono))
                open curpoptrs_popord_upd
                fetch next from curpoptrs_popord_upd into @lcuid, @lcitemno, @lcspeccode1,
                  @lcspeccode2, @lnordqty
                while @@fetch_status = 0   
                begin
                    execute vsp_ic_baseqty @ctable = 'poptrs', @cuid = @lcuid, @nqty =
                      @lnordqty, @nretvalue = @lnbaseqty output
                    update iciwhs
                    set nonorder = nonorder + @lnbaseqty
                    where citemno = @lcitemno and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse and
                      cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1 and cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2

                    fetch next from curpoptrs_popord_upd into @lcuid, @lcitemno,
                      @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, @lnordqty
                end   /* end of while for curpoptrs_popord_upd */
                close curpoptrs_popord_upd
                deallocate curpoptrs_popord_upd

            end   /* end of approve purchase quote */
        if update(cpaycode)
            if (select npaytype from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode) = 5
                update popord
                set ntermdisc = (select ntermdisc from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode),
                  ndiscday = (select ndiscday from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode),
                  ndueday = (select ndueday from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode)
                where cpono = @lcpono
            else
                update popord set ntermdisc = 0, ndiscday = 0, ndueday = 0
                where cpono = @lcpono

        if update(lvoid) and (select lquote from popord where cpono = @lcpono) = 1
            /* void purchase quote */
            begin
                delete from poptrs where cpono = @lcpono
                delete from potrmk where cpono = @lcpono
            end

        fetch next from curpopord_upd into @lcpono, @lcvendno, @lcwarehouse, @lcpaycode,
          @lnquote, @lndiscday, @lndueday, @lntermdisc, @lnorderamt, @lndiscamt
    end   /* end of while for curpopord_upd */
    close curpopord_upd
    deallocate curpopord_upd
end

/** ID: PO90005.02 Name: poptrs_insert_update_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/11/2015 **/
create trigger poptrs_insert_update_delete on poptrs
for insert, update, delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return

    set xact_abort on
    declare @lcpriorpono char(10), @lnamtdec integer
    select @lcpriorpono = ''
    select @lnamtdec = namtdec from cosyst

    declare @lcuid char(15), @lcpono char(10), @lcvendno char(10)

    if exists (select cpono from inserted)   /* add or change PO line item */
        declare curpoptrs_iud scroll cursor for select cuid, cpono, cvendno from inserted order
          by cpono
    else   /* cancel PO or delete PO line item */
        declare curpoptrs_iud scroll cursor for select cuid, cpono, cvendno from deleted order
          by cpono
    open curpoptrs_iud
    fetch next from curpoptrs_iud into @lcuid, @lcpono, @lcvendno
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
    begin
        if @lcpono <> @lcpriorpono
            begin
                select @lcpriorpono = @lcpono
                if exists (select cpono from poptrs where cpono = @lcpono and nordqty > nrecqty)
                    update popord set lnobo = 0 where cpono = @lcpono
                else   /* no backorder qty */
                    --if (select lvoid from popord where cpono = @lcpono) = 0
                    if (select lvoid from popord where cpono = @lcpono) <> 0    /* .MS902.SP2 .10016182 .03/11/2015. */
                        update popord set lnobo = 1 where cpono = @lcpono
            end

        if (select lquote from popord where cpono = @lcpono) = 0   /* Purchase Order */
            update apvend
            set npoboamt = npoboamt - isnull((select round((nordqty - nrecqty) * ncost, @lnamtdec) -
              round(round((nordqty - nrecqty) * ncost, @lnamtdec) * ndiscrate / 100, @lnamtdec)
              from deleted where cuid = @lcuid and nordqty > nrecqty), 0) +
              isnull((select round((nordqty - nrecqty) * ncost, @lnamtdec) -
              round(round((nordqty - nrecqty) * ncost, @lnamtdec) * ndiscrate / 100, @lnamtdec)
              from inserted where cuid = @lcuid and nordqty > nrecqty), 0)
            where cvendno = @lcvendno
        fetch next from curpoptrs_iud into @lcuid, @lcpono, @lcvendno
    end   /* end of while for curpoptrs_iud */
    close curpoptrs_iud
    deallocate curpoptrs_iud
end

/** ID: PO90007.04 Name: portrs_insert Owner: ZA ScriptDate: 11/21/2017 **/
CREATE trigger [dbo].[portrs_insert] on [dbo].[portrs]
for insert
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return

    set xact_abort on
    declare @lcpoptrs_cuid char(15), @lnnetcost numeric(16,4), @lnbasenetcost numeric(16,4),
      @lnbaserecqty numeric(16,4), @lnonorder numeric(16,4), @lnbaseonorder numeric(16,4),
      @lncosttype integer, @lctempuid char(15), @lnctr integer, @lcnewuid char(15), @lcglacc char(30),
      @lcreceive char(8), @lcfullname char(30), @lcrcpttrsuid char(15),
      @lnmultibin integer   /* .MS802 .10013691 .06/14/2011. */   

    declare @lcuid char(15), @lcpono char(10), @lcrcptno char(10), @lcvendno char(10),
      @lcwarehouse char(10), @lclineitem char(10), @lcitemno char(20), @lcspeccode1 char(10),
      @lcspeccode2 char(10), @lcmeasure char(10), @ldreceive datetime, @llstock smallint,
      @lndiscrate numeric(6,2), @lnrecamt numeric(18,4), @lndiscamt numeric(18,4),
      @lnfrecamt numeric(18,4), @lnfdiscamt numeric(18,4), @lnboqty numeric(16,4),
      @lnrecqty numeric(16,4), @lncost numeric(16,4), @lcbin char(10),
      @lnmcround numeric (18,4), @lciadjacc char(30), @lcadjuid char(15),
      @lcadjno char(10), @lctrsuid char(15),
      @lnftrsamt numeric(18,4), @lntrsamt numeric(18,4),
	  -- @llaccrue smallint   
	  @llaccrue smallint , @lntotalcost numeric(18,4), @lnnewcost numeric(18,4), @lntotalrecqty numeric(18,4),   /* .MS901 .10015799 .01/20/2014. */		  
	  @ldcreate datetime   /* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014. */ 
	  
	/* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .begin. */
    --declare curportrs_ins scroll cursor for select cuid, cpono, crcptno, cvendno, cwarehouse,
    --  clineitem, citemno, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cmeasure, dreceive, lstock, ndiscrate,
    --  --nrecamt, ndiscamt, nfrecamt, nfdiscamt, nboqty, nrecqty, ncost, cbin from inserted
    --  nrecamt, ndiscamt, nfrecamt, nfdiscamt, nboqty, nrecqty, ncost, cbin, lmultibin from inserted   /* .MS802 .10013691 .06/14/2011. */
    --open curportrs_ins
    --fetch next from curportrs_ins into @lcuid, @lcpono, @lcrcptno, @lcvendno, @lcwarehouse,
    --  @lclineitem, @lcitemno, @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, @lcmeasure, @ldreceive, @llstock,
    --  @lndiscrate, @lnrecamt, @lndiscamt, @lnfrecamt, @lnfdiscamt, @lnboqty, @lnrecqty, @lncost,
    --  --@lcbin
    --  @lcbin, @lnmultibin   /* .MS802 .10013691 .06/14/2011. */
      
    declare curportrs_ins scroll cursor for select cuid, cpono, crcptno, cvendno, cwarehouse,
      clineitem, citemno, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, cmeasure, dreceive, lstock, ndiscrate,
      nrecamt, ndiscamt, nfrecamt, nfdiscamt, nboqty, nrecqty, ncost, cbin, lmultibin,
      dcreate
      from inserted
    open curportrs_ins
    fetch next from curportrs_ins into @lcuid, @lcpono, @lcrcptno, @lcvendno, @lcwarehouse,
      @lclineitem, @lcitemno, @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, @lcmeasure, @ldreceive, @llstock,
      @lndiscrate, @lnrecamt, @lndiscamt, @lnfrecamt, @lnfdiscamt, @lnboqty, @lnrecqty, @lncost,
      @lcbin, @lnmultibin, @ldcreate
    /* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .end. */
      
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
    begin
        select @lcpoptrs_cuid = (select cuid from poptrs where cpono = @lcpono and clineitem = @lclineitem)
        update poptrs
        set nrecqty = nrecqty + @lnrecqty
        where cuid = @lcpoptrs_cuid

        select @lnmcround = 0   

        if @llstock = 1   /* stock item */
            begin
                /* .MS901 .10015790 .02/20/2014. .begin. */ 
--                select @lnnetcost = @lncost - round((@lndiscamt/@lnrecqty),(select namtdec from cosyst))   
                select @lnnetcost = round(@lncost * (1 - @lndiscrate / 100), (select ncodec from cosyst))
                /* .MS901 .10015790 .02/20/2014. .end. */ 

                select @lncosttype = ncosttype from icitem where citemno = @lcitemno
                execute vsp_ic_cost @ctable = 'poptrs', @cuid = @lcpoptrs_cuid,
                  @ncost = @lnnetcost, @bbase = 1, @nretvalue = @lnbasenetcost output
                if (select lupdonhand from icitem where citemno = @lcitemno) = 1
                    begin
                        execute vsp_ic_baseqty @ctable = 'poptrs', @cuid = @lcpoptrs_cuid,
                          @nqty = @lnrecqty, @nqtydec = -1, @nretvalue = @lnbaserecqty output
                        select @lnonorder = 0 -
                          case
                              when @lnboqty - @lnrecqty > 0 then @lnrecqty
                              else @lnboqty
                          end

                        execute vsp_ic_baseqty @ctable = 'poptrs', @cuid = @lcpoptrs_cuid,
                          @nqty = @lnonorder, @nqtydec = -1, @nretvalue = @lnbaseonorder output

                        select @lcreceive = convert(char(8), @ldreceive, 112)
                        if @lncosttype = 4 or (select llot from icitem where citemno = @lcitemno) = 1
                            update iciwhs
                            set nonorder = nonorder  + @lnbaseonorder
                            where citemno = @lcitemno and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse and
                              cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1 and cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2
                        else
                            begin       
                                execute vsp_am_settings @cvarname = 'cfullname', @cretvalue = @lcfullname output
                                select @lcrcpttrsuid = case when @lncosttype in (1, 5) then '' else @lcuid end 
                                /* .MS802 .10013691 .06/14/2011 .begin. */  
                                /*Do not call the vsp_icupditemonhand for a stock item that is set to recieve at multiple bins.*/
                                /*Item on hand updates are already handled at the Received Goods function.*/
                                
                                --execute vsp_ic_upditemonhand @citemno = @lcitemno,
                                --  @cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse, @cbin = @lcbin, @csernum = '',
                                --  @ckitno = '', @clotno = '', @nadjqty = @lnbaserecqty,
                                --  @ntrsqty = @lnbaseonorder, @ncost = @lnbasenetcost, @cmodule = 'PO',
                                --  @ctrsno = @lcpono, @ctrstype = 'PORG', @corigno = @lcvendno,
                                --  @dcreate = @ldreceive, @dtrs = @ldreceive, @centerby = @lcfullname,
                                --  @bfromfront = 0, @nretvalue = 0, @cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1,
                                --  @cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2, @crcpttrsuid = @lcrcpttrsuid   
                                if @lnmultibin = 0     
                                    begin
										/* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .begin. */ 
                                        --execute vsp_ic_upditemonhand @citemno = @lcitemno,
                                        --  @cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse, @cbin = @lcbin, @csernum = '',
                                        --  @ckitno = '', @clotno = '', @nadjqty = @lnbaserecqty,
                                        --  @ntrsqty = @lnbaseonorder, @ncost = @lnbasenetcost, @cmodule = 'PO',
                                        --  @ctrsno = @lcpono, @ctrstype = 'PORG', @corigno = @lcvendno,
                                        --  @dcreate = @ldreceive, @dtrs = @ldreceive, @centerby = @lcfullname,
                                        --  @bfromfront = 0, @nretvalue = 0, @cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1,
                                        --  @cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2, @crcpttrsuid = @lcrcpttrsuid  
                                        execute vsp_ic_upditemonhand @citemno = @lcitemno,
                                          @cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse, @cbin = @lcbin, @csernum = '',
                                          @ckitno = '', @clotno = '', @nadjqty = @lnbaserecqty,
                                          @ntrsqty = @lnbaseonorder, @ncost = @lnbasenetcost, @cmodule = 'PO',
                                          @ctrsno = @lcpono, @ctrstype = 'PORG', @corigno = @lcvendno,
                                          @dcreate = @ldcreate, @dtrs = @ldreceive, @centerby = @lcfullname,
                                          @bfromfront = 0, @nretvalue = 0, @cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1,
                                          @cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2, @crcpttrsuid = @lcrcpttrsuid    
                                        /* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .end. */ 
                                    end
                                /* .MS802 .10013691 .06/14/2011 .end. */  
                            end
                        /* Calculate rounding variance between PO and IC during receive goods */
			    /* .MS802 .10012891 .06/01/2011 .begin. */
--                        select @lnmcround = (@lnrecamt - @lndiscamt) - round(@lnbaserecqty * @lnbasenetcost, 2)
			    select @lnmcround = (@lnrecamt - @lndiscamt) - round(@lnbaserecqty * @lnbasenetcost, (select namtdec from cosyst))
			    /* .MS802 .10012891 .06/01/2011 .end. */
                    end
                else
                    begin
						
						/* .MS901 .10015799 .01/20/2014 .begin. */
						-- Calculate Average Item or S/N Average Items for Item that are lupdonhand = 1
						if (@lncosttype = 1 or @lncosttype = 5)
							begin
								
								select @lntotalcost = sum(ncost * nrecqty),  @lntotalrecqty = sum(nrecqty) from portrs 
									where citemno = @lcitemno and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse 
								
                                /* .MS901 .10015790 .02/20/2014. .begin. */ 
--								set @lnnewcost =  round(@lntotalcost/@lntotalrecqty, (select namtdec from cosyst))   
								set @lnnewcost =  round(@lntotalcost/@lntotalrecqty, (select ncodec from cosyst))   
                                /* .MS901 .10015790 .02/20/2014. .begin. */ 
								
								update iciwhs set ncost = @lnnewcost where citemno = @lcitemno and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse 
									and cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1 and cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2
								
							end
						/* .MS901 .10015799 .01/20/2014 .end. */
						
                        select @lnonorder = 0 -
                          case
                              when @lnboqty - @lnrecqty > 0 then @lnrecqty
                              else @lnboqty
                          end

                        execute vsp_ic_baseqty @ctable = 'poptrs', @cuid = @lcpoptrs_cuid,
                          @nqty = @lnonorder, @nqtydec = -1, @nretvalue = @lnbaseonorder output

                        update iciwhs
                        set nonorder = case when nonorder + @lnbaseonorder > 0
                          then nonorder + @lnbaseonorder else 0 end
                        where citemno = @lcitemno and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse and cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1 and cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2
                    end

                if @ldreceive >= (select isnull(dlastrecv, '') from iciwhs where citemno =
                  @lcitemno and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse and cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1 and
                  cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2)
                    update iciwhs
                    set dlastrecv = @ldreceive, nlrecvcost = @lnbasenetcost
                    where citemno = @lcitemno and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse and
                      cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1 and cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2
            end   /* stock item */
        if (select lmatch from popord where cpono = @lcpono) = 1    
            begin
				execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcnewuid output, @bfromfront = 0
                select @lnftrsamt = @lnfrecamt - @lnfdiscamt,
                  @lntrsamt = @lnrecamt - @lndiscamt - @lnmcround

				select @llaccrue = laccrue from popord where cpono = @lcpono   
		        if @llaccrue = 1   
				 begin     
					declare @cstdvaracc char(30), @nstdcost numeric(16,4), @lkititem smallint, @lupdonhand smallint 
					select @cstdvaracc = cstdvaracc from icsyst
					select @nstdcost = nstdcost, @lkititem = lkititem, @lupdonhand = lupdonhand from icitem where citemno = @lcitemno
					if @lkititem = 0 and @lupdonhand = 1 and @nstdcost <> round(@lncost,2)
						begin
							declare @lnftrsamt1 numeric(16,4), @lntrsamt1 numeric(16,4),
								@lnftrsamt2 numeric(16,4), @lntrsamt2 numeric(16,4),
								@lcnewuid1 char(15)
								 select @lnftrsamt1 = (@lnrecqty * @nstdcost) - @lnfdiscamt, 
									@lntrsamt1 = (@lnrecqty * @nstdcost) - @lndiscamt - @lnmcround,
									@lnftrsamt2 = (@lnrecqty * (round(@lncost,2)-@nstdcost)) - @lnfdiscamt, 
									@lntrsamt2 = (@lnrecqty * (round(@lncost,2)-@nstdcost)) - @lndiscamt - @lnmcround					
								  execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcnewuid1 output, @bfromfront = 0 	 							
								  select @lcglacc = (select crefacct from poptrs where citemno = @lcitemno  
									   and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse and cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1 and  
									   cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2 and cpono = @lcpono and clineitem = @lclineitem)       
								       
								  insert into podist (cuid, cpono, crcptno, cvendno,  
									clineitem, cglacc, ctrs, dtrs, nfamount, namount, nmcround)  
								  values (@lcnewuid, @lcpono, @lcrcptno, @lcvendno,  
									@lclineitem, @lcglacc, 'I', @ldreceive, @lnftrsamt1, @lntrsamt1, @lnmcround)
				                   
								 insert into podist (cuid, cpono, crcptno, cvendno,  
									clineitem, cglacc, ctrs, dtrs, nfamount, namount, nmcround)  
								  values (@lcnewuid1, @lcpono, @lcrcptno, @lcvendno,  
									@lclineitem, @cstdvaracc, 'I', @ldreceive, @lnftrsamt2, @lntrsamt2, @lnmcround)
						   update iciwhs set ncost = @nstdcost, ntotcost = round(nonhand * @nstdcost,4)
							where citemno = @lcitemno and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse
							 and cSpecCode1 = @lcspeccode1 and cSpecCode2 = @lcspeccode2    
					   end                 
					else
						begin 
						 select @lcglacc = (select crefacct from poptrs where citemno = @lcitemno  
						   and cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse and cspeccode1 = @lcspeccode1 and  
						   cspeccode2 = @lcspeccode2 and cpono = @lcpono and clineitem = @lclineitem)  
			               
						insert into podist (cuid, cpono, crcptno, cvendno,  
						  clineitem, cglacc, ctrs, dtrs, nfamount, namount, nmcround)  
						values (@lcnewuid, @lcpono, @lcrcptno, @lcvendno,  
						  @lclineitem, @lcglacc, 'I', @ldreceive, @lnftrsamt, @lntrsamt, @lnmcround) 
					 end
				 end

                -- the ntrsamt to be passed to poaccq should be ntrsamt+nmcround 
                -- the NMCROUND in PODIST is the amt for the cost adjustment so that inventory matches with the PO receipt
                -- for POACCQ it is not relevant how much goes into inventory since this is only a reference to reverse the suspended liability.
                -- the POACCQ.NTRSAMT should match what was put into inventory which is PODIST.NTRSAMT + PODIST.NMCROUND
                select @lntrsamt = @lntrsamt + @lnmcround
                  
                execute vsp_po_accrue_qty @cuid = @lcnewuid, @cvendno = @lcvendno, @cpono = @lcpono,
                  @crcptno = @lcrcptno, @cwarehouse = @lcwarehouse, @clineitem = @lclineitem, 
                  @ctype = 'ITEM', @dtrs = @ldreceive, @ntrsqty = @lnrecqty,
                  @nftrsamt = @lnftrsamt, @ntrsamt = @lntrsamt,
				  @laccrue = @llaccrue   

                if @lnmcround <> 0
                  begin
                    /* Write to iciadj so it can be seen from inventory adjustment report */
                    /* Mark as 'transferred', rounding variance will be transferred with receive goods */
                    select @lciadjacc = ciadjacc from arsyst
                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcadjuid output, @bfromfront = 0
                    execute vsp_am_getnewdocno @csystfield = 'cadjno', @cautodocno = '',
                      @calias = 'iciadj/', @ckeyfield = 'cadjno', @ckeyvalue = '', @bfromfront = 0,
                      @nkeylength = 10, @csystalias = 'icsyst', @bfromio = 0, @cdocno = @lcadjno  output

                    insert into iciadj(cuid, cadjno, cmodule, ctogl, citemno, cwarehouse, 
                      cbin, cspeccode1, cspeccode2, centerby, cadjacc, cremark, 
                      ctrstype, dadjust, ntotcost)
                    values(@lcadjuid, @lcadjno, 'PO', 'X', @lcitemno, @lcwarehouse, 
                      @lcbin, @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, 'SYSTEM', @lciadjacc, 'Receive Goods - Receipt #' + @lcrcptno,
                      'RADJ', @ldreceive, @lnmcround)

                    /* Write to ictrsn with new type 'RADJ' - rounding adjustment */
                    /* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .begin. */ 
                    --execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lctrsuid output, @bfromfront = 0
                    --insert into ictrsn(cuid, ctrstype, cmodule, ctrsno, corigno, citemno, cwarehouse, cbin,
                    --  cspeccode1, cspeccode2, centerby, dcreate, dtrs, nqty, ncost, ntotcost)
                    --  values(@lctrsuid, 'RADJ', 'PO', @lcadjno, @lcvendno, @lcitemno, @lcwarehouse, @lcbin,
                    --  @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, 'SYSTEM', @ldreceive, @ldreceive, 0, 0, @lnmcround)                    
                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lctrsuid output, @bfromfront = 0
                    insert into ictrsn(cuid, ctrstype, cmodule, ctrsno, corigno, citemno, cwarehouse, cbin,
                      cspeccode1, cspeccode2, centerby, dcreate, dtrs, nqty, ncost, ntotcost)
                      values(@lctrsuid, 'RADJ', 'PO', @lcadjno, @lcvendno, @lcitemno, @lcwarehouse, @lcbin,
                      @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, 'SYSTEM', @ldcreate, @ldreceive, 0, 0, @lnmcround)
                    /* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .end. */ 
                  end
            end
        /* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .begin. */ 
        --fetch next from curportrs_ins into @lcuid, @lcpono, @lcrcptno, @lcvendno,
        --  @lcwarehouse, @lclineitem, @lcitemno, @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, @lcmeasure,
        --  @ldreceive, @llstock, @lndiscrate, @lnrecamt, @lndiscamt, @lnfrecamt,
        --  --@lnfdiscamt, @lnboqty, @lnrecqty, @lncost, @lcbin
        --  @lnfdiscamt, @lnboqty, @lnrecqty, @lncost, @lcbin, @lnmultibin   /* .MS802 .10013691 .06/14/2011. */
        
        fetch next from curportrs_ins into @lcuid, @lcpono, @lcrcptno, @lcvendno,
          @lcwarehouse, @lclineitem, @lcitemno, @lcspeccode1, @lcspeccode2, @lcmeasure,
          @ldreceive, @llstock, @lndiscrate, @lnrecamt, @lndiscamt, @lnfrecamt,
          @lnfdiscamt, @lnboqty, @lnrecqty, @lncost, @lcbin, @lnmultibin, @ldcreate
        /* .MS902 .10016131 .09/03/2014 .end. */ 
    end   /* end of while for curportrs_ins */
    close curportrs_ins
    deallocate curportrs_ins
end

/** ID: PR90001.01 Name: prdeds_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger prdeds_delete
on prdeds for delete
as
    begin
        if exists(select 1 from cosyst where lexcl = 1)
            return
        delete from prdedl where cdedcode+cstate in (select cdedcode+cstate from deleted)
    end

/** ID: PR90002.01 Name: prdedu_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger prdedu_delete ON prdedu
for delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return

    set xact_abort on
    declare @lcdedcode char(10)
    select @lcdedcode = deleted.cdedcode from deleted
    delete from prdeda where cdedcode = @lcdedcode
end

/** ID: PR90003.02 Name: prempy_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 08/06/2014 **/
create trigger prempy_delete on prempy
for delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    set xact_abort on

    /* delete earnings */
    delete from preern from deleted
      where preern.cempno = deleted.cempno
    
    /* .MS901 .10012751 .08/06/2014 .begin. */
    /* delete earnings gl account */
    delete from preerg from deleted
      where preerg.cempno = deleted.cempno
    /* .MS901 .10012751 .08/06/2014 .end. */

    /* delete paid leaves */
    delete from prelve from deleted
      where prelve.cempno = deleted.cempno

    /* delete electronic payment */
    delete from prempe from deleted
      where prempe.cempno = deleted.cempno

    /* delete deductions */
    delete from prempd from deleted
      where prempd.cempno = deleted.cempno

    /* delete federal w/h */
    delete from prempf from deleted
      where prempf.cempno = deleted.cempno

    /* delete state w/h */
    delete from premps from deleted
      where premps.cempno = deleted.cempno

    /* delete local w/h */
    delete from prempl from deleted
      where prempl.cempno = deleted.cempno

    /* delete notes */
    delete from prenot from deleted
      where prenot.cempno = deleted.cempno

    /* delete salary history */
    delete from prehst from deleted
      where prehst.cempno = deleted.cempno

	/* For those already transferred to GL, needs to create an entry as adjustment */
	declare @lcuid char(15), @lctrsno char(10), @lcearncode char(10), 
		@lcleavecode char(10), @lctier char(10), @ldtrs datetime, 
		@lnhours numeric(16,2), @lnamount numeric(18,4), 
		@lcliabacc char(20), @lcchgacc char(20), @lcempno char(10)
	
	declare @ldpostdate datetime
	select @ldpostdate = dterminate from deleted
	
    declare curprtlve scroll cursor for 
    select prtlve.ctrsno, prtlve.cearncode, prtlve.cleavecode, prtlve.ctier,
		prtlve.dtrs, prtlve.nhours, prtlve.namount, prleav.cliabacc, prleav.cchgacc, prtlve.cempno
    from prtlve, deleted, prleav
    where prtlve.cempno = deleted.cempno and prtlve.ctype = 'B' and prtlve.ctogl <> ' '
		and prtlve.cleavecode = prleav.cleavecode

    open curprtlve
    fetch next from curprtlve into @lctrsno, @lcearncode, @lcleavecode, @lctier,
		@ldtrs, @lnhours, @lnamount, @lcliabacc, @lcchgacc, @lcempno
    while @@fetch_status = 0
    begin
        execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output, @bfromfront = 0
        
        /* Post as adjustment to the posted beginning balance that are transferred to offset it */
		insert into prculv(cuid, ctype, cempno, cearncode, cleavecode,
			cremark, cwcgrp, cwccode, cliabacc,
			cchgacc, ctogl, dpost, nhours, nrate, namount)
		values(@lcuid, 'J', @lcempno, @lcearncode, @lcleavecode, 
			'Begin Balance Adjustment ' + @lcempno, '', '', @lcliabacc, 
--			@lcchgacc, ' ', @ldpostdate, 0 - @lnhours, round(@lnamount / @lnhours, 2), 0-@lnamount)
			@lcchgacc, ' ', @ldpostdate, 0 - @lnhours, case when @lnhours = 0 then @lnamount else round(@lnamount / @lnhours, 2) end, 0-@lnamount)   /* .PR803 .10014855 .06/19/2012. */

        fetch next from curprtlve into @lctrsno, @lcearncode, @lcleavecode, @lctier,
			@ldtrs, @lnhours, @lnamount, @lcliabacc, @lcchgacc, @lcempno
    end
    close curprtlve
    deallocate curprtlve

    /* delete beginning balance or carry over transactions */
    delete from prtlve from deleted
      where prtlve.cempno = deleted.cempno and (prtlve.ctype = 'B' or prtlve.ctype = 'O')
end

/** ID: PR90093.01  Name: pritcs_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 10/27/2014 **/
create trigger pritcs_delete on pritcs
for delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return
    set xact_abort on

    /* delete column definition */
    delete from pricdf from deleted
      where pricdf.cimpcode = deleted.cimpcode

    /* delete column mapping */
    delete from pricmc from deleted
      where pricmc.cimpcode = deleted.cimpcode
end

/** ID: PR90004.01 Name: prleav_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger prleav_delete
on prleav for delete
as
    begin
        if exists(select 1 from cosyst where lexcl = 1)
            return
        delete from prlvet where cleavecode = (select cleavecode from deleted)
    end

/** ID: PR90005.01 Name: prleav_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger prleav_update on prleav
for update
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return

    if update(camethod)
        begin
            declare @lcleavecode char(10)
            declare curprleav_upd scroll cursor for select cleavecode 
            from inserted where inserted.camethod = 'B'

            open curprleav_upd
            fetch next from curprleav_upd into @lcleavecode
            while @@fetch_status = 0
            begin
                /* this will fire the prlvet update trigger */
                update prlvet set nhrsaccr = nhrsaccr where cleavecode = @lcleavecode

                fetch next from curprleav_upd into @lcleavecode
            end

            close curprleav_upd
            deallocate curprleav_upd
        end
end

/** ID: PR90006.02 Name: prlvet_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 11/17/2014 **/
create trigger prlvet_update on prlvet
for update
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return

    /* do not update if not update at beginning */
    if not exists(select prleav.cleavecode from prleav, inserted where prleav.camethod = 'B' and 
            prleav.cleavecode = inserted.cleavecode)
        return

    if update(nhrsaccr)
        begin
			/* For those already transferred to GL, needs to create an entry as adjustment */
			declare @lcuid char(15), @lctrsno char(10), @lcearncode char(10), 
				@ldtrs datetime, @lnhours numeric(16,2), @lnamount numeric(18,4), 
				@lcliabacc char(20), @lcchgacc char(20), @lcempno char(10), 
				@lnrate numeric(18,4), @ldlastupd datetime, @lctogl char(1)

            declare @lcleavecode char(10), @lctier char(10), @lnhrsaccr numeric(8,4)
            declare curprlvet_upd scroll cursor for select cleavecode, ctier, nhrsaccr, 
				dlastupd
				from inserted

            open curprlvet_upd
            fetch next from curprlvet_upd into @lcleavecode, @lctier, @lnhrsaccr, 
				@ldlastupd
            while @@fetch_status = 0
            begin
				/* Get the accrued at beginning of year that are already transferered to GL */
				/* we need to post a reversal entries as adjustment */
				declare curprtlve scroll cursor for 
				select prtlve.ctrsno, prtlve.cearncode,
					prtlve.dtrs, prtlve.nhours, prtlve.namount, prleav.cliabacc, prleav.cchgacc, 
					prtlve.cempno, prtlve.ctogl
				from prtlve, prleav, prsyst, prelve
				where prtlve.cleavecode = prleav.cleavecode 
					and prtlve.cleavecode = @lcleavecode and prtlve.ctype = 'B' and 
                    --convert(char(4), year(prtlve.dtrs)) = prsyst.cyear and   /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014. */
					prtlve.nhours <> @lnhrsaccr and
                    prtlve.cempno = prelve.cempno and prtlve.cleavecode = prelve.cleavecode and
                    /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .begin. */
                    --prelve.cyear = prsyst.cyear and prelve.ctier = @lctier
                    prelve.lcurrent = 1 and prelve.ctier = @lctier and 
                    prtlve.dtrs between prelve.dbegin and prelve.dend
                    /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .end. */

				open curprtlve
				fetch next from curprtlve into @lctrsno, @lcearncode, 
					@ldtrs, @lnhours, @lnamount, @lcliabacc, @lcchgacc, @lcempno, @lctogl
				while @@fetch_status = 0
				begin
					if @lctogl = ' '
						begin
							/* Update the accrue at beginning transactions that were not transferred to gl */
							execute vsp_pr_getempyrate @cempno = @lcempno, @cretvalue = @lnrate output
							update prtlve set nhours = @lnhrsaccr, namount = round(@lnhrsaccr * @lnrate, 2)
							from prtlve, prsyst, prelve
							where prtlve.cleavecode = @lcleavecode and prtlve.ctype = 'B' and 
								--convert(char(4), year(prtlve.dtrs)) = prsyst.cyear and   /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014. */
								prtlve.cempno = @lcempno and prtlve.cleavecode = prelve.cleavecode and 
								/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .begin. */
								--prelve.cempno = prtlve.cempno and prelve.cyear = prsyst.cyear and prelve.ctier = @lctier
								prelve.cempno = prtlve.cempno and  prelve.lcurrent = 1 and prelve.ctier = @lctier and
								prtlve.dtrs between prelve.dbegin and prelve.dend
								/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .end. */
						end
					else
						begin
							/* Update the accrue at beginning transactions that were transferred to gl */
							/* Post a negative adjustment to offset it */
							select @lnrate = round(@lnamount / @lnhours, 2)
							execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output, @bfromfront = 0
							insert into prculv(cuid, ctype, cempno, cearncode, cleavecode,
								cremark, cwcgrp, cwccode, cliabacc,
								cchgacc, ctogl, dpost, nhours, nrate, namount)
							values(@lcuid, 'J', @lcempno, @lcearncode, @lcleavecode, 
								'Begin Balance Adjustment ' + @lcempno, '', '', @lcliabacc, 
								@lcchgacc, ' ', @ldlastupd, 0 - @lnhours, @lnrate, 0 - @lnamount)
								
							/* Post the new hours for the accrue at the beginning of year using the latest employee rate */
							execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output, @bfromfront = 0
							execute vsp_pr_getempyrate @cempno = @lcempno, @cretvalue = @lnrate output
							insert into prculv(cuid, ctype, cempno, cearncode, cleavecode,
								cremark, cwcgrp, cwccode, cliabacc,
								cchgacc, ctogl, dpost, nhours, nrate, namount)
							values(@lcuid, 'J', @lcempno, @lcearncode, @lcleavecode, 
								'Begin Balance Adjustment ' + @lcempno, '', '', @lcliabacc, 
								@lcchgacc, ' ', @ldlastupd, @lnhrsaccr, @lnrate, round(@lnhrsaccr * @lnrate, 2))
								
							/* Update the accrue at beginning transactions that were posted using each employee's rate */
							update prtlve set nhours = @lnhrsaccr, namount = round(@lnhrsaccr * @lnrate, 2)
							from prtlve, prsyst, prelve
							where prtlve.cleavecode = @lcleavecode and prtlve.ctype = 'B' and 
								--convert(char(4), year(prtlve.dtrs)) = prsyst.cyear and   /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014. */
								prtlve.cempno = @lcempno and prtlve.cleavecode = @lcleavecode and
								/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .begin. */
								--prelve.cempno = prtlve.cempno and prelve.cyear = prsyst.cyear and prelve.ctier = @lctier
								prelve.cempno = prtlve.cempno and  prelve.lcurrent = 1 and prelve.ctier = @lctier and
								prtlve.dtrs between prelve.dbegin and prelve.dend
								/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .end. */
						end

					fetch next from curprtlve into @lctrsno, @lcearncode, 
						@ldtrs, @lnhours, @lnamount, @lcliabacc, @lcchgacc, @lcempno, @lctogl
				end
				close curprtlve
				deallocate curprtlve

				/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .begin. */
                --/* update the employee leave ytd, set to zero the 1st qtr before recalculate */
                --update prelve set nqtrahr1 = 0
                --from prelve, prsyst
                --where cleavecode = @lcleavecode and ctier = @lctier and 
                --    --prelve.cyear = prsyst.cyear
                --    prelve.lcurrent = 1   /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014. */

                --/* update the 1st quarter only */
                --update prelve set nqtrahr1 = nqtrahr1 + prtlve.nhours
                --from prelve, prsyst, prtlve
                --where prelve.cleavecode = @lcleavecode and prelve.ctier = @lctier and 
                --    --prelve.cyear = prsyst.cyear and 
                --    prelve.lcurrent = 1 and   /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014. */
                --    prtlve.cempno = prelve.cempno and prtlve.cleavecode = prelve.cleavecode and 
                --    convert(char(4), year(prtlve.dtrs)) = prsyst.cyear and
                --    (convert(char(1), (month(prtlve.dtrs)+2)/3) = '1' or prtlve.ctype = 'B')
                execute vsp_pr_updleaveadj
                /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .end. */                    

                fetch next from curprlvet_upd into @lcleavecode, @lctier, @lnhrsaccr, 
					@ldlastupd
            end

            close curprlvet_upd
            deallocate curprlvet_upd
        end
end

/** ID: PR90007.01 Name: prmisc_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger prmisc_delete on prmisc
for delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return

    /* delete the prtlve incase it's adjustment */
    delete prtlve from prtlve, deleted
    where prtlve.cempno = deleted.cempno and prtlve.ctrsno = deleted.clineitem and 
        prtlve.cleavecode = prtlve.cleavecode 
end

/** ID: PR90008.01 Name: prtcrd_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger prtcrd_delete on prtcrd
for delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    set xact_abort on
    delete from prpwkp from deleted
      where prpwkp.ctcno = deleted.ctcno

    delete from prtcer from deleted
      where prtcer.ctcno = deleted.ctcno
    delete from prtceg from deleted
      where prtceg.ctcno = deleted.ctcno
end

/** ID: PR90009.01 Name: prtcrd_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger prtcrd_update on prtcrd
for update, insert
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return

    if update(ctrsno)
        begin
            declare @lctrsno char(10), @lctcno char(10)

            declare curprtcrd_upd scroll cursor for select ctrsno, ctcno
            from inserted

            open curprtcrd_upd
            fetch next from curprtcrd_upd into @lctrsno, @lctcno
            while @@fetch_status = 0
            begin
                /* update piece work */
                update prpwkp set ctrsno = @lctrsno where ctcno = @lctcno

                fetch next from curprtcrd_upd into @lctrsno, @lctcno
            end

            close curprtcrd_upd
            deallocate curprtcrd_upd
        end
end

/** ID: PR90010.02 Name: prtlve_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 11/17/2014 **/      
create trigger prtlve_delete on prtlve      
for delete      
as      
begin     
	/* never fire: already handled in PRG */ 
    --if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */   /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014. */
    return
      
    declare @lcleavecode char(10), @lcempno char(10), @ldtrs datetime, @lnhrs numeric(8,2)      
    declare @lcquarter char(1), @lcsqlcmd varchar(2000)      
    declare curprtlve_del scroll cursor for select cleavecode, cempno, dtrs, nhours      
    from deleted where deleted.ctype = 'J' or deleted.ctype = 'C'   
      
    open curprtlve_del      
    fetch next from curprtlve_del into @lcleavecode, @lcempno, @ldtrs, @lnhrs  
    while @@fetch_status = 0      
    begin      
        /* update the prelve */      
        select @lcquarter = convert(char(1), (month(@ldtrs)+2)/3)      
      
        if @lnhrs > 0      
            select @lcsqlcmd = "update prelve set nqtrahr" + @lcquarter +       
                " = nqtrahr" + @lcquarter + " - " + convert(varchar(10), @lnhrs) +       
                " from prelve, prsyst " +       
                "where prelve.cempno = '" + @lcempno + "' and prelve.cleavecode = '" + @lcleavecode + "'"      
        else      
            select @lcsqlcmd = "update prelve set nqtruhr" + @lcquarter +       
                " = nqtruhr" + @lcquarter + " - " + convert(varchar(10), abs(@lnhrs)) +       
                " from prelve, prsyst " +       
                "where prelve.cempno = '" + @lcempno + "' and prelve.cleavecode = '" + @lcleavecode + "'"         
      
        execute(@lcsqlcmd)      
      
        fetch next from curprtlve_del into @lcleavecode, @lcempno, @ldtrs, @lnhrs      
    end      
      
    close curprtlve_del    
    deallocate curprtlve_del      
end

/** ID: PR90011.02 Name: prtlve_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 11/17/2014 **/
create trigger prtlve_insert on prtlve
for insert
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return

    declare @lcleavecode char(10), @lcempno char(10), @ldtrs datetime, @lnhrs numeric(8,2), @lcpryear char(4), 
		/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .begin. */
		@lctrsyear char(4), @lnhours numeric(18,4), @lncohr numeric(18,4), @lcuid char(15), @ldbegin datetime, 
		@lctier char(10), @lnmaxleave numeric(18,4), @lnmaxco numeric(18,4), @lncoamt numeric(18,4), @lnamount numeric(18,4)
		/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .end. */
    declare @lcquarter char(1), @lcsqlcmd varchar(2000)
    --declare curprtlve_ins scroll cursor for select cleavecode, cempno, dtrs, nhours
    declare curprtlve_ins scroll cursor for select cleavecode, cempno, dtrs, nhours, namount   /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014. */
    from inserted where inserted.ctype = 'J' or inserted.ctype = 'C' 

	--select @lcpryear = cyear from prsyst   /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014. */

    open curprtlve_ins
    --fetch next from curprtlve_ins into @lcleavecode, @lcempno, @ldtrs, @lnhrs
    fetch next from curprtlve_ins into @lcleavecode, @lcempno, @ldtrs, @lnhrs, @lnamount   /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014. */
    while @@fetch_status = 0
    begin
		/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .begin. */
		select @lcpryear = cyear from prelve
		where cempno = @lcempno and cleavecode = @lcleavecode and 
			lcurrent = 1

		select @lctrsyear = cyear from prelve 
		where cempno = @lcempno and cleavecode = @lcleavecode and 
			@ldtrs between dbegin and dend
		/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .end. */
    
        /* update the prelve */
        select @lcquarter = convert(char(1), (month(@ldtrs)+2)/3)

        if @lnhrs > 0
            select @lcsqlcmd = "update prelve set nqtrahr" + @lcquarter + 
                " = nqtrahr" + @lcquarter + " + " + convert(varchar(10), @lnhrs) + 
                " from prelve " + 
                "where prelve.cempno = '" + @lcempno + "' and prelve.cleavecode = '" + @lcleavecode + "'"
        else
            select @lcsqlcmd = "update prelve set nqtruhr" + @lcquarter + 
                " = nqtruhr" + @lcquarter + " + " + convert(varchar(10), abs(@lnhrs)) + 
                " from prelve " + 
                "where prelve.cempno = '" + @lcempno + "' and prelve.cleavecode = '" + @lcleavecode + "'"

        --select @lcsqlcmd = @lcsqlcmd + " and prelve.cyear = '" + cast(year(@ldtrs) as char(4)) + "'" 
		select @lcsqlcmd = @lcsqlcmd + " and prelve.cyear = '" + @lctrsyear + "'"   /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014. */

        execute(@lcsqlcmd)
        --if  year(@ldtrs) < @lcpryear
        if  @lctrsyear < @lcpryear   /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014. */
			begin
				select @lnhours = ncohr, @ldbegin = dbegin, @lctier = ctier from prelve 
				where cleavecode = @lcleavecode and cyear = @lcpryear and cempno = @lcempno
				
				/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .begin. */
				/* prior year balance */
				select @lncohr = ncohr + ((nqtrahr1+nqtrahr2+nqtrahr3+nqtrahr4) - 
					(nqtruhr1+nqtruhr2+nqtruhr3+nqtruhr4))
				from prelve 
				where cleavecode = @lcleavecode and cyear = @lctrsyear and cempno = @lcempno
				
				select @lnmaxco = nmaxco
					from prlvet inner join prelve on prlvet.cleavecode = prelve.cleavecode 
					and prlvet.ctier = prelve.ctier and prelve.cempno = @lcempno 
					and prlvet.cleavecode = @lcleavecode and cyear = @lctrsyear
									
				select @lnmaxleave = nmaxleav
					from prlvet inner join prelve on prlvet.cleavecode = prelve.cleavecode 
					and prlvet.ctier = prelve.ctier and prelve.cempno = @lcempno 
					and prlvet.cleavecode = @lcleavecode and cyear = @lcpryear
				/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .end. */
				
				update prelve 
				set ncohr = 
					case 
						/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .begin. */
						---- adjustment causes total leaves to exceed maximum; check this first before checking total carryover
						--when ncohr + ((nqtrahr1+nqtrahr2+nqtrahr3+nqtrahr4) - (nqtruhr1+nqtruhr2+nqtruhr3+nqtruhr4)) + @lnhrs 
						--  > (select nmaxleav from prlvet inner join prelve on prlvet.cleavecode = prelve.cleavecode 
						--		and prlvet.ctier = prelve.ctier and prelve.cempno = @lcempno and prlvet.cleavecode = @lcleavecode and cyear = @lcpryear)
						--	then (select nmaxleav from prlvet inner join prelve on prlvet.cleavecode = prelve.cleavecode 
						--		and prlvet.ctier = prelve.ctier  and prelve.cempno = @lcempno and prlvet.cleavecode = @lcleavecode and cyear = @lcpryear)
						---- total carryover is exceeded
						--when ncohr + @lnhrs > (select nmaxco from prlvet inner join prelve on prlvet.cleavecode = prelve.cleavecode 
						--		and prlvet.ctier = prelve.ctier and prelve.cempno = @lcempno and prlvet.cleavecode = @lcleavecode and cyear = @lcpryear)
						--	then (select nmaxco from prlvet inner join prelve on prlvet.cleavecode = prelve.cleavecode 
						--		and prlvet.ctier = prelve.ctier  and prelve.cempno = @lcempno and prlvet.cleavecode = @lcleavecode and cyear = @lcpryear)
						--when ncohr + @lnhrs < 0
						--	then 0
						--else ncohr + @lnhrs
						when ncohr + @lnhrs < 0
							then 0
						when @lncohr > @lnmaxco then 
							case when @lnmaxco + ((nqtrahr1+nqtrahr2+nqtrahr3+nqtrahr4) - (nqtruhr1+nqtruhr2+nqtruhr3+nqtruhr4)) > @lnmaxleave then 
								@lnmaxleave - ((nqtrahr1+nqtrahr2+nqtrahr3+nqtrahr4) - (nqtruhr1+nqtruhr2+nqtruhr3+nqtruhr4))
								else @lnmaxco end
						else @lncohr
						/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .end. */
					end,
					ncoamt = ncoamt + @lnamount   /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014. */
				where cleavecode = @lcleavecode and cyear = @lcpryear and cempno = @lcempno
						
				/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .begin. */
				--select @lncohr = ncohr from prelve 
				--where cleavecode = @lcleavecode and cyear = @lcpryear and cempno = @lcempno
				
				select @lnmaxco = nmaxco
					from prlvet inner join prelve on prlvet.cleavecode = prelve.cleavecode 
					and prlvet.ctier = prelve.ctier and prelve.cempno = @lcempno 
					and prlvet.cleavecode = @lcleavecode and cyear = @lcpryear

				if exists(select 1 from prtlve where cempno = @lcempno and cleavecode = @lcleavecode 
					and ctype = 'O' and dtrs = @ldbegin)
					update prtlve set nhours = case when @lncohr - @lnmaxco < 0 then 0 else @lncohr - @lnmaxco end
					where cempno = @lcempno and cleavecode = @lcleavecode 
						and ctype = 'O' and dtrs = @ldbegin
				else				
					if @lncohr > @lnmaxco
						begin
							execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output  
							insert into prtlve(cuid, ctrsno, cempno, cearncode, cleavecode, 
								ctier, ctype, ctogl, dtrs, nhours, namount) 
							values(@lcuid, 'B000000001', @lcempno, 'CARRYFWD', @lcleavecode, 
								@lctier, 'O', 'X', @ldbegin, @lncohr - @lnmaxco, 0)
						end
				/* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014 .end. */
			end

        --fetch next from curprtlve_ins into @lcleavecode, @lcempno, @ldtrs, @lnhrs
        fetch next from curprtlve_ins into @lcleavecode, @lcempno, @ldtrs, @lnhrs, @lnamount   /* .MS902 .10010631 .11/17/2014. */
    end

    close curprtlve_ins
    deallocate curprtlve_ins
end

/** ID: PR90012.02 Name: prtrst_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 12/02/2014 **/
create trigger prtrst_delete on prtrst
for delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
        return

    declare @lctrsno char(10), @lcpaytype char(2), @lctogl char(1), 
        @lcbankno char(10), @lcchkno char(10), @ldclosed datetime

    declare curprtrst_del scroll cursor for select ctrsno, cpaytype, ctogl, cbankno, cchkno,
      dclosed from deleted

    open curprtrst_del
    fetch next from curprtrst_del into @lctrsno, @lcpaytype, @lctogl, @lcbankno, @lcchkno, @ldclosed
    while @@fetch_status = 0
    begin
        /* unapplied payroll */
        /* clear time card */
        if @lcpaytype = 'TC'
            update prtcrd set ctrsno = '' where ctrsno = @lctrsno and cchkno = ''

        /* clear additional payment */
        if @lcpaytype = 'AD' or @lcpaytype = 'IC'
            update prmisc set ctrsno = '' where ctrsno = @lctrsno and cchkno = ''

        if @lctogl = '' and @ldclosed is null
            begin
                /* not yet transferred, so delete it */
                delete from prtrsd where ctrsno = @lctrsno
                delete from prtrss where ctrsno = @lctrsno
                delete from prtrsl where ctrsno = @lctrsno
                delete from prtern where ctrsno = @lctrsno
                delete from prtlve where ctrsno = @lctrsno
                delete from prdist where ctrsno = @lctrsno
                delete from prmtch where ctrsno = @lctrsno
                delete from prdmatc where ctrsno = @lctrsno   /* .MS902 .10015955 .12/02/2014. */  
            end

        fetch next from curprtrst_del into @lctrsno, @lcpaytype, @lctogl, @lcbankno, @lcchkno, @ldclosed
    end
    close curprtrst_del
    deallocate curprtrst_del
end

/** ID: RA90020.01 Name: racord_insert_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/    
create trigger racord_insert_update on racord  
for insert, update  
as  
begin  
    /* renamed trigger to include trigger for update... */  
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /*  exclusive mode */  
       return  
    /* RMA Sales Return section */  
    declare @lccustno char(10), @lcrmano char(10), @lcpaycode  char(10), @lccardno char(50),    
      @lcexpdate char(5), @lccardname char(30), @lcuid char(15),@llsavecard smallint      

    declare curracord_insupd scroll cursor for  
    select ccustno, crmano, cpaycode, ccardno, cexpdate, ccardname, lsavecard from inserted  
      
    open curracord_insupd  
    fetch next from curracord_insupd into @lccustno, @lcrmano, @lcpaycode, @lccardno, @lcexpdate, @lccardname, @llsavecard  
    while @@fetch_status = 0     
    begin  
        if @lccardno <> '' and @lccardno is not null and @llsavecard = 1  
        begin
            if not exists(select arcard.ccardno from arcard where  
              arcard.ccustno = @lccustno and arcard.cpaycode = @lcpaycode and arcard.ccardno = @lccardno)  
              begin  
                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output, @bfromfront = 0  
                    insert into arcard(cuid, ccustno, cpaycode, ccardno)  
                    values( @lcuid, @lccustno, @lcpaycode, @lccardno)  
                end  
                update arcard set cexpdate = @lcexpdate, ccardname = @lccardname   
                where ccardno = @lccardno and arcard.ccustno = @lccustno and arcard.cpaycode = @lcpaycode  
        end
        fetch next from curracord_insupd into @lccustno, @lcrmano, @lcpaycode,  
            @lccardno, @lcexpdate, @lccardname, @llsavecard  
    end
    close curracord_insupd  
    deallocate curracord_insupd  
  
    /* Shipment section */  
    declare @lcscustno char(10), @lcsrmano char(10), @lcspaycode  char(10), @lcscardno char(50),    
      @lcsexpdate char(5), @lcscardname char(30), @lcsuid char(15), @llsvcardshp smallint      
    declare cursracord_insupd scroll cursor for  
    select ccustno, crmano, cspaycode, cscardno, csexpdate, cscardname, lsvcardshp from inserted  
       
    open cursracord_insupd  
    fetch next from cursracord_insupd into @lcscustno, @lcsrmano, @lcspaycode, @lcscardno, @lcsexpdate, @lcscardname, @llsvcardshp  
    while @@fetch_status = 0     
    begin  
        if @lcscardno <> '' and @lcscardno is not null and @llsvcardshp = 1 
        begin
            if not exists(select arcard.ccardno from arcard where  
              arcard.ccustno = @lcscustno and arcard.cpaycode = @lcspaycode and arcard.ccardno = @lcscardno)  
              begin  
                    execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcsuid output, @bfromfront = 0  
                    insert into arcard(cuid, ccustno, cpaycode, ccardno)  
                    values( @lcsuid, @lcscustno, @lcspaycode, @lcscardno)  
                end  
                update arcard set cexpdate = @lcsexpdate, ccardname = @lcscardname   
                where ccardno = @lcscardno and arcard.ccustno = @lcscustno and arcard.cpaycode = @lcspaycode  
        end
        fetch next from cursracord_insupd into @lcscustno, @lcsrmano, @lcspaycode,  
            @lcscardno, @lcsexpdate, @lcscardname, @llsvcardshp  
    end
    close cursracord_insupd  
    deallocate cursracord_insupd  
end

CREATE trigger [dbo].[socamp_insupd] on [dbo].[socamp]
for insert, update  
as  
begin  
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */  
       return  
    set xact_abort on  
   
	 declare @cCampNo char(20),@cDescript char(54),@dCreate datetime,@dFrom datetime, @dTo datetime, @lStatus smallint, 
		@lSpecialPr	smallint,@nTarget numeric(18,4), @nMinSales numeric(18,4),@lactive smallint,@ldrp smallint,
		@nversion smallint,@ccomment char(40)
	  
	 declare CurInsUpd scroll cursor for  
	 select  cCampNo,cDescript,dCreate,dFrom,dTo,lStatus,lSpecialPr,nTarget,nMinSales,lActive,ldrp,nversion,ccomment
		from Inserted where lactive = 1   
	 Open CurInsUpd   
	 fetch next from CurInsUpd into   
	   @cCampNo,@cDescript,@dCreate,@dFrom,@dTo,@lStatus,@lSpecialPr,@nTarget,@nMinSales,@lActive,@ldrp,@nversion,@ccomment
	 while @@fetch_status = 0  
	 begin    
		if update(cDescript) and (select cDescript from deleted where ccampno = @ccampno) <> 
			(select cDescript from inserted where ccampno = @ccampno)
			update amanniquenam..socamp set cDescript=@cDescript 
				where ccampno = @ccampno			
		if update(dCreate) and (select dCreate from deleted where ccampno = @ccampno) <> 
				(select dCreate from inserted where ccampno = @ccampno)
			update amanniquenam..socamp set dCreate=@dCreate
				where ccampno = @ccampno
		if update(dFrom) and (select dFrom from deleted where ccampno = @ccampno) <> 
				(select dFrom from inserted where ccampno = @ccampno)
			update amanniquenam..socamp set dFrom=@dFrom
			where ccampno = @ccampno 
		if update(dTo) and (select dTo from deleted where ccampno = @ccampno) <> 
				(select dTo from inserted where ccampno = @ccampno)
			update amanniquenam..socamp set dTo=@dTo
			where ccampno = @ccampno
		if update(lSpecialPr) and (select lSpecialPr from deleted where ccampno = @ccampno) <> 
				(select lSpecialPr from inserted where ccampno = @ccampno)
			update amanniquenam..socamp set lSpecialPr=@lSpecialPr				
			where ccampno = @ccampno
		if update(nMinSales) and (select nMinSales  from deleted where ccampno = @ccampno) <> 
				(select nMinSales  from inserted where ccampno = @ccampno)
			update amanniquenam..socamp set nMinSales=@nMinSales 
			where ccampno = @ccampno
		if update(nTarget) and (select nTarget  from deleted where ccampno = @ccampno) <> 
				(select nTarget  from inserted where ccampno = @ccampno)
			update amanniquenam..socamp set	nTarget=@nTarget				
			where ccampno = @ccampno
			
		if update(lactive) and (select lactive from deleted where ccampno = @ccampno) <> 
				(select lactive from inserted where ccampno = @ccampno)
			update amanniquenam..socamp set lactive=@lactive				
			where ccampno = @ccampno	
			
		if update(ldrp) and (select ldrp from deleted where ccampno = @ccampno) <> 
				(select ldrp from inserted where ccampno = @ccampno)
			update amanniquenam..socamp set ldrp=@ldrp				
			where ccampno = @ccampno	
		
		if update(nversion) and (select nversion from deleted where ccampno = @ccampno) <> 
				(select nversion from inserted where ccampno = @ccampno)
			update amanniquenam..socamp set nversion=@nversion				
			where ccampno = @ccampno	
		
		if update(ccomment) and (select ccomment from deleted where ccampno = @ccampno) <> 
				(select ccomment from inserted where ccampno = @ccampno)
			update amanniquenam..socamp set ccomment=@ccomment			
			where ccampno = @ccampno			
			
		if not exists(select 1 from amanniquenam..socamp where ccampno = @ccampno) 
			begin
				insert into amanniquenam..socamp
					(cCampNo,cDescript,dCreate,dFrom,dTo,lStatus,lSpecialPr,nTarget,nMinSales,lactive,ldrp,nversion,ccomment) values
					(@cCampNo,@cDescript,@dCreate,@dFrom,@dTo,@lStatus,@lSpecialPr,@nTarget,@nMinSales,@lactive,@ldrp,@nversion,@ccomment)	
				insert into amanniquenam..sosppr select * from amanniquelive..sosppr where ccampno = @ccampno
					--(cCampNO,cItemNo,cDescript,cProdLine,cRevnCode,nQtylimit,nSales,nPriceExl,nDiscount,cpageno,cmajorcat,cclass,cgfttype,
					--	cpagepos,nversion,lfree,lspecial,cuid,lportal,csponcat,cspontype,lInactive,dfrom,dto,nfrcsqty) values
					--(@cCampNO,@cItemNo,@cDescript,@cProdLine,@cRevnCode,@nfrcsqty,@nSales,@npriceexcl,@nDiscount,@cpageno,@cmajorcat,@cclass,@cgfttype,
					--@cpagepos,@nversion,@lfree,@lspecial,@cuid,@lportal,@csponcat,@cspontype,@lInactive,@dfrom,@dto,@nfrcsqty)	
				insert into amanniquenam..sopcnt select * from amanniquelive..sopcnt where ccampno = @ccampno
					--(ccampno,csponcat,cspontype,ldiscount,nMLM ,nDisc,oRSV,oCost) values
					--(@ccampno,@csponcat,@cspontype,@ldiscount,@nMLM ,@nDisc,@oRSV,@oCost) 	
				insert into amanniquenam..socmpq select * from amanniquelive..socmpq where ccampno = @ccampno
					--(cCampNO,cDescript,cItemNo,cProdLine,nQty,nVersion) values
					--(@cCampNO,@cDescript,@cItemNo,@cProdLine,@nQty,@nVersion)				
				insert into amanniquenam..socmpf select * from amanniquelive..socmpf where ccampno = @ccampno
				
					--(cDescript,cCampNO,cItemNo,cProdLine,cRevnCode,cclass,cgfttype,lfree,nSales,nspprc,nQtylimit,cpageno,
					--	cmajorcat,cpagepos,nversion,lspecial,dfrom,dto,cuid,lportal,csponcat,cspontype,lInactive,nfrcsqty)
			--values
			--(@cDescript,@cCampNO,@cItemNo,@cProdLine,@cRevnCode,@cclass,@cgfttype,@lfree,@nSales,@nspprc,@nQtylimit,@cpageno,
			--@cmajorcat,@cpagepos,@nversion,@lspecial,@dfrom,@dto,@cuid,@lportal,@csponcat,@cspontype,@lInactive,@nfrcsqty)
			end
		fetch next from CurInsUpd into   
	   @cCampNo,@cDescript,@dCreate,@dFrom,@dTo,@lStatus,@lSpecialPr,@nTarget,@nMinSales,@lActive,@ldrp,@nversion,@ccomment 
	 end   
	 deallocate CurInsUpd          
end

/** ID: SO90003.01 Name: sorcrs_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger sorcrs_delete on sorcrs
for delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    declare @lcsono char(10), @lccustno char(10)
    declare cursorcrs_del scroll cursor for select csono, ccustno from deleted
    open cursorcrs_del

    while @@fetch_status = 0   
    begin
            delete from sortrs where csono = @lcsono and ccustno = @lccustno
            delete from sortrk where csono = @lcsono and ccustno = @lccustno
            delete from sorrmk where csono = @lcsono and ccustno = @lccustno
            delete from sorivk where csono = @lcsono and ccustno = @lccustno
            delete from sortci where csono = @lcsono and ccustno = @lccustno
            delete from sorkit where csono = @lcsono and ccustno = @lccustno
            fetch next from cursorcrs_del into @lcsono, @lccustno
        end
    close cursorcrs_del
    deallocate cursorcrs_del
end

/** ID: SO90004.02 Name: sorcrs_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 07/28/2014 **/
create trigger sorcrs_insert on sorcrs
for insert
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    set xact_abort on
    declare @lcuid char(15), @lcsono char(10), @lccustno char(10), @lcpaycode char(10),
      @lccardno char(50), @lcexpdate char(5), @lccardname char(30), @lcorderby char(30),
      @llsavecard smallint

    declare cursorcrs_ins scroll cursor for select csono, ccustno, cpaycode, ccardno, cexpdate,
      ccardname, corderby, lsavecard from inserted
    open cursorcrs_ins
    fetch next from cursorcrs_ins into @lcsono, @lccustno, @lcpaycode, @lccardno, @lcexpdate,
      @lccardname, @lcorderby, @llsavecard
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
      begin
        if (select npaytype from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode) <> 2
            --update sorcrs set cchkno = '' where csono = @lcsono
            update sorcrs set cchkno = '' where csono = @lcsono and ccustno = @lccustno   /* .MS902 .10016150 .07/28/2014. */
        if (select npaytype from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode) <> 3
            --update sorcrs set ccardno = '' where csono = @lcsono
            update sorcrs set ccardno = '' where csono = @lcsono and ccustno = @lccustno   /* .MS902 .10016150 .07/28/2014. */
        if (select npaytype from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode) = 5
            update sorcrs
            set ntermdisc = (select ntermdisc from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode),
              ndiscday = (select ndiscday from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode),
              ndueday = (select ndueday from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode)
            where csono = @lcsono
        else
            update sorcrs set ntermdisc = 0, ndiscday = 0, ndueday = 0 where csono = @lcsono
        if @lccardno <> '' and @llsavecard = 1
            begin
                if exists (select ccardno from arcard where ccustno = @lccustno and
                  cpaycode = @lcpaycode and ccardno = @lccardno)
                    update arcard set cexpdate = @lcexpdate, ccardname = @lccardname
                    where ccustno = @lccustno and cpaycode = @lcpaycode and ccardno = @lccardno
                else
                    begin
                        execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output, @bfromfront = 0
                        insert into arcard (cuid, ccustno, cpaycode, ccardno, cexpdate, ccardname)
                        values (@lcuid, @lccustno, @lcpaycode, @lccardno, @lcexpdate, @lccardname)
                    end
            end
        update arcust set corderby = @lcorderby where ccustno = @lccustno
        fetch next from cursorcrs_ins into @lcsono, @lccustno, @lcpaycode, @lccardno,
          @lcexpdate, @lccardname, @lcorderby, @llsavecard
      end
    close cursorcrs_ins
    deallocate cursorcrs_ins
end

        @lccardno char(50), @lcexpdate char(5), @lccardname char(30), @lcorderby char(30),

      @lccardname, @lcorderby, @llsavecard, @llquote, @llcrhold, @lnsalesamt, @lndiscamt

    begin
        if (select npaytype from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode) <> 2
            update sosord set cchkno = '' where csono = @lcsono
        if (select npaytype from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode) <> 3
            update sosord set ccardno = '' where csono = @lcsono

            set ntermdisc = (select ntermdisc from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode),

            where csono = @lcsono
        else
            update sosord set ntermdisc = 0, ndiscday = 0, ndueday = 0 where csono = @lcsono
