      @llsavecard smallint, @llcrhold smallint
    
    declare cursosord_upd scroll cursor for select csono, ccustno, lquote, lvoid, cpaycode,  
      ccardno, cexpdate, ccardname, nsalesamt, ndiscamt, lsavecard, lcrhold from inserted
    open cursosord_upd  
    fetch next from cursosord_upd into @lcsono, @lccustno, @lnquote, @lnvoid, @lcpaycode,  
      @lccardno, @lcexpdate, @lccardname, @lnsalesamt, @lndiscamt, @llsavecard, @llcrhold
    while @@fetch_status = 0
      begin
        if update(cpaycode)
            begin
                if (select npaytype from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode) <> 2
                    update sosord set cchkno = '' where csono = @lcsono
                if (select npaytype from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode) <> 3
                    update sosord set ccardno = '' where csono = @lcsono
                if (select npaytype from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode) = 5
                    update sosord  
                    set ntermdisc = (select ntermdisc from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode),  
                      ndiscday = (select ndiscday from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode),  
                      ndueday = (select ndueday from arpycd where cpaycode = @lcpaycode)  
                    where csono = @lcsono  
                else  
                    update sosord set ntermdisc = 0, ndiscday = 0, ndueday = 0  
                    where csono = @lcsono  
            end  
        if (update(ccardno) or update(lsavecard)) and @lccardno <> '' and @llsavecard = 1
            begin  
                if exists (select ccardno from arcard where ccustno = @lccustno and  
                  cpaycode = @lcpaycode and ccardno = @lccardno)  
                    update arcard set cexpdate = @lcexpdate, ccardname = @lccardname  
                    where ccustno = @lccustno and cpaycode = @lcpaycode and ccardno = @lccardno  
                else  
                    begin  
                        execute vsp_am_assignuid @cretvalue = @lcuid output, @bfromfront = 0  
  
                        insert into arcard (cuid, ccustno, cpaycode, ccardno, cexpdate, ccardname)  
                        values (@lcuid, @lccustno, @lcpaycode, @lccardno, @lcexpdate, @lccardname)  
                    end  
            end  
       
        if @lnvoid = 1 and @lnquote = 1   /* void sales quote */  
            begin  
                delete from sostrs where csono = @lcsono  
                delete from sotrmk where csono = @lcsono  
            end  

        /* approve sales quote */  
        if update(lquote) and @lnquote = 0
            update arcust set nsoboamt = nsoboamt + @lnsalesamt - @lndiscamt  
            where ccustno = @lccustno  

		/* credit hold */    
        if update(lcrhold)
            begin
	            if @llcrhold = 0 
		            update arcust set ncrholdamt = ncrholdamt - (deleted.nsalesamt - deleted.ndiscamt), 
                        nsoboamt = nsoboamt + (@lnsalesamt - @lndiscamt)
                        from deleted
                        where arcust.ccustno = @lccustno
	            else
		            update arcust set ncrholdamt = ncrholdamt + (@lnsalesamt - @lndiscamt),
                        nsoboamt = nsoboamt - (deleted.nsalesamt - deleted.ndiscamt)
                        from deleted
                        where arcust.ccustno = @lccustno
            end
        else
            if @llcrhold = 1 and (update(nsalesamt) or update(ndiscamt))
                update arcust   
                set ncrholdamt = (arcust.ncrholdamt - (deleted.nsalesamt - deleted.ndiscamt)) + (@lnsalesamt - @lndiscamt)   
                from deleted   
                where arcust.ccustno = @lccustno  

        if @lnquote=1 and(update(nsalesamt) or update(ndiscamt))   
            update arcust   
            set nsqamt = (arcust.nsqamt - (deleted.nsalesamt - deleted.ndiscamt)) + (@lnsalesamt - @lndiscamt)   
            from deleted   
            where arcust.ccustno = @lccustno  
  
        if update(lquote) and @lnquote = 0     
            update arcust   
            set nsqamt = nsqamt - (deleted.nsalesamt - deleted.ndiscamt)  
            from deleted   
            where arcust.ccustno = @lccustno  
        
        fetch next from cursosord_upd into @lcsono, @lccustno, @lnquote, @lnvoid, @lcpaycode,  
        @lccardno, @lcexpdate, @lccardname, @lnsalesamt, @lndiscamt, @llsavecard, @llcrhold
      end  
    close cursosord_upd  
    deallocate cursosord_upd  
end

/** ID: SO90011.01 Name: sosordh_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger sosordh_delete on sosordh
for delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    set xact_abort on
    delete from sostrsh from deleted where sostrsh.csono = deleted.csono
    delete from soshiph from deleted where soshiph.csono = deleted.csono
    delete from sosptrh from deleted where sosptrh.csono = deleted.csono
    delete from sospsph where cshipno not in (select cshipno from soshiph)
    delete from sosktrh where cshipno not in (select cshipno from soshiph)
    delete from sosktph where cshipno not in (select cshipno from soshiph)
end

CREATE trigger [dbo].[sosppr_insupd_sync] on [dbo].[sosppr]
for insert, update  
as  
begin  
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */  
       return  
    set xact_abort on  
   
	 declare @cCampNO char(20),@cItemNo char(20), @cDescript char(54), @cProdLine char(10), @cRevnCode char(10),	     
		@nQtylimit numeric(16,4), @nSales numeric(18,4), @nPriceExl numeric(18,4), @nDiscount numeric(18,4),   
		@cpageno char(10), @cmajorcat char(10), @cclass char(10), @cgfttype char(10),
		@nfrcsqty numeric(18,4),@npriceexcl numeric(18,4), @dfrom datetime,
		@cpagepos char(10),@nversion smallint,@lfree smallint,@lspecial smallint,@cuid char(15),@lportal smallint,
		@csponcat char(10),@cspontype char(10),@lInactive int,@dto datetime,@nqv numeric(18,4),@nsp numeric(18,4)



	DECLARE @Dcitemno CHAR(20),@Dcprodline CHAR(10),@Dnpriceexl NUMERIC(18,4),@Dndiscount NUMERIC(18,4),
	@DlPortal INT,@DnQtylimit NUMERIC(16,4),@Dcmajorcat CHAR(10),@Ddfrom DATETIME,@Ddto DATETIME,
	@Dnfrcsqty NUMERIC(18,4),@Dnqv NUMERIC(18,4),@Dnsp NUMERIC(18,4),@Dcspontype CHAR(10),@Dlinactive INT,
	@DcUid CHAR(15),@dlFree INT


	select  @dFrom=dFrom ,@dto=dto,@ccampno=ccampno from socamp  where socamp.lactive=1 and 
		  CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)  BETWEEN dfrom and dto 
    if @ccampno IS NULL return
	
	 declare CurInsUpdPR scroll cursor for  
	 SELECT citemno,cprodline,npriceexl,ndiscount,lPortal,nQtylimit,cmajorcat,
		dfrom,dto,nfrcsqty,nqv,nsp,cspontype,linactive,cuid,lfree
		  FROM inserted  WHERE ccampno=@ccampno 
		  
	 Open CurInsUpdPR   
	 fetch next from CurInsUpdPR into   
	   @citemno,@cprodline,@npriceexl,@ndiscount,@lPortal,@nQtylimit,@cmajorcat,
		@dfrom,@dto,@nfrcsqty,@nqv,@nsp,@cspontype,@linactive,@cuid,@lfree
	 while @@fetch_status = 0  
	 begin  
					  
		 SELECT @dcitemno=citemno,@Dcprodline=cprodline,@Dnpriceexl=npriceexl,@dndiscount=ndiscount,
		 @DlPortal=lPortal,@DnQtylimit=nQtylimit,@Dcmajorcat=cmajorcat,
		@Ddfrom=dFrom,@Ddto=dto,@Dnfrcsqty=nfrcsqty,@Dnqv=nQv,@Dnsp=nSP,@Dcspontype=cspontype,@Dlinactive=linactive,
		@DlFree=lFree
		FROM deleted WHERE cItemno=@citemno AND cUID=@cUid
		
		if (update(cProdLine) and @cProdLine<>@dcProdline)  OR
		   (update(nPriceExl) and @nPriceExl<>@dnPriceExl) OR
		   (update(nDiscount) and @nDiscount<>@dnDiscount) OR
		   (update(lportal) and @lportal<>@dlportal) OR
			(update(nQtylimit) and @nQtylimit<>@dnQtylimit) OR
			(update(cmajorcat) and @cmajorcat<>@dcmajorcat ) OR
			(update(dfrom) and @dFrom<>@dfrom) OR
			(update(dto) and @dto<>@ddto) OR
			(update(nfrcsqty) and @nfrcsqty<>@dnfrcsqty) OR
			(update(nqv) and @nqv<>@dnQv) OR
			(update(nsp) and @nsp<>@dnsp) OR
			(update(cspontype) and @cspontype<>@dcspontype) OR
			(update(linactive) and @linactive<>@dlinactive) OR
			(update(lfree) and @lfree<>@dlfree)
			insert into icWSupdate(citemno,cType,dLastUpd) values (@citemno,'sosppr',getdate())
		
	   fetch next from CurInsUpdPR into   
		   @citemno,@cprodline,@npriceexl,@ndiscount,@lPortal,@nQtylimit,@cmajorcat,
		@dfrom,@dto,@nfrcsqty,@nqv,@nsp,@cspontype,@linactive,@cuid,@lfree
	 end   
	 deallocate CurInsUpdPR          
end

/** ID: SO90012.01 Name: sosptr_insert Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger sosptr_insert on sosptr
for insert
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    set xact_abort on
    declare @lccustno char(10), @lncnlamt numeric(18,4)
    -- Get records inserted during Cancel shipment
    select @lccustno = max(ccustno),
      @lncnlamt = isnull(sum(nsalesamt - ndiscamt), 0)
    from inserted
    where cinvno = '' and nshipqty < 0
    if @lncnlamt = 0
        return
    update arcust
    set nuishpamt = nuishpamt + @lncnlamt
    where ccustno = @lccustno
end

/** ID: SO90013.01 Name: sosptr_update Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/
create trigger sosptr_update on sosptr
for update
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    set xact_abort on
    declare @lccustno char(10), @lnuiamt numeric(18,4)
    select @lnuiamt = 0

    if update(cinvno)
        begin  
            -- Invoice is voided/Line Item is deleted but shipment is retained
            select @lccustno = max(ccustno),
              @lnuiamt = isnull(sum(nsalesamt - ndiscamt), 0)
            from inserted
            where cinvno = '' and nshipqty > 0 and ncancelqty = 0
        end
    if @lnuiamt = 0
        return
    update arcust
    set nuishpamt = nuishpamt + @lnuiamt
    where ccustno = @lccustno
end

/** ID: SO90014.01 Name: sostrs_insert_update_delete Owner: AM ScriptDate: 03/07/2014 **/    
create trigger sostrs_insert_update_delete on sostrs    
for insert, update, delete    
as    
begin    
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */    
       return    
    set xact_abort on    
  
    -- do not fire trigger if none of the fields that affect values for arcust/sosord were inserted/updated  
    -- update() returns true for both insert and update statement  
    if exists (select csono from inserted) and not(update(nordqty) or update(nshipqty) or   
            update(nadvqty) or update(nprice) or update(ndiscrate))  
        return  
  
    declare @lcpriorsono char(10), @lcsono char(10), @lccustno char(10), @lcuid char(15),    
      @lnamtdec integer    
    select @lcpriorsono = ''    
    select @lnamtdec = namtdec from cosyst    
    if exists (select csono from inserted)   /* create or amend SO */    
        declare cursostrs scroll cursor for select csono, ccustno, cuid from inserted    
          order by csono    
    else   /* void SO */    
        declare cursostrs scroll cursor for select csono, ccustno, cuid from deleted    
          order by csono    
    open cursostrs    
    fetch next from cursostrs into @lcsono, @lccustno, @lcuid    
    while @@fetch_status = 0       
    begin    
        if @lcpriorsono <> @lcsono    
            begin    
                select @lcpriorsono = @lcsono    
                if exists (select csono from sostrs where csono = @lcsono and    
                  nordqty > nshipqty - nadvqty)    
                  and (select lvoid from sosord where csono = @lcsono) = 0  
                    update sosord set lnobo = 0 where csono = @lcsono    
                else   /* no backorder qty */    
                    if (select lquote from sosord where csono = @lcsono) = 0  
                        update sosord set lnobo = 1 where csono = @lcsono    
            end    

        /* sales order only */    
        if (select lquote from sosord where csono = @lcsono) = 0 and   
            (select lcrhold from sosord where csono = @lcsono) = 0  
            update arcust set nsoboamt = nsoboamt -    
              isnull((select round((nordqty - nshipqty) * nprice, @lnamtdec) -    
              round(round((nordqty - nshipqty) * nprice, @lnamtdec) * ndiscrate / 100, @lnamtdec)    
              from deleted where cuid = @lcuid and nordqty > nshipqty), 0) +    
              isnull((select round((nordqty - nshipqty) * nprice, @lnamtdec) -    
              round(round((nordqty - nshipqty) * nprice, @lnamtdec) * ndiscrate / 100, @lnamtdec)    
              from inserted where cuid = @lcuid and nordqty > nshipqty), 0)    
            where ccustno = @lccustno  
        
        fetch next from cursostrs into @lcsono, @lccustno, @lcuid  
    end    
    close cursostrs    
    deallocate cursostrs    
end

create trigger [dbo].[sostrs_qtyUD] on [dbo].[sostrs]
for update, delete
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    set xact_abort on
	
		declare @ixitmID INT,@nQtylimit numeric(16,4), 
		@nordqty numeric(16,4)
	
    declare cursostrsQTY scroll cursor for select ixitmID,nordqty from deleted WHERE ixitmID <> 0
				
    open cursostrsQTY
    fetch next from cursostrsQTY into @ixitmID, @nordqty
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
    begin
	SELECT @nQtylimit = nOrdqty from inserted where ixitmID =  @ixitmID
       UPDATE SOXITEMS SET nQtyPurchased = (nQtyPurchased-@nordqty) + @nQtylimit where id =  @ixitmID
	   fetch next from cursostrsQTY into @ixitmID, @nordqty
		end
    close cursostrsQTY
    deallocate cursostrsQTY
end

create trigger sostrs_u on sostrs
for update
as
begin
    if exists (select lexcl from cosyst where lexcl = 1)   /* exclusive mode */
       return
    set xact_abort on
	
  	declare @cItemNo varchar(20), @nordqty numeric(16,4),@nshipqty numeric(16,4), @csono char(10), @clineitem char(10)
	

   declare curover scroll cursor for select citemno,nordqty,nshipqty,csono,clineitem from inserted
    	order by csono
    
    open curover
    fetch next from curover into @citemno,@nordqty,@nshipqty,@csono,@clineitem
    while @@fetch_status = 0   
    begin
		 if @nshipqty > @nordqty
				update sostrs set nshipqty = nordqty where csono = @csono and clineitem = @clineitem
       fetch next from curover into @citemno,@nordqty,@nshipqty,@csono,@clineitem
	 end
    close curover
    deallocate curover
end

CREATE trigger [dbo].[update_webstore] on dbo.soxitems
 after update,insert
as
begin

	IF ((SELECT TRIGGER_NESTLEVEL()) > 1 ) RETURN

	declare @id INT,@ccustno char(10),@citemno char(20),@productid int,@CustomerID INT,@RegistrationID INT,
			@nqtylimit INT,@nQtypurchased int,@dfrom datetime,@dto datetime,@lactive bit,@dlastupd DATETIME,@cUser nvarchar(20),@lupdatetows bit
	declare @wid INT,@wccustno char(10),@wcitemno char(20),@wproductid int,@wCustomerID INT,@wRegistrationID INT,
			@wnqtylimit INT,@wnQtypurchased int,@wdfrom datetime,@wdto datetime,@wlactive bit,@wdlastupd DATETIME,@wcUser nvarchar(20)		

    declare CurUpdate scroll cursor for
	select id,ccustno,citemno,RegistrationID,nqtylimit,nQtypurchased,dfrom,dto,lactive,dlastupd,cUser,lupdatetows  from Inserted 
	Open CurUpdate 
	fetch next from CurUpdate into 
			@id,@ccustno,@citemno,@RegistrationID,@nqtylimit,@nQtypurchased,@dfrom,@dto,@lactive,@dlastupd,@cUser,@lupdatetows 
	while @@fetch_status = 0
	begin	

		if  NOT (exists(select @id from deleted) and update(lupdatetows) and 
			@lupdatetows  <> (select lupdatetows  from deleted where id=@id) and @lupdatetows=0)

		begin

		SET @dlastupd=GETDATE()
		UPDATE soxitems SET dlastupd=@dlastupd,lupdatetows=1 WHERE id=@id
			
		end
					
		fetch next from CurUpdate into 
			@id,@ccustno,@citemno,@RegistrationID,@nqtylimit,@nQtypurchased,
			@dfrom,@dto,@lactive,@dlastupd,@cUser,@lupdatetows

	end
	deallocate CurUpdate
	--EXEC msdb.dbo.sp_start_job N'Sync Customer Exclusive Items' ;
end
